subject: ALERT: Conservative Voters Reject Power Grab
body:
On a day when former President Trump was being arraigned in New York City, voters in Orland Park reject Keith Pekau's attempted power grab.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/c5b3131135ac/alert-conservative-voters-reject-power-grab?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Orland Park Voters Reject Keith Pekau's Power Grab, Delivering the Mayor Humiliating Defeats in Election Night Disaster (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/orland-park-voters-reject-keith-pekaus-power-grab-delivering-the-mayor-humiliating-defeats-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/orland-park-voters-reject-keith-pekaus-power-grab-delivering-the-mayor-humiliating-defeats-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Keith Pekau turning in his petitions at the State Board of Elections during his failed congressional campaign. (Source: Daily Herald)

Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau suffered humiliating defeats as residents resoundingly rejected his power grab dubbed as a “referendum” by a shocking 31 points.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/orland-park-voters-reject-keith-pekaus-power-grab-delivering-the-mayor-humiliating-defeats-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park residents overwhelming reject Mayor Keith Pekau’s referendum by a shocking 31 points. A “Yes” vote retains the existing form of government; a “No” vote would have given Pekau unlimited power and influence on day-to-day village operations.

On February 13th, Illinois Review published (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/keith-pekau-ran-in-2017-on-reducing-part-time-mayoral-salary-from-150k-to-40k-now-he-wants-it-back-after-losing-congressional-race.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) one of the very first articles challenging Pekau and questioning his motives when he quietly pushed through a referendum that would expand his influence – making him the most powerful political figure in Orland Park in over forty years.

Since then, Illinois Review has published
twelve articles (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/tag/keith-pekau?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) exposing the real Pekau – writing about how he rewards top campaign donors with village contracts; viciously attacks constituents – especially women online; harasses and intimidates voters; bullies local business owners and first responders; follows people in his vehicle; and had bulletproof glass installed in the Orland Park Village board room to make it appear as if his life is in constant danger – something third world dictators do to make their constituents feel sorry for them.

On Tuesday night, voters also rejected Pekau’s slate of endorsed candidates, losing 9 out of 10 races – proving that an overwhelming majority of Orland Park residents rejected Pekau and anyone associated with the power-hungry and divisive mayor.

Although the mayoral election is in two years, Pekau’s performance on Tuesday night proves that he is already a lame duck mayor – and his power and influence dramatically weakened after suffering humiliating defeats on Tuesday night.

In the final week leading up to the election – and sensing defeat – Pekau and his very small group of allies were coming unglued – viciously attacking on social media and on radio, anyone who was not aligned with the power-hungry mayor or his slate of endorsed candidates, including this publication, which he refers to as a “newsletter” or “blog,” despite having over 400,000 subscribers nationwide and a recently added newspaper edition.

For example, on Monday, Orland Park voters were greeted with an unhinged robocall from Pekau that was over a minute in length. Far from promoting his referendum or his preferred candidates, Pekau used the opportunity to lash out in a nasty rant against none other than the publisher of Illinois Review.

Pekau also
slammed (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Dq0RS4SxDQI&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) constituents who opposed his referendum and were not supportive of his slate of candidates at a recent village meeting, saying these constituents are “vile” and must be “driven out” of town.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/orland-park-voters-reject-keith-pekaus-power-grab-delivering-the-mayor-humiliating-defeats-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Source: Facebook/Pekau for Congress)

Pekau also went on Facebook to attack and argue with local firefighters and the firefighter union – on the same evening (https://abc7chicago.com/chicago-fire-gold-coast-cfd-north-lake-shore-drive/13088911/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D#:~:text=CHICAGO%20(WLS)%20%2D%2D%20Three%20firefighters,7%20a.m.%2C%20and%20quickly%20escalated.) when two Chicago firefighters were injured, one killed in Chicago.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/orland-park-voters-reject-keith-pekaus-power-grab-delivering-the-mayor-humiliating-defeats-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau attacking local first responders on Facebook.

This behavior is shocking – attacking both constituents and first responders for all to see. And it’s no wonder voters overwhelmingly rejected Pekau and his candidates on Tuesday – he is a disgrace and gives a bad name to every person in elective office.

Cook County Republican Party chairman Sean Morrison – a close friend and ally who endorsed Pekau during his failed congressional campaign, rushed to Pekau’s defense in the final days of the election, recording a robocall that attacked the publisher of Illinois Review with lies, calling the conservative mega-Trump donor and personal friend of the Trump family, a “Democrat.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/orland-park-voters-reject-keith-pekaus-power-grab-delivering-the-mayor-humiliating-defeats-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Cook County Republican Party Chairman Sean Morrison endorsed Pekau during his failed congressional campaign.

Unlike Morrison, who, sources confirm, secretly made a deal with Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot during her last election – a quick glance at our publisher’s donation history proves his Republican bona fides.

For Morrison to suggest that our publisher is a Democrat, is laughable. And it’s a typical attack line coming from Team Pekau.

Don Tracy, chair of the Republican Party of Illinois, and a close friend and ally of Pekau also recorded a robocall and sent out a text message for the power-hungry and divisive mayor – borrowing his talking points and urging Orland Park residents to go out and vote.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/orland-park-voters-reject-keith-pekaus-power-grab-delivering-the-mayor-humiliating-defeats-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
IL GOP chair Don Tracy recorded a robocall for Pekau and sent this text message that went out to Orland Park residents.

Pekau has remained silent online since his humiliating defeats, but Illinois Review expects the damaged and defeated mayor and his allies to resume their attacks.

And hopefully they do – because it will only reinforce the point why voters overwhelmingly rejected Pekau and anyone associated with him on election night.

The world can be a lonely place – and Pekau will soon find that out.

https://www.facebook.com/illinois.review/posts/pfbid03sTQ6jETzGxPiT2gmF2ZRFsSnTZxp5Xf6uJ8gD4pUa5C2vfwjVNXe1VjsrfveRqyl?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Last night, President Trump delivered a fiery speech about the weaponization of our judicial system to a crowd of more than 700 people at his Mar-a-Lago estate. The speech was just over a half hour in duration, making it one of his shorter speeches in recent months. (Source: Illinois Review)

https://www.facebook.com/illinois.review/posts/pfbid03sTQ6jETzGxPiT2gmF2ZRFsSnTZxp5Xf6uJ8gD4pUa5C2vfwjVNXe1VjsrfveRqyl?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Members of the Trump family joined the President for his speech, including Donald Trump Jr., left, Lara and Eric Trump, right, and Tiffany Trump and her husband Victor Knavs. Several members of Congress, longtime friend Roger Stone, former Arizona gubernatorial candidate Kari Lake, also were in attendance. (Source: Illinois Review)

https://www.facebook.com/illinois.review/videos/1193533017999006/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

President Trump entering the ballroom last night at his Mar-a-Lago estate to deliver his national address following the unprecedented arraignment in New York City. (Source: Illinois Review)

https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1ca1492466-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_05_09_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1ca1492466-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

**FACT:** Kevin McCarthy and the House GOP’s approval rating has been CRASHING for months...

**FACT:** We need the most up to date info from our supporters to craft a winning message as we gear up for the fight to retake the House Majority...

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2069%2E5257348%2EBEshhS ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

We wanted to make sure that you saw this message from Adam yesterday.
Already we’ve seen attacks from Fox News and Trump’s sycophants going
after Adam for standing up for the rule of law and our democracy.

And with the trial that is yet to come, and with the other ongoing
investigations, Adam is going to be on the frontlines in Congress —
pushing back against Republican efforts to obstruct the rule of law, and
any accountability for Trump.

Can you rush $10 to our campaign to help us ensure that Adam can keep up
the fight?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=apr2023_abs_em.RDZ0hA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2069%2E5257348%2EBEshhS ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2069%2E5257348%2EBEshhS ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Adam Schiff
Date: Tue, Apr 4, 2023
Subject: re: Donald Trump
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Derek — today is a really somber day. And I wanted to share
some thoughts with you as I watch some of this TV coverage.

It’s not a scene I would ever have imagined — a former U.S. president
photographed, finger-printed and arraigned in court. Some of his most
fervent supporters on the street trying to stir up trouble.

It’s a sobering reminder of how fragile our democracy really is, and how
important it is for all of us to do our part to make sure it survives for
another generation.

We don’t know what the next days, weeks and months will bring. But
already, Republicans in Congress are seeking to obstruct both this court
proceeding, and other serious criminal investigations into Trump’s
misconduct stemming from January 6th and his mishandling of classified
information.

Jim Jordan, the Chairman of the House Judiciary Committee, has threatened
to subpoena the Manhattan District Attorney in an effort to disrupt the
proceedings. I sit on the Judiciary Committee, and let me tell you, we
will fight this — or any other — attempt to interfere with the
administration of justice.

We can’t — and won’t — let Republicans succeed in preventing
accountability. Not if the rule of law is to mean anything.

If we are to remain a nation of laws, we must hold the rich and powerful
accountable, just as we would anyone else.

To do otherwise is not justice, and it is not democracy.

Thanks again for standing strong through all of this, and for your
support.

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230405_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2069%2E5257348%2EBEshhS ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

clean_body: The Left has awoken the Silent Majority like NEVER before. | | | Friend, Our campaign has raised over $12,000,000 since George Soros unleashed his prosecutor to “get” me. But here’s the number that will terrify Soros... ...Over a third of the donations to our campaign have been made by FIRST-TIME donors. Look, anyone can point to a poll to show how much support they have. But it’s another thing to be able to say that voters – for the first time – have decided to open up their wallets, pull out their credit cards, and give a grassroots donation of $1, $5, $24, to solidify their support. That’s much bigger than ANY poll – and we’re still even LEADING in the polls! I’m telling you – a BIG SHIFT is happening in our country. Americans are watching what’s happening to our nation in absolute HORROR. Soros doesn’t realize what he’s awoken. The Left has crossed one line too far. And We The People will peacefully hold them accountable! Thank you, | Donald J. name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20St.=20George?=
subject: Hey, did you see this? Join us as a 2023 Member today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction! | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f8c99b86c7&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Hey Peter,

Did you see the email our Chairman sent you the other day? I wanted to forward it over to you in case you hadn’t, because it is just that important for our success in 2023 and the upcoming 2024 elections. As you know, our party relies on the support of our members and donors to promote conservative values and elect Republicans up and down the ballot – and we rely HEAVILY on our Sustaining members to make success a reality.

Our goal is to have every Member back on board by May 1st, so check the email out below and [**renew your Membership today with a donation of $10, $25, $50 or more so we can keep up the fight!**](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=eb4deb88fe&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=8c2e7f4a71&e=6a281f566d "Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!")
---
| FYI - Our grassroots program broke state records in 2022 and we are working hard to deliver an even stronger grassroots program in 2024, but we can't do it without your continued support –[ so renew or become a sustaining member today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7678385d03&e=6a281f566d)

Sincerely,

Amanda St. George
---
|
---
| **BEGIN FORWARDED EMAIL**
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Dear Peter,

I'm excited to let you know that **our[2023 Washington State Republican Party Membership cards](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fbad423501&e=6a281f566d) are on the way**, and I am asking you to join the thousands who have already renewed their membership by investing in a stronger Republican Party.

By renewing your Sustaining Membership today, you'll be joining us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction. Your support will help us to recruit and train new activists and volunteers, launch effective advertising campaigns, and support our Republican candidates at all levels of government.

Embossed with your name and featuring our logo, I hope your Card will be a constant reminder that Sustaining Members like you are the cornerstone of our party.

I also hope your Card will be a symbol of the victories that we’ll earn if we unify and continue to focus on the Democrats and the disasters they’ve created across our state and America.

Most importantly, I want your Card to be a reminder of our Republican solutions to those problems – solutions that will give hope to millions of voters who’ve lost faith in a process that’s led by woke liberals.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f14b1ec48e&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9f198ce0ff&e=6a281f566d "Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!")
---
| By earning victory in local elections this year and flipping seats in Olympia next year, Washington Republicans can fight to put convicted criminals behind bars. We can cut wasteful and corrupt government programs and lower your taxes. And we can protect the sanctity of your vote. But we can’t do this without your support.

[I'm asking you today to become a 2023 Sustaining Member TODAY with a donation of ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fa1d7e858f&e=6a281f566d)[$10,](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=81124efc56&e=6a281f566d) [$25](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=994e7ffee4&e=6a281f566d), [$50](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=928ccebc40&e=6a281f566d),[ or more.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c940d4adfa&e=6a281f566d) Every dollar counts, and every contribution makes a difference in our fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction.
---
| [Renew you membership Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f3c3d1caa4&e=6a281f566d "Renew you membership Today!")
---
| As a [card carrying member of the Republican Party](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=3d98176a7c&e=6a281f566d), you can know that you are making the difference and helping us recruit and support strong candidates that will win in 2023 as we set the stage to win big in 2024.

Thank you for your continued support of our party and our mission. Together, we can make a real difference and ensure that Washington State doesn’t fall any further to the radical out-of-touch democrats.

Thank you in advance for your support,

Caleb Heimlich
Chairman
---
| [Become a Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b4caeea0fd&e=6a281f566d "Become a Sustaining Member Today!")
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/2023-sustaining-member-1340872?e=6a281f566d)
---

body:

| | |
# Next Business Meeting:
Weds April 19 at 7PM. [Zoom](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=3453752ac8&e=91a3f04de5).
Agenda includes voting for officers and for [bylaws!](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=ff16787422&e=91a3f04de5)
---
|
---
|
#### **We are the Party of People, Planet, and Peace!**
---
| The need for an independent left party is clear. We are an ecosocialist peace party who fight for social, economic, and environmental justice. Come to our meetings and events to meet us and get involved!
---
| **The result of the survey are in, and unfortunately there was no time available that everyone said they could attend. However the day with the most votes was THIRD WEDNESDAYS. I apologize that we are unable to meet everyone's schedules. Going forward we can always revisit this. Please come to this important meeting April 19 if you can!**

We might not know which direction Trump will go next, but we do know which direction you should head for the most up-to-date Trump swag. AP4Libertyshop.com We have an assortment of Trump gear. Whether you support the former PODUS, or would like to see him hung up by a string, at AP4Libertyshop.com you'll be sure to find just the right thing for the Trump lover in your life. name: Don Huffines
subject: Corporate Welfare Means Less Property Tax Relief for Texans
body:
Government needs to stop dividing Texas taxpayers up into special interest groups.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-fuylily-yuddtktydi-x/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuylily-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **Corporate Welfare Means Less Property Tax Relief for Texans**
## _" Government needs to stop dividing Texas taxpayers up into special interest groups."_
DALLAS, TX, April 5, 2023 -- Texas has received an unprecedented amount of your money this year. Taxpayers have overfunded the government by $62 billion. This massive surplus should be returned to _all_ Texans by eliminating the school property tax.Unfortunately, some in government want to divide Texas taxpayers into special interest groups to keep us from advocating for broad tax relief. Similar to the homestead exemption, corporate welfare only benefits a small number of Texans.Corporate welfare gives tax relief to businesses on your dime. Our latest paper, [_Corporate Welfare Means Less Property Tax Relief for Texans_](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuylily-yuddtktydi-y/),** ** explains how giving tax breaks to politically connected companies while continuing to raise everyone else's property taxes to pay for the tax breaks is theft.Members of the Texas Legislature that vote for these programs--and governors that sign the bills that allow for them--are aiding and abetting theft. School district property tax abatements should not be renewed.The best economic incentive we can provide businesses (or anyone) is lower property taxes across the board. Texans deserve definitive action that permanently locks in property tax relief and puts Texas on the path to eliminate school M&O property taxes. [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuylily-yuddtktydi-j/) [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuylily-yuddtktydi-t/) Huffines Liberty Foundation President, former State Senator Don Huffines, issued the following statement:_" Of course businesses that have real estate assets need property tax relief! The more real assets a business has, the more they are punished by the government. The solution, however, isn't picking winners and losers via lobbyists and campaign donations, it is simply eliminating or substantially cutting the property tax burden for all property owners."_Huffines further added:_" Texas tax problems are largely self-inflicted. That's the bad news. The good news, however, is the fixes needed are uncomplicated.__1) Limit state spending growth
2) Freeze school M&O property taxes
3) Use state budget surpluses to buydown M&O property taxes
4) Require voter approval for local governments and special districts to exceed the no-__new-revenue tax rate
5) Enshrine property tax relief in the Texas Constitution_ _Following this path, the Texas Legislature could cut property taxes almost in half in eight years, or less. "_ [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuylily-yuddtktydi-h/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuylily-yuddtktydi-k/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuylily-yuddtktydi-u/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuylily-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuylily-yuddtktydi-b/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuylily-yuddtktydi-n/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-fuylily-yuddtktydi-f/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-fuylily-yuddtktydi-z/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-fuylily-l-v)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fuylily-yuddtktydi-p/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-fuylily-17329976-yuddtktydi-e) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-fuylily-yuddtktydi-s/)

body:
I have never been more determined than I am right now.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze9enr7mvl483rmlgskdbt9dscfbg0mvouf2ba7g_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctjm1o72cth2bs)
---
Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.

In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Bank Accounts: Frozen!
body:
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, In 1990, the Brazilian government froze the bank accounts of thousands of citizens. In 2013, the victims were the people of Cyprus. In 2022, it hit closer to home -- in Canada. The government used its 1988 Emergency Act to freeze the bank accounts of hundreds of striking truckers. Think nothing like this could happen in the United States? If so, think again. |
---
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.
See front page is right here _a_
It gives the Fed the power to track and potentially even control your checking account.
Not just the money you have in your account at the moment ...
But also, every single check, withdrawal, deposit~~,~~ and transaction.
Practically everything you do with your money!
[You can find out the eerie details by clicking here.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6j5tg5ggumv84e37n826japv268f4d26blorq10_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctjm1o72cth2bs)
Be sure to do so with urgency.
A pilot program is already underway.
The next step is to roll it out to nearly every bank in America.
[Click here to learn how to protect your money](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9vklbd4ocg171sel4r3h9pg1q662gvmpjpu4gp0_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctjm1o72cth2bs).
Good luck and God bless!
---
Martin D. Weiss, PhD
Weiss Ratings Founder
P.S. This is not about a digital currency. It's very different. [Find out exactly what it is here.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvp9iupaqqk69lhgicjh58j2tftme1hqsiqdar6g_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctjm1o72cth2bs)

| | | [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04144%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=31L5xveP8JissMPdDqmtlQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden’s Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we’ve witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04255%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RhvZdLV4GL3Lw0GAloFajQ&sysid=1)**

---
Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they’re entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,

Donald J. Trump

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Bank Accounts: Frozen!
body:
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, In 1990, the Brazilian government froze the bank accounts of thousands of citizens. In 2013, the victims were the people of Cyprus. In 2022, it hit closer to home -- in Canada. The government used its 1988 Emergency Act to freeze the bank accounts of hundreds of striking truckers. Think nothing like this could happen in the United States? If so, think again. |
---
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.
See front page is right here _a_
It gives the Fed the power to track and potentially even control your checking account.
Not just the money you have in your account at the moment ...
But also, every single check, withdrawal, deposit~~,~~ and transaction.
Practically everything you do with your money!
[You can find out the eerie details by clicking here.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e97fceeb8f4247cf8e60483665c44bf8&_e=uMvxampLpdOcJ-32nIxQ9T7ebOQuUB6smvraqH-vK7cvZy0w7mKKhozQ0LpdLCpZxvnjuDYiPlbvioaeJDZJ8rjjWnxCUhXn8UmEfMgFAo7AljQb8SZKMNg4fdnLicfw0oZcIpScNB0FxvNce4tl9i2nKxmgdN_k64_ho4_IbGZjK3SM0LJdmUMho-lE640Roedhotqeqqw7bart9y7mxDYJTdeh8mbiKhW4FpAv6kCJPL5A3imkKU2RLxBJHwehVFeUzClqCGb6fXCA8pE49g%3D%3D)
Be sure to do so with urgency.
A pilot program is already underway.
The next step is to roll it out to nearly every bank in America.
[Click here to learn how to protect your money](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e97fceeb8f4247cf8e60483665c44bf8&_e=uMvxampLpdOcJ-32nIxQ9T7ebOQuUB6smvraqH-vK7cvZy0w7mKKhozQ0LpdLCpZxvnjuDYiPlbvioaeJDZJ8rjjWnxCUhXn8UmEfMgFAo7AljQb8SZKMNg4fdnLicfw5co0CF5BGHcwwkq6YP8PFfqXU7f7pehwlVT1IEFoy48GY3m_fYBZ6yJyHwha9vCVDkIDM888zy8mqlgZBRPRRlAL-QNgrsQUuvJW9LSC1G5zi0Qnh7MGr4J_GFGdXUlj4-EG6qcAUZNR93fijZHMEw%3D%3D).
Good luck and God bless!

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fecdc260d6484b2bb18a4a51481b2a47&_e=FOAKIYKBctkg2xsHAZtZLxL9Pvq_do8GjV5Pnw0nYuOT0OCOhXpczD7XKOa935MMF4UWhJyGgL0Npm3dr8mzz-oNhae3r6w0hNn55vl7BRKAIJ6L5S2l7XeFpuXa4jGQ3EujDry84xkfG45MgmCwIBsRpV9v-u5rGZnBRiQ5wEyy-kKPPq-Tb241E-xVIHo5WMjXcrI2uS0H3EsWvZKAhNAiipzGP2n2cafP4fHo40Zb4leLvlb5iIX3nJHc_zqV6V4X8Ci2YYx9oAvKZIgrYA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fecdc260d6484b2bb18a4a51481b2a47&_e=FOAKIYKBctkg2xsHAZtZLxL9Pvq_do8GjV5Pnw0nYuOT0OCOhXpczD7XKOa935MMF4UWhJyGgL0Npm3dr8mzz-oNhae3r6w0hNn55vl7BRKAIJ6L5S2l7XeFpuXa4jGQalYRwsra9BXem11A5AHHunLM7KgYuQ1zuj7a3BSFG8fHJHNf33D2ZSh6xn_DQrb_5M8m7aH3SIfQQUtrLWMV5g5M3BW_W80PLnfnCDfdvI31EQ3t6gP61UEtN5ENAijIk3qcZTuYUqJ0tV4p2GVgIg%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fecdc260d6484b2bb18a4a51481b2a47&_e=FOAKIYKBctkg2xsHAZtZLxL9Pvq_do8GjV5Pnw0nYuOT0OCOhXpczD7XKOa935MMF4UWhJyGgL0Npm3dr8mzz-oNhae3r6w0hNn55vl7BRKAIJ6L5S2l7XeFpuXa4jGQYrKh8eju_fQioTF1XSJuplS-btBfhqwlZD22zUKiK6eiZ4LeA3PM0dw91MAs2uQe7pS9Zlic-UL2X_7vOmYNE757m3e9uLWcQOFYuDL59A_AcghSSYwsvuQAnpOWf_pnObWashz2whit8kd5SfGMig%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Perhaps no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny than Winston Churchill.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8cfb4919889b4d72acb82d569812809d&_e=KmnxvXcRYm5rLH-2yJ3R36oC-jPneDlDXM2N4rftXWxkEVwr7uVwVhHKpfW9HV1C76a-9tkBt3ZSrwfGNUnNhlK09hAZvCzjaJFDlDYT4t9QNlouINMqA8Xr9YkJ4Na833_NvrT1VS7wdJeXZjtEOChWLEddpGvQseUTLMSlKxBVLXOWVegfhS2qKUXr75GLrk_EIOHd6igA0oklRWlRQBDayIV3injrM2IOALyNrPozoPhe18Js8nNjGQLTNe8cDikkXKs2XmBDTm_ufrsGo0DCT8VK_gIICd2UYmpG8mBKlcIKXg2FXn_ZcRt-xWpWpzfeCPlZHRfXuEI5iAM6npZCoMUmesqTXzHU4O58w8va4w9hdaXJ6lcXs1iwad2znCSUKB0yBIzV0AwNuELUHbk1_0c76Nnwhtyg4wakWFk%3D)

Dear Fellow American, Perhaps no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny than Winston Churchill. Not only did he diagnose the threat of modern technology, but he also spoke most effectively against the idea of socialism. So, it should come as no surprise to learn that so many "academics" and activists are working to smear Churchill's legacy. That's why studying an accurate account of his accomplishments is more important than ever. And right now, you can do just that when you get a copy of one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, [**" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,"**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8cfb4919889b4d72acb82d569812809d&_e=KmnxvXcRYm5rLH-2yJ3R36oC-jPneDlDXM2N4rftXWxkEVwr7uVwVhHKpfW9HV1C76a-9tkBt3ZSrwfGNUnNhlK09hAZvCzjaJFDlDYT4t9QNlouINMqA8Xr9YkJ4Na833_NvrT1VS7wdJeXZjtEOChWLEddpGvQseUTLMSlKxBVLXOWVegfhS2qKUXr75GLrk_EIOHd6igA0oklRWlRQBDayIV3injrM2IOALyNrPozoPhe18Js8nNjGQLTNe8cDikkXKs2XmBDTm_ufrsGo-09QTW9gA71BJfVpB_Kbdxk_5Aq0vVrcgsWdy7Vi4nagD2KJoCihBBmq3oNLqnOSQZxa-y_ZuxsPNORzFn-oUR9bz4iwMhSnWkRd5LzZzHX2Vp4JO66ZimYJ5U6iM4lYF2j_iOSq0n7vzVoY8orlfM%3D) on DVD.
---
| | Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, **and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.** When you view this close study of Churchill's words and deeds, you'll learn timeless lessons that teach:
* The principles and virtues required for great statesmanship.
* How to deal with the threats and opportunities presented by modern technology.
* How to confront the threat of socialism.
* How to serve the cause of our own country as it appears today.

**I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set. And it can be yours today when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**

clean_body: Perhaps no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny than Winston Churchill. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Perhaps no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny than Winston Churchill. Not only did he diagnose the threat of modern technology, but he also spoke most effectively against the idea of socialism. So, it should come as no surprise to learn that so many "academics" and activists are working to smear Churchill's legacy. That's why studying an accurate account of his accomplishments is more important than ever. And right now, you can do just that when you get a copy of one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, on DVD. | | Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift. When you view this close study of Churchill's words and deeds, you'll learn timeless lessons that teach: The principles and virtues required for great statesmanship. How to deal with the threats and opportunities presented by modern technology. How to confront the threat of socialism. How to serve the cause of our own country as it appears today. I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set. And it can be yours today when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | You can reserve your copy using this secure link: As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than many other books and videos available today. And they will reveal profound lessons that apply to today's urgent problems. Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they're gone. You can use this secure link to reserve your copy of " Winston Churchill and Statesmanship" on DVD right now: Please enjoy this essential study of Churchill's words and deeds. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
Help us get our commercial on air
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |

| Friend could you chip in one more time?
---
| | |
---

Friend We are so close to getting our commercial on air but we need your help. Will you please chip in today? The cost just to produce a commercial is about $10,000. And it's thousands more to actually air a commercial. We can do it but we are running out of time.
---
WOULD YOU PLEASE CHIP IN $100 SO I CAN AIR MY COMMERCIAL?
---
| |
---|---
|

THEY ARE TRYING TO TAKE ME OUT BECAUSE I STAND UP FOR YOU.

ARE YOU GOING TO STAND STRONG WITH ME LIKE I STOOD STRONG FOR YOU?

THE ELECTION IS TUESDAY 20 JUNE
LESS THAN 2 MONTHS AWAY

We must have the money now to pay staff, purchase mailers and campaign signs, air commercials and host events.

Running a campaign is like running a business. We have to raise our own funds to run for public office.

And while many are giving, some of you have not given yet, and I'm asking you

If you've already donated $100 to my re-election campaign to the Virginia Senate; thank you.

Please consider giving another $100 so we can fully fund my campaign. If you have not already donated $100, would you please do so today?

Please donate today. If they silence me, they know they don't have to address the issues that are most important to you.

Can I count on you? You know you can count on me.

In Service,

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: 60 Minutes platforming Marjorie Taylor Greene’s advocacy of domestic terrorism shakes the very foundation of democracy. We need to fight back every year, all year round.
body:
MTG’s a threat to democracy
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T416f18cd-4d4c-4cbf-bcd8-1f47c027d38c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_In one of the most despicable acts by a mainstream media organization, 60 Minutes had on raving lunatic, anti-Semite, anti-Muslim bigot, etc., Marjorie Taylor Greene, one of only two Republicans to show up at Trump’s New York arraignment to defend him._** _Greene called the Parkland school shooting fake, 9/11 an inside job, said Jewish lasers started California forest fires and visited the Jan 6th terrorists, whom she called political prisoners (you may recall she asked Trump for a pardon for her activities Jan 6th)._ I could go on, but why bother, you know what kind of pond scum we're dealing with here. **_This platforming of domestic terrorism shakes the very foundation of democracy._** **_Meanwhile, The Center for American Progress (CAP) fights to strengthen our democratic foundation, holding elected representatives accountable and, as they share in their mission statement, "cutting through the noise to get the facts out." With 60 Minutes broadcasting Greene's idiot-ideas & weapons-grade propaganda to a network audience, we need CAP to "get the facts out" more than ever._** [**_To ensure people get the truth and not "Taylor-made" propaganda attacking our democracy, will you please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Center for American Progress' Action Fund?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbcb5e100-683a-4936-b2f5-67513374795b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting to keep this mind pollution out of our public space._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: me, Bob (3)
subject: Banning books and defunding libraries?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Friend,
If you agree that reading freely is fundamental to the education of citizens in a healthy democracy, I need your help [http://bit.ly/FundDrBob] getting to Congress.
Banning books and defunding libraries is unAmerican
My favorite childhood book, The Giving Tree by Shel Silverstein [https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100063668275264&__cft__[0]=AZXKmeRvc6eedx36hKSDqxcN8W8VRFKbs0pHjVRgwxvq5fkC65aOgvsZeSNFr559U8vQuKyrZflLlQ3u8d7OXNnhQ8O0L-FQH-J3j1_mJxWqY20inRFKVMJKQLEHqRv4qarQPU8_EiVshJCSuhXyF09OpKUDmIQeS1ECFSAnTMxslj-GbHr3MFxTYq-62ndOn4A&__tn__=-]K-R] , was once banned. As librarians fight to protect our 1st Amendment Rights, misguided lawmakers are retaliating with draconian laws that damage our democracy. It is unAmerican.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]
Will you contribute to my campaign [http://bit.ly/FundDrBob] so I can help our federal government value education and ensure the protection of America's 1st Amendment Rights?
Help me preserve library funding and protect librarians. Donate now. [https://www.votedrbob.com/so/6cOTB_zbg/c?w=26cf31yCkScEMzC3ZbNOLcPHzYVeK2U05NgJoplkbW0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21pcnVyYWxmdW5kIiwiciI6IjI3ZTU4YTAzLTU5YWYtNDA3OS1iYmU0LWFkZDM3MzAwZjMwMCIsIm0iOiJscCJ9]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund]
Growing up, my favorite book, 'The Giving Tree' by Shel Silverstein (1964), taught me fundamental lessons about the importance of reciprocity and man's sometimes-destructive relationship with nature. Today, just seeing the iconic green illustrated cover is nostalgic.
In 1988, as we introduced our children to stories of selflessness, giving, rights of passage, and helping those in need, a library in Colorado banned the book because someone interpreted Silverstein's ambiguous theme sexually.
Silverstein did not believe in cookie-cutter, happily-ever-after stories. We allowed our children's curiosity and imagination to help them interpret the world. It's why literature, even if embedded in themes of darkness or controversy, is fundamental to the American education process.
Banning books is unAmerican.
More than ever, today, legislatures are enacting draconian laws to take books off shelves and defund libraries. Recently, Missouri House Republicans voted to defund all of the state's public libraries.
Federally, for four years from 2016 - '21, Republicans proposed a budget that permanently eliminated the Institute of Museum and Library Services (IMLS) and virtually all federal funding for libraries.
Just like in 1988, when Silverstein's book was banned, negative interpretations of children's literature have led to citizen initiatives that ultimately resulted in the rejection of funding millages for local Michigan libraries, cutting librarian jobs and devaluing education.
Imagination and curiosity of young minds need to be encouraged, nurtured, and fed, not prohibited. Public libraries and librarians protect our freedom of speech, the freedom of the press, and our fundamental First Amendment rights. We must demand our leaders do the same.
More than 1,600 books were banned from American schools in 2022, impacting 4 million students' exposure to ideas that could help them grow and learn.
Student readers are losing access to critical information, and through defunding, legislators are attacking librarians and teachers for doing their jobs. Reading freely is fundamental to the education of citizens in a healthy democracy.
I didn't appreciate libraries enough growing up. We took it for granted, but books were fundamental to my and my children's education. Like 'The Giving Tree,' books exploring and illuminating differing viewpoints help build connections among people by deepening their understanding of the world.
Those who censor books because of different literary interpretations create barriers and feed the divisiveness that threatens to damage this country.
Help me advocate for and protect the First Amendment. Donate now. [http://bit.ly/FundDrBob]
Express Donate: $25 [https://www.votedrbob.com/so/6cOTB_zbg/c?w=iGOjagkSqOH9vLmhRiAxtvzg386AKD9oxQbI3eCLb7Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21pcnVyYWxmdW5kP2V4cHJlc3NfbGFuZT10cnVlJmFtb3VudD0yNSZyZWZjb2RlPWV4cHJlc3NfbGFuZV8yNSIsInIiOiJhZjIzM2E5ZS1hNWI4LTQzYTMtOGQ4Yi0wZWVjNTljOWIzZTEiLCJtIjoibHAifQ]
Or, donate another amount [https://www.votedrbob.com/so/6cOTB_zbg/c?w=1n5UwyR4Lxr2geV5g-UIrpah3hBb1gZsl220vxQngk4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21pcnVyYWxmdW5kP2V4cHJlc3NfbGFuZV9vdGhlcj10cnVlJnJlZmNvZGU9ZXhwcmVzc19sYW5lX290aGVyIiwiciI6ImFmMjMzYTllLWE1YjgtNDNhMy04ZDhiLTBlZWM1OWM5YjNlMSIsIm0iOiJscCJ9]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]

subject: the greatest threat to our sovereignty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528387:6tuq3FGNL:m:1:3391001263:BC1A23F51F3CD963BEF883D426E657FD:r)
---
| | Peter, When Joe Biden and his administration allowed the Chinese Communist Party to spy on America's military bases and gain intelligence about our military readiness, **_Mike sounded the alarm early_** , warning about the potential security threats associated with this provocative action from the CCP.
---
| | _" Letting a Chinese surveillance balloon lazily drift over America is like seeing a robber on your front porch and inviting him in, showing him where you keep your safe, where you keep your guns, where your children sleep at night, and then politely asking him to leave. _**_It makes no sense._**_"_
---
_\- Mike Gallagher_
---
|
---
| | Fast forward to now, and it has been confirmed the CCP gained real-time surveillance via this balloon, a major national security threat. The _entire_ spy balloon saga proves the Chinese Communist Party isn't just an 'over there' problem. **It 's a right here at home problem - and it's a threat to our sovereignty. ** [**Chip in now to join Mike 's fight to protect our sovereignty and hold the CCP accountable.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528387:6tuq3FGNL:m:1:3391001263:BC1A23F51F3CD963BEF883D426E657FD:r)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Tucker Carlson says Josh Hawley isn’t a fraud and a coward…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18925?t=1001&akid=3125%2E346206%2ELhJmoy ][IMG]

Some folks on cable news tried to claim Josh Hawley didn’t actually show
us he was a fraud and a coward on January 6th. So let’s get this straight,
Peter.

Josh Hawley didn’t just run away from the Capitol. He ran away from the
same people he raised his fist and claimed to be fighting for just hours
earlier.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18925?t=1002&akid=3125%2E346206%2ELhJmoy ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18925?t=1003&akid=3125%2E346206%2ELhJmoy ]CHIP IN →

As a U.S. Marine, I took an oath to defend our democracy — just like Josh
Hawley when he was sworn into the U.S. Senate. But unlike him, I didn’t
break mine.

That’s why I’m running to replace him — so Missourians will have a real
warrior for working people standing up and fighting for them in
Washington. And it’s why I need your help today, Peter.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18925?t=1004&akid=3125%2E346206%2ELhJmoy ]We don’t need any more frauds or cowards like Josh Hawley in the U.S.
Senate. Will you split a donation of $25 or anything at all between my
campaign and Charles Booker right now so we can defeat him, flip this
seat, and stand up for our democracy?

Thanks for standing with me,

— Lucas Kunce

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18925?t=1005&akid=3125%2E346206%2ELhJmoy ]CHIP IN →

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230406-3125-footer&t=1006&refcode2=3125_346206_LhJmoy&akid=3125%2E346206%2ELhJmoy

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3125%2E346206%2ELhJmoy

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I have never been more determined than I am right now.

| | | [ ](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79648%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XpsqSEcswCWej%2fEvtCQPnA&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden’s Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we’ve witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79649%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X2IS9jJyYEziW%2bByhY0TuQ&sysid=1)**

In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they’re entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.

EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Cruise ships dumping toxic WASTEWATER in our oceans
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1709225?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **A bone-thin polar bear lumbers along an ice shelf, mustering all the strength she can to find food. Her icy hunting grounds are RAPIDLY MELTING, and food is getting harder to find. She’s beginning to STARVE!** The Arctic is _**warming TWICE as fast**_ as the rest of the world. Animals are already enduring some of the worst impacts of the climate crisis: _**malnutrition, starvation, and habitat loss!**_ Southern Beaufort Sea polar bears are the most imperiled polar bear population in the entire world, with only _**900 remaining!**_ Meanwhile, corporate cruise companies charge TITANIC vessels into the Arctic, spewing **TOXIC POLLUTION** , dumping **WASTEWATER** , and sending **ARCTIC-MELTING EMISSIONS** into the atmosphere. The air, water, and noise pollution harms local people and drives away fish that both polar bears and Indigenous communities rely on for food. **If the EPA allows this to continue, it’s a DISASTER waiting to happen.** You can help push the EPA to take action! **[The Arctic is melting FAST, Friend. Please take immediate action to STOP corporate cruise companies from recklessly charging through fragile habitats!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1709226?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1709227?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Dumped toxic chemicals can seep into the food chain, hurting everyone and everything that depends on the ocean’s resources! Carnival Corporation, the largest cruise company, is the worst offender. It lugged _**11,000 tons of toxic heavy fuel through ESSENTIAL ARCTIC HABITATS in just one year!**_
The Arctic cannot afford the destruction caused by greedy cruise corporations. The EPA could take significant pressure off this fragile ecosystem by reining in cruise pollution. But we need YOUR help! **[If just 1 of every 13 people reading this email takes action, we can help give the Arctic a fighting chance against pollution. Tell the EPA to rein in corporate cruise companies by 11:59pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1709228?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1709227?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: Endeavor for America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Smiley Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Smiley for Washington Inc
body:
I grew up on my family’s farm in Washington where from a young age I learned the value of hard work.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z44omqkja05pbi504k59afmippe27vuubgmn0i68_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)
---
Fellow Conservative, It’s Tiffany Smiley.
Last year, my Senate race made national headlines as I sent a 30-year incumbent scrambling to hold onto her seat.
And even though we didn’t get the results we wanted, my battle for America is far from over.
You see, I’m not the kind of person who gives up after just one setback. I grew up on my family’s farm in Washington where from a young age I learned the value of hard work.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1pjq6ngje3q43q1qrsslv94idflsd6iq5it0mfo_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrvr2b1sdf5krl1s6q2hf6o0n23gqbdfjps0m03g_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)
---
| | It sparked my love of community, and inspired me to study to become an OBGYN nurse to help women during the most significant moments of their lives.
With my high school sweetheart Scotty, we had a life I could only dream of - until I received a call that changed everything. Scotty, who was serving in the U.S. Army in Iraq, had lost sight in both his eyes to a suicide bomber.
When I got to his side at Walter Reed, they asked me to sign a document on the spot that would prevent him from ever serving his country again.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zatp5s6asmlc8sv4i0tmrdm3723emhks63hoboeo_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zescvrirvsrt22n5psh6i4qv7060af8gf7u4dn38_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)
---
| | **But I wouldn’t give up on his dream.**
Since then, I’ve dedicated my life to ensuring that every veteran gets the benefits and care they deserve - and Scotty went on to become America’s first blind active-duty Army Officer.
My husband and I went up against the establishment in the U.S. military and won. And now, [I’m ready to take on the rest of the broken American bureaucracy.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh7gkq2js6o78897bi4u593j4l72lbpi32lfjq9o_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg9rkt6l61m1ci3g1s738dhi2tuhkvb0gbffqd3g_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl954haagoe7s4bk9s2enlph7jvc7dcs5q8brsm0_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)
---
| | [**END OUT-OF-TOUCH WASHINGTON POLITICS**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfa0iij1fd8cbra3orckt9gk26dfvdfqlu2ln2e0_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)
---
I started my mission last year running for Senate in Washington, and now, I’m starting a new fight with **Endeavor PAC.**

When I was fighting for my husband Scotty’s future, I saw that the bureaucracy in Washington fiercely protects its insiders while leaving hardworking Americans behind.

The resistance was tough, but we won - and now, I’m ready to win for the rest of America.

I’m not giving up on my mission to elect strong, freedom-loving leaders to the House and the Senate.

**The fight for 2024 is already underway,[and it’s going to take each one of us doing our part to change how business is done in Washington.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd2gj1ln2nb7s7qh4helifi5mpim2sp4h2f08dg8_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)**

---
As someone who loves America, it pains me to see the radical Left and the DC establishment try to erode the freedoms that make our country strong.

But I know that there are hardworking Americans out there who want to TRULY fight for our country and bring forward conservative solutions for families like yours and mine. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z07lgfqhu6rdbai338dq0hrvnum9k9pv9erdg4no_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)

---
I’m not going to lie - the road ahead will be long and difficult. But I’m not about to give up anytime soon.
I’m ready to take on the forces that want to take away your freedoms, and today, you have a choice -[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z76go9fv7plejch8u54e7bolnvid2c0ctf3t4gmo_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)[**will you stand with me for American freedom or let the DC establishment erode the country you love?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlbfrrqdfnvg9ea27onh2m3ih3mhepibibea6m18_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)

Through **Endeavor PAC** , we can build off of our momentum from our Senate campaign to elect strong conservatives from ALL walks of life that will tackle our border, our skyrocketing crime, out-of-control inflation, and so much more.
Our work is cut out for us, and any amount you can pitch into our mission will fuel the fight for maverick conservatives across America.
**[Now that you know my story, it’s time for us to write the next chapter in America’s story together. Please, pitch in what you can now to fuel our fight to END business as usual in Washington and send the next generation of conservatives to the capitol.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7eqbpt6hi4jo9toku2i1ammm7s1292cegij08s8_rp22sh2s8i66o70ctieap72clh2bs)**

clean_body: I grew up on my family’s farm in Washington where from a young age I learned the value of hard work. | | | Fellow Conservative, It’s Tiffany Smiley. Last year, my Senate race made national headlines as I sent a 30-year incumbent scrambling to hold onto her seat. And even though we didn’t get the results we wanted, my battle for America is far from over. You see, I’m not the kind of person who gives up after just one setback. I grew up on my family’s farm in Washington where from a young age I learned the value of hard work. | | | | | It sparked my love of community, and inspired me to study to become an OBGYN nurse to help women during the most significant moments of their lives. With my high school sweetheart Scotty, we had a life I could only dream of - until I received a call that changed everything. Scotty, who was serving in the U.S. Army in Iraq, had lost sight in both his eyes to a suicide bomber. When I got to his side at Walter Reed, they asked me to sign a document on the spot that would prevent him from ever serving his country again. | | | | | But I wouldn’t give up on his dream. Since then, I’ve dedicated my life to ensuring that every veteran gets the benefits and care they deserve - and Scotty went on to become America’s first blind active-duty Army Officer. My husband and I went up against the establishment in the U.S. military and won. And now, | | | | | I started my mission last year running for Senate in Washington, and now, I’m starting a new fight with Endeavor PAC. When I was fighting for my husband Scotty’s future, I saw that the bureaucracy in Washington fiercely protects its insiders while leaving hardworking Americans behind. The resistance was tough, but we won - and now, I’m ready to win for the rest of America. I’m not giving up on my mission to elect strong, freedom-loving leaders to the House and the Senate. The fight for 2024 is already underway, As someone who loves America, it pains me to see the radical Left and the DC establishment try to erode the freedoms that make our country strong. But I know that there are hardworking Americans out there who want to TRULY fight for our country and bring forward conservative solutions for families like yours and mine. I’m not going to lie - the road ahead will be long and difficult. But I’m not about to give up anytime soon. I’m ready to take on the forces that want to take away your freedoms, and today, you have a choice - Through Endeavor PAC , we can build off of our momentum from our Senate campaign to elect strong conservatives from ALL walks of life that will tackle our border, our skyrocketing crime, out-of-control inflation, and so much more. Our work is cut out for us, and any amount you can pitch into our mission will fuel the fight for maverick conservatives across America. For America, Tiffany Smiley | | Paid for by the Smiley Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Smiley for Washington Inc. and Endeavor PAC.Smiley Victory Fund228 S Washington St, #115Alexandria, VA 22314 | | Address: PO Box 320191, Alexandria, VA 22320 American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Jon Tester
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Hey folks, Jon Tester here.
I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.
I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.
Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.
These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:
Can you split a donation between Seth Moulton and my campaign? We need to raise another $1,000,000 to reach our goal. Anything you can give helps. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
This will be one of the most competitive races of 2024, and I’ll need your help from the very beginning to build a team strong enough to win.
Thank you,
Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
