name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: I’m running for Congress again to finish the job
disclaimer_text: paid for by powerful interests
body:
I’m Ashley Ehasz and I’m running again for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 1st District - this time to finish the job. Why run again? Because there is too much at stake. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61375162/399883699/-227468080?refcode=fl_email_act_20230406launch1A_ae_actives_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzlmZTk4ZC03MmQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pw8OgU-MKE64LR-5gy7M5DsyEM3N83A59S5xfvPHsNk=)
---
You’re hearing this from me first, friends. **I’m Ashley Ehasz and I’m running again for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 1st District — this time to finish the job. Why run again? Because there is too much at stake.** I’m running to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families like mine. For too long, anti-choice Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick has sold out this district — now, _his time is up_. Last year, we came so close to defeating Fitzpatrick through powerful grassroots organizing in every corner of the district. **[This time, we’re back for Round 2 and we’re ready to finish the job. Will you stand with me in the fight to build a brighter future for all Pennsylvanians by joining our campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61375163/399883700/1904265837?refcode=fl_email_act_20230406launch1A_ae_actives_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzlmZTk4ZC03MmQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pw8OgU-MKE64LR-5gy7M5DsyEM3N83A59S5xfvPHsNk=&emci=0d38cf77-3cd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d79fe98d-72d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5643323)** | [Join the fight](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61375164/399883701/1904265837?refcode=fl_email_act_20230406launch1A_ae_actives_xx_btn2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzlmZTk4ZC03MmQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pw8OgU-MKE64LR-5gy7M5DsyEM3N83A59S5xfvPHsNk=&emci=0d38cf77-3cd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d79fe98d-72d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5643323)
---
As a U.S. Army veteran, millennial, and woman raised in southeastern Pennsylvania, I am part of the first generation of Americans who are worse off than the generation before them.
Pennsylvanians’ reproductive rights have been stripped away from us. I did not fight to defend our rights overseas just to see mine taken away from me here at home.
With rising costs across the board, too many Pennsylvanians cannot afford to pay for basic needs like housing and childcare, find work that offers a livable wage, or pay for prescription drugs.
Growing up in a working-class, single-parent household for much of my childhood, I’ve experienced firsthand what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck and not know where the next meal is coming from. I saw the painful toll that mental health and substance abuse issues can have on our families and communities.
That’s why I joined the Army at 17 to gain the opportunity to get an affordable education and a pathway to the American Dream. Graduating as the only woman in my Apache helicopter class, I learned early on to roll up my sleeves and work hard to create my own opportunities.
We deserve leaders in office who actually have skin in the game. Leaders who understand the challenges Pennsylvanians are facing on a daily basis and have the backbone to fight for meaningful solutions — not a career politician bought and paid for by powerful interests. I know we can bring our shared values of compassion, equality, and fairness to Congress, but I cannot do it without you.
**[The _DCCC_ declared PA-01 a top target for battleground races in 2024, so I'm counting on your support to win. Will you support my people-powered campaign to defeat Fitzpatrick and flip PA-01 blue next year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61375165/399883702/1904265837?refcode=fl_email_act_20230406launch1A_ae_actives_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzlmZTk4ZC03MmQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pw8OgU-MKE64LR-5gy7M5DsyEM3N83A59S5xfvPHsNk=&emci=0d38cf77-3cd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d79fe98d-72d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5643323)**
[Join the fight](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61375166/399883703/1904265837?refcode=fl_email_act_20230406launch1A_ae_actives_xx_btn2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzlmZTk4ZC03MmQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pw8OgU-MKE64LR-5gy7M5DsyEM3N83A59S5xfvPHsNk=&emci=0d38cf77-3cd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d79fe98d-72d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5643323)
---
Thank you again for continuing this journey with me. I cannot wait to hit the ground running and build on the movement we created to build a brighter future in southeast PA.
Let’s come together to finish the job in 2024.
Sincerely,
Ashley Ehasz
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61375167/399883704/1904265837?refcode=fl_email_act_20230406launch1A_ae_actives_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzlmZTk4ZC03MmQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pw8OgU-MKE64LR-5gy7M5DsyEM3N83A59S5xfvPHsNk=&emci=0d38cf77-3cd3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d79fe98d-72d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5643323)

clean_body: I’m Ashley Ehasz and I’m running again for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 1st District - this time to finish the job. Why run again? Because there is too much at stake. | = You’re hearing this from me first, friends. I’m Ashley Ehasz and I’m running again for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 1st District — this time to finish the job. Why run again? Because there is too much at stake. I’m running to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families like mine. For too long, anti-choice Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick has sold out this district — now, his time is up. Last year, we came so close to defeating Fitzpatrick through powerful grassroots organizing in every corner of the district. | As a U.S. Army veteran, millennial, and woman raised in southeastern Pennsylvania, I am part of the first generation of Americans who are worse off than the generation before them. Pennsylvanians’ reproductive rights have been stripped away from us. I did not fight to defend our rights overseas just to see mine taken away from me here at home. With rising costs across the board, too many Pennsylvanians cannot afford to pay for basic needs like housing and childcare, find work that offers a livable wage, or pay for prescription drugs. Growing up in a working-class, single-parent household for much of my childhood, I’ve experienced firsthand what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck and not know where the next meal is coming from. I saw the painful toll that mental health and substance abuse issues can have on our families and communities. That’s why I joined the Army at 17 to gain the opportunity to get an affordable education and a pathway to the American Dream. Graduating as the only woman in my Apache helicopter class, I learned early on to roll up my sleeves and work hard to create my own opportunities. We deserve leaders in office who actually have skin in the game. Leaders who understand the challenges Pennsylvanians are facing on a daily basis and have the backbone to fight for meaningful solutions — not a career politician bought and paid for by powerful interests. I know we can bring our shared values of compassion, equality, and fairness to Congress, but I cannot do it without you. Thank you again for continuing this journey with me. I cannot wait to hit the ground running and build on the movement we created to build a brighter future in southeast PA. Let’s come together to finish the job in 2024. Sincerely, Ashley Ehasz | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | Growing up, my favorite book, 'The Giving Tree' by Shel Silverstein (1964), taught me fundamental lessons about the importance of reciprocity and man's sometimes-destructive relationship with nature. Today, just seeing the iconic green illustrated cover is nostalgic. In 1988, as we introduced our children to stories of selflessness, giving, rights of passage, and helping those in need, a library in Colorado banned the book because someone interpreted Silverstein's ambiguous theme sexually. Silverstein did not believe in cookie-cutter, happily-ever-after stories. We allowed our children's curiosity and imagination to help them interpret the world. It's why literature, even if embedded in themes of darkness or controversy, is fundamental to the American education process. Banning books is unAmerican. More than ever, today, legislatures are enacting draconian laws to take books off shelves and defund libraries. Recently, Missouri House Republicans voted to defund all of the state's public libraries. Federally, for four years from 2016 - '21, Republicans proposed a budget that permanently eliminated the Institute of Museum and Library Services (IMLS) and virtually all federal funding for libraries. Just like in 1988, when Silverstein's book was banned, negative interpretations of children's literature have led to citizen initiatives that ultimately resulted in the rejection of funding millages for local Michigan libraries, cutting librarian jobs and devaluing education. Imagination and curiosity of young minds need to be encouraged, nurtured, and fed, not prohibited. Public libraries and librarians protect our freedom of speech, the freedom of the press, and our fundamental First Amendment rights. We must demand our leaders do the same. More than 1,600 books were banned from American schools in 2022, impacting 4 million students' exposure to ideas that could help them grow and learn. Student readers are losing access to critical information, and through defunding, legislators are attacking librarians and teachers for doing their jobs. Reading freely is fundamental to the education of citizens in a healthy democracy. I didn't appreciate libraries enough growing up. We took it for granted, but books were fundamental to my and my children's education. Like 'The Giving Tree,' books exploring and illuminating differing viewpoints help build connections among people by deepening their understanding of the world. Those who censor books because of different literary interpretations create barriers and feed the divisiveness that threatens to damage this country. Help me advocate for and protect the First Amendment. body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from Nikki Haley for President, click here https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=59674b7657043b52df5965a34488cb69ea13ac4472561f58d41a352230a89569af2f4d28ad3caad4ebbb49b0cb9ed8a5070b9d36fed97925c28b366af624b98b Peter, It’s hard to believe our first quarter is already over! Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, in just the first six weeks, we held standing-room-only events across Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina, met with thousands of voters across the country, and started off our campaign strong! BUT this is still the beginning of our journey to the White House. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=59674b7657043b52df5965a34488cb69ea13ac4472561f58d41a352230a89569af2f4d28ad3caad4ebbb49b0cb9ed8a5070b9d36fed97925c28b366af624b98b As we start the second quarter of our campaign, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters. I’m a proud daughter of legal immigrants, a wife of a combat veteran, and a mother of two. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me. But, with the Democrats in power, our future is slipping. Right now, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many mothers searching frantically for baby formula; and too many children who are so far behind in the classroom, they might never get ahead. We have too many small businesses who can’t afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts. We have too much crime on our streets – too many drugs flooding our cities – and too few police and border patrol. And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people. They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 30 trillion dollars. This is not the America I want to leave to my children! I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength. We are in an uphill battle to save our country’s future, and I need your help. Your continued support is so important. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=59674b7657043b52df5965a34488cb69ea13ac4472561f58d41a352230a89569af2f4d28ad3caad4ebbb49b0cb9ed8a5070b9d36fed97925c28b366af624b98b Can I count on you? I want you to join me in this fight to save America’s future because our country is always worth fighting for. As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me. BUT this is still the beginning of our journey to the White House. As we start the second quarter of our campaign, I wanted to remind you why I am running for president and why your support matters. I’m a proud daughter of legal immigrants, a wife of a combat veteran, and a mother of two. I have watched the American Dream unfold before me. But, with the Democrats in power, our future is slipping. Right now, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many mothers searching frantically for baby formula; and too many children who are so far behind in the classroom, they might never get ahead. We have too many small businesses who can’t afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts. We have too much crime on our streets – too many drugs flooding our cities – and too few police and border patrol. And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people. They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 30 trillion dollars. This is not the America I want to leave to my children! I am running for president to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength. We are in an uphill battle to save our country’s future, and I need your help. Your continued support is so important. Can I count on you? I want you to join me in this fight to save America’s future because our country is always worth fighting for. name: Shift WA
subject: Democrats target specific individuals with new tax
body:
Democrats in Olympia didn't waste much time taking advantage of the State Supreme Court's bizarre decision legalizing a state income tax just as long as it's called an "excise tax." | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61676160:s2rUShDoN:m:1:2610672541:3B7A8122C10C22CB30BCB35D31F32871:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

Democrats in Olympia didn't waste much time taking advantage of the State Supreme Court's bizarre decision legalizing a state income tax just as long as it's called an "excise tax." A mere 10 days after the ruling, Democrat State Senators Christine Rolfes and Emily Randall created a 7.5% "excise tax" on the "excess compensation" of - very specifically - hospital administrators.

In a worrisome twist in their never-ending desire to raise taxes, the Democrats' new tax proposal targets a specific group of people. As Republican Leader JT Wilcox pointed out, Democrats' latest tax push isn't just about the money. **It 's about demonizing a group and using the Legislature to go after them. **Rep. Wilcox warned, "(A)nd if anybody thinks they won't be part of some unpopular groups sometime, they should think again. The idea of using legislation to attack individual groups, small groups of people, is just so corrosive."

There are some people who will never have to worry about Democrats targeting them through taxes - those who belong to groups that line the pockets of Democrat legislators. **Far from being demonized, the Democrats ' biggest campaign contributors - including state employee and public sector unions - are showered with rewards.**

As Shift WA has pointed out, Democrats' current $70 billion budget bills reward state employee and public sector unions with hefty pay raises - nearly a billion dollars' worth. Of course, the unions will then put big money back into Democrat campaign accounts. **It 's more of the same corrupt pattern - your taxpayer dollars working for Democrats.**

You cannot count on what remains of mainstream media outlets to hold Democrats accountable for their record-breaking spending spree. After all, Democrats also have them in their pockets. Their latest spending spree also doles out taxpayer dollars to media outlets - a concerning conflict of interest that isn't all that surprising to those paying attention.

**Our purpose here at Shift WA is to shine a light on what 's going on in Olympia. [But our work depends entirely on the continued support of people like you. ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61676161:s2rUShDoN:m:1:2610672541:3B7A8122C10C22CB30BCB35D31F32871:r)**

[**Will you consider helping us continue our efforts with a contribution of just $25 today?**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61676161:s2rUShDoN:m:1:2610672541:3B7A8122C10C22CB30BCB35D31F32871:r)

**[Your support means we can continue keeping an eye on Olympia as this current session is winding down and report back to you.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61676161:s2rUShDoN:m:1:2610672541:3B7A8122C10C22CB30BCB35D31F32871:r)**

Thank you,

The Shift WA team
| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61676162:s2rUShDoN:m:1:2610672541:3B7A8122C10C22CB30BCB35D31F32871:r)
---
|

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/os2rUShDoN).

Friend: Our country is facing a gun violence epidemic, and Democratic leaders like Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand are demanding change.
There have already been more than 130 mass shootings in 2023. From Nashville to Monterey Park, hundreds of communities and families are being ripped apart by gun violence — but it doesn't have to be this way.
**We know that commonsense gun reforms like universal background checks prevent shootings — and the vast majority of Americans support them.**
**But the gun lobby and their billionaire donors are BLOCKING reforms like universal background checks from becoming law.** With gun violence on the rise, we have to fight back to protect our communities.
**We'll only be able to overcome the gun lobby's massive influence in Washington with a huge people-powered movement. That's why Democratic leaders like Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand are calling on 5,000 grassroots supporters to respond to our live poll before midnight tonight — please, will you stand with them?**
**Do You Support Universal Background Checks?**

As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. clean_body: | | | Friend: Our country is facing a gun violence epidemic, and Democratic leaders like Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand are demanding change. There have already been more than 130 mass shootings in 2023. From Nashville to Monterey Park, hundreds of communities and families are being ripped apart by gun violence — but it doesn't have to be this way. We know that commonsense gun reforms like universal background checks prevent shootings — and the vast majority of Americans support them. But the gun lobby and their billionaire donors are BLOCKING reforms like universal background checks from becoming law. With gun violence on the rise, we have to fight back to protect our communities. We'll only be able to overcome the gun lobby's massive influence in Washington with a huge people-powered movement. That's why Democratic leaders like Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand are calling on 5,000 grassroots supporters to respond to our live poll before midnight tonight — please, will you stand with them? Do You Support Universal Background Checks? | | | | Survey links created for dpwillis67@gmail.com Deadline: 11:59 p.m. | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Please open
subject: Msg from: Navy SEAL Ryan Zinke
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
|

---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529401:6xuCnFGNg:m:1:3365131770:567D00A0A2F0B32E32FC17EF9E3A24DC:r)
---

Peter, this is Navy SEAL Ryan Zinke.

I need you to kindly join me in supporting my Republican friends in the Senate who are standing up for our Constitutional rights, namely the **[Second Amendment.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529401:6xuCnFGNg:m:1:3365131770:567D00A0A2F0B32E32FC17EF9E3A24DC:r "Second Amendment.")**

In codifying these rulings on a federal level, Republicans will seal Americans' right to own and carry a firearm inside and outside our homes, irrespective of military participation status.

_**Simply put, the right to bear arms is a guarantee for every law-abiding citizen and we _must_ do everything in our power to protect it.**_
**[If you agree, join me in standing with these patriots in the Senate and add your name in support of our 2nd Amendment Rights:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529401:6xuCnFGNg:m:1:3365131770:567D00A0A2F0B32E32FC17EF9E3A24DC:r "If you agree, join me in standing with these patriots in the Senate and add your name in support of our 2nd
Amendment Rights:")**

---
| | [I SUPPORT THE 2nd AMENDMENT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529401:6xuCnFGNg:m:1:3365131770:567D00A0A2F0B32E32FC17EF9E3A24DC:r)
---
| | [(ADD YOUR NAME)](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529401:6xuCnFGNg:m:1:3365131770:567D00A0A2F0B32E32FC17EF9E3A24DC:r)
---

This is what separates America from the rest.

In God we trust,
Ryan Zinke (R-MT)
---
| |
* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

**[SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529401:6xuCnFGNg:m:1:3365131770:567D00A0A2F0B32E32FC17EF9E3A24DC:r "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY")**

name: [[ FOR YOUR EYES ONLY ]]
subject: We’re not ready for this
body:
Below is a projection of China vs USA military buildup in 1999 vs. 2025. This nothing short of terrifying:| | | **🚨FOR YOUR EYES ONLY🚨**
---
| | Peter,
---
Col. Mike Waltz here - there’s something I need you to see.

As a member of my top grassroots team, I think it’s essential that you know the truth about the threats facing our nation, no matter how hard the Left tries to hide it.

Below is a projection of China vs USA military buildup in 1999 vs. 2025. **This nothing short of terrifying:**

---
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=a9361b5ea56441b2b18546932fff45f1&_e=uUce-LpeecCCeRrVC2FmXBIrGSngxVErEzFCiJWK-oVGMtFgiK-zTSzjNXhyHppqZk5wehqAHfsxfBUbApdAqwgbfPhiG4j2c3um0ReumcwV7gaP5sP5afo6kAR0vNRRofM6A7L8Yb7AqOzXj9fMzM5pTxhvJQj-xRylmapPD8IFJcN_Tncyt9CEekArsZ2UEEnI5b8OtFlFKMcpVWCCbr4Od1VnmhCyUDNfmj7wIsdk_JdMtAR3f13egBsTYA2KyDzvwrCNJBz4mncqq4Sovu5EO7z4ypg-G6K0YDqSau9_iD07DSoxTZjjmB3MRjXP5HfEoN4r6QGfWvzxt1851uYWFO-OyYn0erKYFU6VliL5Yiqa3VN8Z2MXTsJhrPrM)
---
And still, Biden refuses to MOVE A MUSCLE in defense of the United States. Instead, he rolls over and allows China’s military threat to continue to loom over our country.

Let me make myself clear: the Biden Administration is making America weaker while our enemies grow stronger.

---

name: Roger Marshall
subject: What Kansans believe

body: 96 https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/ks-girls-sports- email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april6hf  Friend, it’s simple. In Kansas, we believe in science. We believe women are born women. We will never waiver in the fight to protect biological women in sports, and we will never accept men competing in women’s sports. That’s why the Kansas Legislature overrode woke left Governor Laura Kelly’s veto of the bill banning men from competing in women’s sports. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/ks-girls-sports-email?ut m_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april6hf And that’s why I’m asking for you to chip in right now. I’ve led the fight to protect women’s sports in the Senate, and your donation will help me continue to fight on the frontlines on this issue. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/ks-girls-sports-email?ut m_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april6hf PROTECT WOMEN'S SPORTS: CHIP IN NOW » Kansas just set an example for the rest of the nation, and Kansas sent a message to the woke left that their insane policies have no place in our state. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/ks-girls-sports-email?ut m_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april6hf Help me send that message in the Senate. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/ks-girls-sports-email?ut m_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april6hf Senator Roger Marshall P.S. — And for the record, we drink Coors. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/ks-girls-sports-email?ut m_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april6hf PROTECT WOMEN'S SPORTS: CHIP IN NOW »   https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-email -footer?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april6hf Keep reading for a personal message from Doc: Kansans sent me to the U.S. Senate to defend life and to stand for our jobs, our families, and our faith. And that's exactly what I'm doing. But I can't keep up the fight without your help. It’s going to take all of us, standing together, to hold Joe Biden and the woke left accountable. I'm not about to back down, but I need you standing with me. If you're able, I hope you'll chip in below. -Senator Roger Marshall https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-email-footer?utm_so urce=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april6hf CHIP IN NOW This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by: Kansans for Marshall PO Box 1588 Great Bend, KS 67530 Unsubscribe PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL To unsubscribe visit: http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=b5c703011a4771b4

Peter -
We sent a lot of emails about our FEC fundraising deadline, so I thought it important to report back on the numbers we’re going to file.
You should be very proud of this:
**Donations: 106,000+**
These are not donations from hedge fund managers and far-right Republicans. 98% of our donations were $100 or less and 99.9% of our donors can give again.
We are funding our campaign much differently than Senator Sinema. Thank you.
**Raised: $3.7 million**
That’s a lot of money. But the truth is, Senator Sinema reported having almost $10 million in cash. She had a big head start and we’ll catch up, but that means we can’t slow down.
**Other Facts**
* The most common profession of a donor to our campaign was a teacher. Doctors and nurses were up there as well.
* Some of the most common employers of donors to our campaign were people who work at the University of Arizona and Arizona State, along with the US Postal Service and Amazon workers.
* People who work at banks and donated to our campaign are not the CEOs. We looked: document prep specialists, tellers, and even a financial crimes investigator.
I am humbled by this support. Truly. Thank you.
Ruben
* * *

name: Mike Lee
subject: Here’s how we can wipe out socialism in our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zldjre3v6so155caq6l0p3so8mebv84hdi8724l8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)
Friend,

Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide, and our children are being influenced to adopt radical beliefs that could destroy our culture and our Republic.

Fortunately, I believe there is a solution that could help turn the tide, educate our country's youth against the dangers of socialism, and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbk1g7klsa4rl8c82s6dqucqkd3b451kbq38obsg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)
Connor helped me get elected back in 2010. Since then, he founded the Libertas Institute, a free market think tank headquartered in our home state, Utah. Connor was inspired to write the Tuttle Twins series when he was unable to find a way to teach his own kids about the ideas of freedom.

So far, Connor has distributed over 4 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country. **Connor is leading the fight against socialist indoctrination in our schools, creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country. **

[**Here is how Connor and the Libertas Institute plan to distribute 1,000,000 new copies of the Tuttle Twins:**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3g4srmhvfb501hru1amhlkhj0hmkoi35em26s78_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)
1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history will receive copies for education at home.
2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.
3. In order to do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. [**It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0sf1051dq2pqngo8cab8ikjsnivt7ebndtdq2l0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)

**The reality is neither Rand Paul, Ted Cruz, nor myself can defeat socialism alone ... we need a new generation of young conservatives willing to stand up for the Constitution and our freedoms.**

You and I can help save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families with the Tuttle Twins books!

**I spoke with Connor Boyack, the President of the Libertas Institute and author of the books, and gave him my word I would help him raise $20,000 to fund the distribution of the Tuttle Twins books to homeschool children, parents, and kids in public schools.** [**Please consider donating the most generous amount you can to help put a Tuttle Twins book in the hands of a young child!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zad27qvcc2chta48g2n7qhgdii04ema3hm03tdb8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)

***PLEASE NOTE: All online donations are being matched by one of the Libertas Institute 's biggest supporters, John P. This means your donation is DOUBLED! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift.***

[**Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zblsthclihv58uuope35q12rb2q1fs22pvmpqhbo_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)
[**Donate 2 Tuttle Twins book for $20 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6ptcukmg7i2prt35e73muhiq64egjl6vk618ig8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)
[**Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvevpfodu3mr98u15e3i89brkm1of9v60p8u6fto_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)
[**Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhsh6s90k0a63efugqscoasvcpdca3nr585h8du8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)
[**Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zivjh63hfqabtklr5sel4q1qhv45imj028d3ple8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)
[**Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu9oj7p90bi0mtj8smv6lfrlvd1h13ior70nqba8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)
[**Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zskibjvpor179f4i3i1ievpab8milv3unrclrbq8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount Here >>>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0bdi3dti5cidhr2pc3c5td36cfhvbt6mas4mhgg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)

The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them.

Parents aren't forcing their kids to read them. They are written for children to enjoy and learn at the same time.

**This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. You and I can create a new generation of young conservatives to preserve our Republic. **

As I said, Connor is a great friend of mine, and I believe in what he is doing. The Libertas Institute and the Tuttle Twins are transforming this country and one of our most promising ways to fight back against socialism in schools.

[**Please help me raise $20,000 in the next 48 hours by clicking here to make a donation and distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins to thousands of kids across the country!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq52qi5i2otbl8hdsrog2phkoap9fiec6tuknc58_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)

I suspect you get a dozen emails asking you to donate every week.

This is much different.

This isn't for some campaign or candidate that needs money.

This is a cause I am passionate about and believe can reverse the influence of socialism in our society. We just need to distribute these books and begin teaching our nation's youth about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history.

It seems like you love our country, the ideas of liberty, and the Constitution as much as I do.

Which is why I am emailing you.

Please consider making the most generous donation you can and help me restore our Republic.

Please consider this a personal and urgent request from me.

[**Here is the link to donate again.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhgnsu8usl5ocbgrnk6o3tvo6nvaa89npgulku0o_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g64oj1cdh2bs)

Senator Mike Lee

Paid for by Libertas Institute

clean_body: Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide Friend, Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide, and our children are being influenced to adopt radical beliefs that could destroy our culture and our Republic. Fortunately, I believe there is a solution that could help turn the tide, educate our country's youth against the dangers of socialism, and teach young people about the ideas of liberty. My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries. Connor helped me get elected back in 2010. Since then, he founded the Libertas Institute, a free market think tank headquartered in our home state, Utah. Connor was inspired to write the Tuttle Twins series when he was unable to find a way to teach his own kids about the ideas of freedom. So far, Connor has distributed over 4 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country. Connor is leading the fight against socialist indoctrination in our schools, creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country. 1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history will receive copies for education at home. 2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism. 3. In order to do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. The reality is neither Rand Paul, Ted Cruz, nor myself can defeat socialism alone ... we need a new generation of young conservatives willing to stand up for the Constitution and our freedoms. You and I can help save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families with the Tuttle Twins books! I spoke with Connor Boyack, the President of the Libertas Institute and author of the books, and gave him my word I would help him raise $20,000 to fund the distribution of the Tuttle Twins books to homeschool children, parents, and kids in public schools. *PLEASE NOTE: All online donations are being matched by one of the Libertas Institute 's biggest supporters, John P. This means your donation is DOUBLED! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift. The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them. Parents aren't forcing their kids to read them. They are written for children to enjoy and learn at the same time. This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. You and I can create a new generation of young conservatives to preserve our Republic. ** As I said, Connor is a great friend of mine, and I believe in what he is doing. The Libertas Institute and the Tuttle Twins are transforming this country and one of our most promising ways to fight back against socialism in schools. I suspect you get a dozen emails asking you to donate every week. This is much different. This isn't for some campaign or candidate that needs money. This is a cause I am passionate about and believe can reverse the influence of socialism in our society. We just need to distribute these books and begin teaching our nation's youth about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history. It seems like you love our country, the ideas of liberty, and the Constitution as much as I do. Which is why I am emailing you. Please consider making the most generous donation you can and help me restore our Republic. Please consider this a personal and urgent request from me. Senator Mike Lee Paid for by Libertas Institute ICYMI News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Friend,
I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved – to hear that I could face **136 YEARS IN PRISON** for having committed **NO CRIME**.
But I did not sit there feeling sorry for myself.
I felt sorry for our country – because this is _NOT_ America.
Let me assure you – I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_**These attacks confirm how much hangs in the balance in the 2024 election.**_

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Trump Indictment (Urgent Update)
body:
I have major news to share with you...

| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu0dufjp5qmm44u8khg4dasq74d65lgolitj44ho_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g62o36c1h2bs)
---
Fellow patriot, I have major news to share with you... America First Legal has opened an investigation into the New York County District Attorney Alvin Bragg's Office to obtain the internal and external communications from its key leaders regarding former President Donald J. Trump. _For years now, we all have watched as the left and its allies in government and the media have weaponized the criminal justice system against conservatives ... _ **Think about this:** the contrast between the aggressive response to the Russia-Collusion-Hoax and the abusively harsh treatment of the J6 rioters, on the one hand, and the blind eye turned toward the Chinese Communist Party's payments to the Biden family and the celebration of the BLM rioters, on the other, **is undeniable and _truly dangerous_.** **Make no mistake:** America First Legal will obtain and expose records about Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg's unprecedented efforts to abuse his office to target political opponents. _**WE WILL _EXPOSE THE TRUTH_ behind this disgraceful attack on former President Donald J. Trump and on the rule of law in America. **_ **Thank you for your support >> **[**secure.winred.com/AFL **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze3266viv7akpf3c52grat82urpt0abpomes3918_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g62o36c1h2bs) [**_DONATE NOW TO HELP US TO EXPOSE THE LEFT_ >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5hh20n3s3nh61okaca7rdsgvehang3etbi7sfeo_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g62o36c1h2bs) America First Legal will continue fighting to stop the left's weaponization of the criminal justice system and to hold accountable all officials at every level of government who abuse prosecutorial power to persecute their political opponents. _With sincere thanks for your crucial support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal

subject: Trump's indicted, but won't go gently into that good night. He's a parasite, sucking strength from our democracy, while slurping up every last media appearance. If he won’t rest, neither can we.
body:
Trump keeps inciting mayhem
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. | | | | | Peter, **_Trump's indicted, but won't go gently into that good night. He's a parasite, sucking strength from our democracy, while slurping up every last media appearance. _** **_This week, he was in New York City for his arraignment on the 30+ indictments the DA, Alvin Bragg, filed against him._**_ In response, he held a rally there, and then another in Florida. _**_All while attacking our institutions, to continue his project of weakening our democracy to install himself a dictator._** **[_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Indivisible's Action Fund, enabling citizens to fight authoritarianism at the ballot box?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81e6ba25-8753-4802-91a9-900fa908f800/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: please, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
I want to explain why retaking the majority is so important – and why grassroots supporters like you make all the difference.

---
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61409704/399969074/1662333042?refcode=20230406_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGE1MDBkYS1hNGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t6wFDWDDhFEvYc-mnAEU1TA1L6Ho4AXhjTs1TpZv8P0=)
---
[_**Peter, I want to explain why retaking the majority is so important – and why grassroots supporters like you make all the difference. It would mean so much to me if you’d read my entire message, but if you're short on time, could you chip in $15 before you log off? >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61409707/399969077/1662333042?refcode=20230406_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGE1MDBkYS1hNGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t6wFDWDDhFEvYc-mnAEU1TA1L6Ho4AXhjTs1TpZv8P0=)
Peter, I grew up in a working-class neighborhood in Brooklyn.
I was raised in a union household.
And I’ve never lost hope in the American Dream.
[_**That’s why, when extreme MAGA Republicans wanted big tax cuts for billionaires instead of working families, I knew Democrats had to expose their agenda to win back the House. We’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to help us spread our message and compete with the GOP’s deep pockets. So, please, will you chip in $15 before midnight to help me take back the House for everyday Americans? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61409710/399969080/1662333042?refcode=20230406_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGE1MDBkYS1hNGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t6wFDWDDhFEvYc-mnAEU1TA1L6Ho4AXhjTs1TpZv8P0=)

body:
---
Sorry to email you again, friend – but your input is so important that I had to reach out one more time before we finalize our priorities for April.
**Will you take just one minute to share your input in our digital focus group? I had my team create this personalized link just for you:[https://surveys.signforgood.com/brown-2023-april-focus-group?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61389190/399917482/-527431202?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk95-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmJmY2EwMi04NGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=deKxOWjQvI5L0mXPa53uBkUtbVNAA3f6BmObRFoaxA0=&emci=dc6f8ce5-20d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2bbfca02-84d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)**
With gratitude,

Sherrod
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **S. Brown**
Date: Tue, Apr 4, 2023
Subject: I want to hear from you, friend
| | |
---
Friend, if there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s this:
**I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do.** For me, this means going to bat for working families in Ohio and across the country. It means making sure _your_ __ voice is heard in the halls of Congress and on the Senate floor.
I’m proud of the progress we’ve made over the last couple of years, including passing a historic infrastructure bill and standing up for workers’ rights. **But we’ve still got a long way to go, so as we chart out our next steps, I’m asking top supporters like you to weigh in.**
I’ve always said the best ideas don’t come from Washington – they come from the people we serve. In an ideal world, I’d get to sit down and chat with each and every member of this grassroots team to find out which issues are keeping you up at night, what makes you hopeful about our future, and what you want to see Democrats accomplish next. But since that just isn't possible, inviting you to join my new digital focus group is the next best thing.
[**Please, friend, will you take just a moment to share your thoughts with me? Your input is so important to helping us protect this seat, defend our Democratic Senate majority, and continue making critical progress for working families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61389192/399917485/-527431202?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk95-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmJmY2EwMi04NGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=deKxOWjQvI5L0mXPa53uBkUtbVNAA3f6BmObRFoaxA0=&emci=dc6f8ce5-20d3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2bbfca02-84d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)

Sherrod

name: ELECTION INTEGRITY EMERGENCY (From House Republicans)
subject: It’s official: illegal immigrants can now VOTE in U.S. elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Foreign agents too...
|
---
| | | **It 's official: non-citizens and foreign agents can now VOTE in U.S. elections.**

Thanks to a bunch of Radical Democrats on the DC City Council, a new law allows practically ANYONE who lives in our nation's capital to vote in U.S. elections.

_That means illegal immigrants and Chinese diplomats may now choose _our_ elected leaders._

This is not hyperbole. This is not fake news. This is an election integrity emergency!

_**[This new law JUST went into effect so we need your gut reaction as soon as possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528777:6rhz9FGNk:m:1:3331421248:83C721C6701051C4B193469629DEEB92:r "This new law JUST went into effect so we need your gut reaction as soon as possible.")**_ So we launched an official poll to collect honest and unfiltered feedback from the American People. Whether you live in DC or not, this development impacts ALL AMERICANS - so we need to hear from you right here and right now:
**PLEASE RESPOND IMMEDIATELY: Should illegal immigrants and foreign agents be allowed to vote in U.S. elections?**** **

---
| | | [SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528777:6rhz9FGNk:m:1:3331421248:83C721C6701051C4B193469629DEEB92:r "button")
---

We can't believe this is happening in America.

These Radical Democrats are exploiting every ounce of power to plunge our country into chaos and greenlight their anti-American agenda. _Just imagine the ambassador of Communist China casting a ballot to choose _our_ elected representatives! _

If this was happening in your city, what would you do?

This is your chance to help shape the future of election integrity in America. _**[Submit your response to our official poll- your answer will be immediately transmitted to Republican HQ and PERSONALLY REVIEWED by House Majority Leader Steve Scalise and his team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528777:6rhz9FGNk:m:1:3331421248:83C721C6701051C4B193469629DEEB92:r "Submit your
response to our official poll – your answer will be immediately transmitted to Republican HQ and PERSONALLY REVIEWED by House Majority Leader
Steve Scalise and his team. ")**_

Thanks for all you've done for your country.

Onward,

House Republicans

name: Mike Lee
subject: Here’s how we can wipe out socialism in our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04367%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fK%2bzcidDXby1k%2f01CLeT4Q&sysid=1)
Friend,

Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide, and our children are being influenced to adopt radical beliefs that could destroy our culture and our Republic.

Fortunately, I believe there is a solution that could help turn the tide, educate our country’s youth against the dangers of socialism, and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children’s books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries.

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04367%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fK%2bzcidDXby1k%2f01CLeT4Q&sysid=1)
Connor helped me get elected back in 2010. Since then, he founded the Libertas Institute, a free market think tank headquartered in our home state, Utah. Connor was inspired to write the Tuttle Twins series when he was unable to find a way to teach his own kids about the ideas of freedom.

So far, Connor has distributed over 4 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country. **Connor is leading the fight against socialist indoctrination in our schools, creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country. **

[**Here is how Connor and the Libertas Institute plan to distribute 1,000,000 new copies of the Tuttle Twins:**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04368%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S46j8yfH9Rmbk0awaI4rvg&sysid=1)
1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history will receive copies for education at home.
2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.
3. In order to do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. [**It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04369%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XDF%2f4ImRlweeq3zP0rWZPA&sysid=1)

**The reality is neither Rand Paul, Ted Cruz, nor myself can defeat socialism alone ... we need a new generation of young conservatives willing to stand up for the Constitution and our freedoms.**

You and I can help save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families with the Tuttle Twins books!

**I spoke with Connor Boyack, the President of the Libertas Institute and author of the books, and gave him my word I would help him raise $20,000 to fund the distribution of the Tuttle Twins books to homeschool children, parents, and kids in public schools.** [**Please consider donating the most generous amount you can to help put a Tuttle Twins book in the hands of a young child!**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04360%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R4TmCpKRRRjqdj8KPR%2bTfA&sysid=1)

***PLEASE NOTE: All online donations are being matched by one of the Libertas Institute’s biggest supporters, John P. This means your donation is DOUBLED! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift.***

[**Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04361%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D8gQY1NayISQ89%2fd7g2VYA&sysid=1)
[**Donate 2 Tuttle Twins book for $20 >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04362%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1VZ4yaW9VKhtLT7HN6unDQ&sysid=1)
[**Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04363%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vPRjYknQAUPG799OKrQVvg&sysid=1)
[**Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04364%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fglsqmbb1xeIpPGNjhv99w&sysid=1)
[**Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04375%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9GKGe0CrrQYrY7B6BFaMyQ&sysid=1)
[**Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04376%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4p4jN4UFDW9djPsVQ50Afw&sysid=1)
[**Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04377%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iKkBXmsozNfdBE4CNvUYqQ&sysid=1)
[**Donate Any Amount Here >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04378%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=85%2bt2ZxXmgYa0MSyVrYkxw&sysid=1)

The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them.

Parents aren’t forcing their kids to read them. They are written for children to enjoy and learn at the same time.

**This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. You and I can create a new generation of young conservatives to preserve our Republic. **

As I said, Connor is a great friend of mine, and I believe in what he is doing. The Libertas Institute and the Tuttle Twins are transforming this country and one of our most promising ways to fight back against socialism in schools.

[**Please help me raise $20,000 in the next 48 hours by clicking here to make a donation and distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins to thousands of kids across the country!**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04379%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s43TTvNVq73MvT9utqumBA&sysid=1)

I suspect you get a dozen emails asking you to donate every week.

This is much different.

This isn’t for some campaign or candidate that needs money.

This is a cause I am passionate about and believe can reverse the influence of socialism in our society. We just need to distribute these books and begin teaching our nation’s youth about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history.

It seems like you love our country, the ideas of liberty, and the Constitution as much as I do.

Which is why I am emailing you.

Please consider making the most generous donation you can and help me restore our Republic.

Please consider this a personal and urgent request from me.

[**Here is the link to donate again.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04370%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WzCVGsjVckLYb%2fadhHFPSA&sysid=1)

Senator Mike Lee

Paid for by Libertas Institute

Your America News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7457%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=wgnGOJgLPzThvOkeR7IDnQ&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04371%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JePdHHJ%2bc2KiVekAqavWPg&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04372%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zHlEJ3U2J7bjMBZ1%2bqKpMA&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7457%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=wgnGOJgLPzThvOkeR7IDnQ&sysid=1)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: The Party of Pedophiles
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
These leftists don't seem to understand that I'm not going to be intimidated be the Party of Pedophiles and their allies.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529042:6YEytFG5N:m:1:3391001263:F41CD6630B4D7D6E92158BDC6D9A754F:r "Headline") Peter,: I'm taking the fight to the left and I'm not stopping until we Save America. **[Are you with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529042:6YEytFG5N:m:1:3391001263:F41CD6630B4D7D6E92158BDC6D9A754F:r "Are you with me?")** I'm going to continue to expose their attempts to sexualize our children, trample on the rights of parents, their attempts to control our lives with mandates and their weaponization of government against political opponents while the Bidens go scot-free with their criminal enterprise. Most importantly, I won't allow them to cancel conservatives like they're doing with the persecution of Donald Trump. **[Will you help me fight back against the left's dangerous attacks on our nation, our children and our rights? Donate TODAY and let's indict the left!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529042:6YEytFG5N:m:1:3391001263:F41CD6630B4D7D6E92158BDC6D9A754F:r "Will you help me fight back against the left’s dangerous
attacks on our nation, our children and our rights? Donate $25, $50 or $100 TODAY and let’s indict the left!")** In the last few days, I spoke out about these issues on 60 Minutes and even Lesley Stahl was appalled by how leftists attack with name calling and use words most of us wouldn't use in polite company. And it didn't stop when I took our cause to New York City in solidarity with other Americans who were disgusted by how the George Soros-backed DA indicted President Trump based on a batch of lies. When I got there, Mayor Eric Adams tried to intimidate me for protesting against the weaponization of our justice system and even had his thugs threaten me with imprisonment. **These leftists don 't seem to understand that I'm not going to be intimidated by the Party of Pedophiles and their allies.** I've been thrown off committees, threatened with violence, mocked by the media and had to fight tooth and nail to overcome legal challenges to remain on the ballot. What else can they do to me? Our nation is only inches away from complete destruction because of their actions, and I'm speaking up because I'm worried for our future and I'm going to make sure that your voice and mine gets heard every day until we reverse the damage caused by the left. **[Will you help me fight back and show these leftists that we won't tolerate the Weaponization of our Government?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529042:6YEytFG5N:m:1:3391001263:F41CD6630B4D7D6E92158BDC6D9A754F:r "Will you help me fight back and show these
leftists that we won’t tolerate the Weaponization of our Government?")** Every time the left tries to attack conservatives, they demonstrate a pattern. They can't tell the truth. The Facts are not on their side. They talk out of both sides of their mouths, and they resort to name-calling. Quite simply, they demonstrate that they're nothing less than bottom feeders who will do anything to perpetuate their agenda at all costs. **We 've seen it with Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden and now Alvin Bragg.** They turn the other cheek to crime and the indoctrination of our children, and then call us names for exposing them. **[If you refuse to be intimidated by the left, then help me fight back! Donate ANY AMOUNT you can afford today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529041:6YEytFG5N:m:1:3391001263:F41CD6630B4D7D6E92158BDC6D9A754F:r "If you refuse to be intimidated by the left, then help me fight
back! Donate at least $50 or ANY AMOUNT you can afford today!")** Our nation's enemies are spying on us every day due to Brandon's incompetence and the left's leaders want to focus on punishing their political opponents, ignoring the fentanyl crisis and passing more spending bills during bad economic times. They think they are winning and that we won't fight back. **Quite frankly, they think we 're all suckers.** That's why I need your help to show Biden's hordes of criminal first, America last, pedophile supporters that we're taking our country back. **[Stand with me in this fight against the left's tyranny and let's Save America together!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529042:6YEytFG5N:m:1:3391001263:F41CD6630B4D7D6E92158BDC6D9A754F:r "Stand with me in this fight against the left’s tyranny
and let’s Save America together!")** For our Future, Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---

subject: We must defend them

body:
What has me concerned about recent events in the news is this ongoing trend of our political leaders attacking some of the most vital institutions in America.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=1af24b28a05943f1922fae857e2fb6d3&_e=jVa2D2QbT5rR3dZA9aqcdWq70yKNbouIO5VgPDCy6LlXnXyrwkwIlHgCPzNlR1t45L4Hc4Om85KFxOeAY9xFW_LX_Uyfk6G-apei21LZSAm74CfUHoezR3NfGbfQXBzrIsSgIhMmQEpMPluFmDh-3ytgXVRIUeKCLR7w-F4VmdietKcnPKIL-HsUgCcT5gXvJSRtRkrXuoSK1Dcg4ut8CQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter, What has me concerned about recent events in the news is this ongoing trend of our political leaders attacking some of the most vital institutions in America. Undermining the integrity of our judicial system, our elections, our national security institutions and the Justice Department with baseless accusations and political attacks undermines the very foundations of America. I'm not going to say that these entities are perfect - nobody is. But we should trust in the wisdom of our nation's founders, and generations of honorable public servants since then that have put in place checks and balances to ensure accountability. The system works, but it is certainly being tested. I don't recognize today's Republican Party anymore that seems more focused on fueling grievances and dividing people rather than offering a conservative policy agenda to grow support and solve problems for Americans. That's what I will continue to be focused on and you can count on me to continue rallying Americans to stand up for these institutions that are so vital to America's continued prosperity.
---
**I'm out there every week giving speeches, doing media interviews, communicating on social media and using every other tool at my disposal to give hope and encouragement to as many Americans as I can.** [Peter - I'm counting on your continued support to ensure that we can keep this important work moving forward](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=1af24b28a05943f1922fae857e2fb6d3&_e=jVa2D2QbT5rR3dZA9aqcdSobnNTB7tmKvrLc7p-P4Kj4YzrUMoZaRfvc7Pft54h3bvLdHquV67InT1AH_SaVtecsXJKRZLp88bQG7CHhtTeF-xWr_QJZa87e63SnxQYZHZvx83rCwLLPpQyNwDtaaybuyl3ufz8IUPEYrlJb6yTVUHRUGPIH1omFZLFek6gXwELjhDsOVlEgXr3gO8mSPw%3D%3D). Will you please consider chipping in right now to help with this important cause and ensure that we can keep up the fight for a better America?
---

name: Mike Lee
subject: Here’s how we can wipe out socialism in our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcd5opssa0kk4ceanmq9cn08ntg8slf3vu9bv7t0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)
Friend,

Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide, and our children are being influenced to adopt radical beliefs that could destroy our culture and our Republic.

Fortunately, I believe there is a solution that could help turn the tide, educate our country's youth against the dangers of socialism, and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu1vgr62rbb7dkh7lfvmnfj3j62pij7f6ikd29gg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)
Connor helped me get elected back in 2010. Since then, he founded the Libertas Institute, a free market think tank headquartered in our home state, Utah. Connor was inspired to write the Tuttle Twins series when he was unable to find a way to teach his own kids about the ideas of freedom.

So far, Connor has distributed over 4 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country. **Connor is leading the fight against socialist indoctrination in our schools, creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country. **

[**Here is how Connor and the Libertas Institute plan to distribute 1,000,000 new copies of the Tuttle Twins:**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqjgcd5n1thctfbdqb8ns8dl00n18at26r82qqk8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)
1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history will receive copies for education at home.
2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.
3. In order to do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. [**It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1hi9ai8t970hcs7iggf6oh7ngstcnq1pr5cj7m0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)

**The reality is neither Rand Paul, Ted Cruz, nor myself can defeat socialism alone ... we need a new generation of young conservatives willing to stand up for the Constitution and our freedoms.**

You and I can help save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families with the Tuttle Twins books!

**I spoke with Connor Boyack, the President of the Libertas Institute and author of the books, and gave him my word I would help him raise $20,000 to fund the distribution of the Tuttle Twins books to homeschool children, parents, and kids in public schools.** [**Please consider donating the most generous amount you can to help put a Tuttle Twins book in the hands of a young child!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze07uju37fr1pgpofu877vtnbf4gfm36773mqd60_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)

***PLEASE NOTE: All online donations are being matched by one of the Libertas Institute 's biggest supporters, John P. This means your donation is DOUBLED! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift.***

[**Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlnu0qof3sh1dcfi802l59hvoan79h0s767r1lr8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)
[**Donate 2 Tuttle Twins book for $20 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zerj6ga5r8pt9858dd47ik14b4u6h2mcfa4oh198_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)
[**Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zp654qgpvrkm4giph67vprfcprh4f11bfdvbbalo_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)
[**Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsfs8om8v74hbcrof0m3qhq60qor85apl2545krg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)
[**Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3j880b5ed3sjrgq01lfdjpi0g646sa7ea7aili8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)
[**Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd176ebibjcpfk1isl5ii7cuvuu7it5nr7a8kqhg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)
[**Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfb8l68b6oeu76leoaqrkt2jmqmpbtcc0d72osk8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount Here >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl0l59ch0bufq1j8n6jn17sp0pdpoug2054li980_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)

The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them.

Parents aren't forcing their kids to read them. They are written for children to enjoy and learn at the same time.

**This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. You and I can create a new generation of young conservatives to preserve our Republic. **

As I said, Connor is a great friend of mine, and I believe in what he is doing. The Libertas Institute and the Tuttle Twins are transforming this country and one of our most promising ways to fight back against socialism in schools.

[**Please help me raise $20,000 in the next 48 hours by clicking here to make a donation and distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins to thousands of kids across the country!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu3mq5k0gid1dou4qmoqqahakfckovmuq7f7dkl0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)

I suspect you get a dozen emails asking you to donate every week.

This is much different.

This isn't for some campaign or candidate that needs money.

This is a cause I am passionate about and believe can reverse the influence of socialism in our society. We just need to distribute these books and begin teaching our nation's youth about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history.

It seems like you love our country, the ideas of liberty, and the Constitution as much as I do.

Which is why I am emailing you.

Please consider making the most generous donation you can and help me restore our Republic.

Please consider this a personal and urgent request from me.

[**Here is the link to donate again.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv8ekf4f1hcroep0u02hbugaheq1odbol7tdkig0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h2bs)

Senator Mike Lee

Paid for by Libertas Institute

Deroy Murdock

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuq9kol398t0jtdcaoorm1d66tfl3gj48ka6cor0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3g6ao72c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Vice President Kamala Harris
subject: Can I count on you to make a $7 contribution today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
To keep building a better America, we must elect more Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. I’m asking: | |
---
Joe often says “Don’t tell me what you value -- show me your budget, and I'll tell you what you value.” Well, the extreme MAGA Republican House Freedom Caucus have made their values clear as day: imposing devastating cuts to public safety and increasing costs for working and middle-class families, all to protect and extend tax breaks skewed to the wealthy and big corporations. It’s a five-alarm fire, Derek. Our budget, on the other hand, would cut costs for families, grow our nation’s small businesses, and protect Medicare and Social Security. _Because we believe every person in our nation deserves the opportunity to succeed and thrive._ **The contrast couldn’t be clearer. clean_body: To keep building a better America, we must elect more Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. I’m asking: | | Joe often says “Don’t tell me what you value -- show me your budget, and I'll tell you what you value.” Well, the extreme MAGA Republican House Freedom Caucus have made their values clear as day: imposing devastating cuts to public safety and increasing costs for working and middle-class families, all to protect and extend tax breaks skewed to the wealthy and big corporations. It’s a five-alarm fire, Derek. Our budget, on the other hand, would cut costs for families, grow our nation’s small businesses, and protect Medicare and Social Security. Because we believe every person in our nation deserves the opportunity to succeed and thrive. The contrast couldn’t be clearer. But to enact our budget and keep building a better America, we must elect more Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. So, I’m asking: The DNC is the only party committee tasked with electing Democrats from the school board to the Senate. And if we’ve learned anything over the past few years, it is that your support and enthusiasm is critical to our success. Together, we’ve lowered the cost of insulin for seniors, created 12 million new jobs across the country, and made a once-in-a-generation investment in our nation’s infrastructure. But as the extreme MAGA Republican budget proposal makes clear: Our work is far from over. I’m so glad to know I can always count on you when it matters most. Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. CC BY-NC-SA 2.0 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . The White House publicly released a 12-page summary of the results of government reviews, taking little responsibility for its own actions and asserting that Biden was “severely constrained” by Trump’s decisions. The administration said detailed reviews conducted by the State Department and the Pentagon, which were transmitted privately to Congress on Thursday, were highly classified and would not be released publicly.
