subject: the latest Big Government power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
I’ve been censored. I’ve been banned, and yet my opinion remains the same. | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=c382636b67f04c45be2942f0282cdc13&_t=G8ZwZsqFKZYY1XZZX4Yx1q78jvfQwbW4lFy1wsO41FJTsryOYNzuYzMjzXcP1iEbrMbaxXWGseY12U-f5IiIHeIU6SMk8sya87_VtIG0U0o%3D)_.
---
| | **ALERT • ALERT • ALERT • ALERT • ALERT **
---
| | **Democrats and Republicans gave the Biden administration the go-ahead to ban anything they see fit!** _**_[STOP BIG GOVERNMENT OVERREACH >>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c382636b67f04c45be2942f0282cdc13&_e=bZiwtl5Abvo7oRVOMavisNAwVkCaRy5Usd6IFNmB4XH8lSPiJUtokmxJdRfFWVH3xeKmPRhRWGdEckSGpPRXMt9ITDbFcDe7aMiLbyAkI66c_lEYywi_08hRuWbBY6sGq-Ma7cuLwTsD7VCwRI2aGZlOnp5Fh1y5YkNhAxorlwjc8qC7VbMzEFpfS7GjShn8dZHi_Px5lVyzv9Wpd0CSvRGuGr_3M68Tj9tIsoP9c8e3XL54cJOfLu99iB9jsq2uaZ6apYDI50llEqzPQWYPTVY-8rRkGdb3_U44nI9WAv1TXh7zrKKrmcX3k1-w6FVtNN1B7KgTuHaEeQzc7dK8xjnhmSPfmwz1kgKt3q_Co-A%3D)_**_
---
| | Peter, House Republicans created a national strategy to _permanently lose elections for a generation_ : Ban TikTok, an app that 94 million – primarily young Americans – use. The TikTok ban strategy comes at a time when the GOP complains about liberal U.S. social media companies canceling and censoring conservatives. It’s ironic many of these same “conservatives” now agitate to ban a platform owned by an international group that includes several American investors. **_My issue with an outright ban on this social media platform is the massive BIG GOVERNMENT power grab._**
---
[**STOP BIG GOVERNMENT**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c382636b67f04c45be2942f0282cdc13&_e=bZiwtl5Abvo7oRVOMavisNAwVkCaRy5Usd6IFNmB4XH8lSPiJUtokmxJdRfFWVH3xeKmPRhRWGdEckSGpPRXMt9ITDbFcDe7aMiLbyAkI66c_lEYywi_08hRuWbBY6sGq-Ma7cuLwTsD7VCwRI2aGZlOnp5Fh1y5YkNhAxorlwjc8qC7VbMzEFpfS7GjShn8dZHi_Px5lVyzv9Wpd0CSvW6r6JceVWUR6iTbYmEESXTri-RTz6r6WCqmyv5bWnAk90FVlzy60xcgJfat1WAclICnh-DKZinWvep0Fe4QpxaeEzQ_tVwwij_NgTiWWobSkbHtKyr4lNPjnZrDyPHwHoicIQIr4cyGjAU0gWDF9JY%3D)
---
Peter, we’ve already seen what happens when we give the government the power to chip away at our rights, all in the name of doing something “good.” _Just look at what happened with the Patriot Act._ We sacrificed our Constitutional rights, gave the green light to a massive government power grab, and _more than 20 years later_ , those rights are STILL thrown by the wayside – and Big Government is using this decades-old piece of legislation to _constantly_ spy on the American people, simply because they can. _**_[PROTECT OUR RIGHTS >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c382636b67f04c45be2942f0282cdc13&_e=bZiwtl5Abvo7oRVOMavisNAwVkCaRy5Usd6IFNmB4XH8lSPiJUtokmxJdRfFWVH3xeKmPRhRWGdEckSGpPRXMt9ITDbFcDe7aMiLbyAkI66c_lEYywi_08hRuWbBY6sGq-Ma7cuLwTsD7VCwRI2aGZlOnp5Fh1y5YkNhAxorlwjc8qC7VbMzEFpfS7GjShn8dZHi_Px5lVyzv9Wpd0CSvaxMg30Obs4mtYZ7qq1sYoPe6G0Maa3fAodBzwKcQXMqgpBYLPJORnILEWW6AW9eRwbJ_diUl_SZk5PIzm1p_EtAIx2tSpPCayb6Cd7_T8_R8NgjsYE7fH-LPIHDzxN5hkoO-Ip-GTCQssWqVjOOT-4%3D)_**_ **Peter, this type of power grab gives Joe Biden and his administration the power to ban just about**** _anything_****they label a “threat.” And that’s the same mentality the CCP has, and it’s why speech is severely regulated in China.** Before we ban TikTok, we need to ask ourselves... _**_[Do we REALLY want to emulate China’s speech bans?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c382636b67f04c45be2942f0282cdc13&_e=bZiwtl5Abvo7oRVOMavisNAwVkCaRy5Usd6IFNmB4XH8lSPiJUtokmxJdRfFWVH3xeKmPRhRWGdEckSGpPRXMt9ITDbFcDe7aMiLbyAkI66c_lEYywi_08hRuWbBY6sGq-Ma7cuLwTsD7VCwRI2aGZlOnp5Fh1y5YkNhAxorlwjc8qC7VbMzEFpfS7GjShn8dZHi_Px5lVyzv9Wpd0CSvc11deE70fIk7_AnCgwDXsoMLMY_HAEvUCfO2xjWZ5n98QrQR3MVLNP5sYsrco59kCTaNA340ZHSboTVl9ozbk-T6sULPXFVlFGXdidRljbVDWteyNYQ7IXD8xKMwFxG-A8_SyVDto02bjUpCCADd4c%3D)_**_
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: “A republic... if you can KEEP IT.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Will you see our mission through with me to the end?
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHMjAHnwGG3Vio1VS-tulUvkdceJ7PCBoHZKP31FSi71-89We_z2DgNHO696J4FwJX9IgAEPgmAk3r-86M9vZxM-fRbU2naRt22FL4IgHyf6LP6eKWiaHnYaGcK34PT4FxBfd1q2R1QSSiuPeDhFYKVGlFi3SnvawmNVpIOumkwFNyDBJRKtnUjEWRltYPgbN00QRNRJ5S8car8mOzg3_K8xqlyYyyG_prztOyTjgKOC7l1purGaSa_NTZm36m0kWZ2tnwbOeUyrMnPlhdOl9KNMXLORAKOyQ06uI4owEHVdQivtcDjmuM5kuc1CjQP33aDy7jOjgQax2f7YM7GyfIlCTQfTh_JmDKlLNDodofnNLAXaL7-6n7-e_92v7sd7hdB893-7Raj1Usx93668TDw0m4fcdkWbG7_AwAA__9-7Y0a)
---
Friend,
Our once great nation is being tested like never before, _and the fate of our Republic hangs in the balance._
In 1787, at the Constitutional Convention, a group of citizens asked Benjamin Franklin what kind of government had been formed...
“**A republic** ,” he told them, _**“... if you can keep it.”**_
But what we have witnessed unfold is NOT the America our Founding Fathers envisioned. The country you and I once knew and loved is dying.
**We are descending into a tin pot dictatorship that CRIMINALIZES dissent and ARRESTS its political opposition for committing _no crime._ **
But this is not a reality we have to accept. Right now, even during this dark chapter in our nation’s history, I have **NEVER BEEN MORE COMMITTED** to our mission to SAVE America.
_And I’m counting on patriots like YOU to see that mission through with me to the end._
So, I ask you only this: Will you help me KEEP OUR REPUBLIC, Friend?
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any amount – truly, even just $1 – to peacefully SAVE AMERICA as the fate of our Republic hangs in the balance.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2O2yAUhZ8G72zhi3_wwouZomxSdddO1U3EwCW5kcEu4Ebz9hVWZrbfOULn42q_LeQ-Zja-MoAb2cQAmHhhAOfu9feP4fx2VvXLL4m1GvruUVL4xgDyx4Zf1ecrDXpNS6GjquwMRoIxFc7tIPk4iY5DdZsn2Yqx5yAHAOBGajlNGuQ42b517xwrmoGD4B0f2p4L4I2WBpzRbd87iYgj6_iDQmPXoBd7z3H3W2NWXy3zLectHZNODE4JzR6xeVCIaEujMP0Pa-0xktH1faWQa7cHGzUlCtfarN5TzogMTsEs0pkR0cHUta1z7y0Tpz37i0dLu2dCPX2HAtO6R4NMKEMX_WRG-03TNTChPp0-kzVkDJkJJYcDXsJClgn1M0Qr_4Y7pAMeFxHqu_4zJiW7tyrOdnvQslAaykdcy4Li9j8AAP__kjCNOQ)
| [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHM2Bhy4LBbKxeqak_dVS-ROx6SSbFBYBrtv6-Msr1-78l6n8eFZeLxsxftqwC4sd8EgFAvAmDQrx8_zPA-2PLlZ0elNY1-5BS-CYD0udD_6vOVioLjKdPWFr4H7ACxoL42nWxPSksobj2dXAPaIXoNZBop4dR4J7VXxrSNwoJ7kKCklqZupAJZuQ5hRFc3zdgRUSu0fHCs_Bzd5O9p3cNS4RyKqb-ltGzHpLOA80a4r1Q9OK7kcyMz95dKF2hldOV95pjKcY9-dbxxvJY4h8ApEQk4R5y6EVuiEU66rsfxdy3UeU_hEsjzHoSyT1-T4TbvK5JQFvningxdWBxfo1D2y-krmWOimISynTngJU7shbL3tz9puC3Dx9sBj4so-939ajfb6fdi7f3y4GnizeSPuOYF2e1fAAAA__94kI3T)

clean_body: Will you see our mission through with me to the end? | | | Friend, Our once great nation is being tested like never before, and the fate of our Republic hangs in the balance. In 1787, at the Constitutional Convention, a group of citizens asked Benjamin Franklin what kind of government had been formed... “A republic ,” he told them, “... if you can keep it.” But what we have witnessed unfold is NOT the America our Founding Fathers envisioned. The country you and I once knew and loved is dying. We are descending into a tin pot dictatorship that CRIMINALIZES dissent and ARRESTS its political opposition for committing no crime. But this is not a reality we have to accept. Right now, even during this dark chapter in our nation’s history, I have NEVER BEEN MORE COMMITTED to our mission to SAVE America. And I’m counting on patriots like YOU to see that mission through with me to the end. So, I ask you only this: Will you help me KEEP OUR REPUBLIC, Friend? | (But if you’re doing poorly due to Biden’s policies, please ignore the donation request. Take care of your family and yourself! We will soon Make America Great Again and our economy will come ROARING BACK!) Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Do you support Donald Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528785:JaWkxFGaN:m:1:3331421248:6C54BB5AB05A0FA41275B2F5A8CBE0F9:r)
|

Peter,

For the first time in American history, we are witnessing the arrest of a former president of the United States. Again, this has NEVER happened before in American history. NEVER.

**President Trump's arrest all but guarantees politics in America will never be the same again.**

I'm sending this to you now because President Trump and Republicans in Congress need your help, now more than EVER before. The Witch hunt continues with no signs of slowing down. They're going to continue to try and destroy Donald Trump forever! **[Please, send an urgent gift that we'll use to come to President Trump's defense.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528785:JaWkxFGaN:m:1:3331421248:6C54BB5AB05A0FA41275B2F5A8CBE0F9:r)**

[**STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP
STOP THE WITCH HUNT ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528785:JaWkxFGaN:m:1:3331421248:6C54BB5AB05A0FA41275B2F5A8CBE0F9:r)
For nearly eight years, Democrat politicians at every level of government have tried and failed to **SILENCE Donald J. Trump**. They hate everything he stands for, the people he speaks for; they hate the man himself. The fact of the matter is: DEMOCRATS are scared that President TRUMP will be the Republican nominee for president in 2024, something which they just cannot allow to happen.

_**So, what do they do?**_

They resurrect a case brought against the President 7 years ago - which the Department of Justice declined to prosecute with the hope that they can make the charges stick this time.

**This is as political as it gets.** President Trump's indictment perfectly encapsulates why he ran for the White House in the first place: Power is concentrated in the hands of too few individuals who do not believe every American deserves equal protection under the law.

So much for a case that in March 2022, the _New York Times_ reported had "_unraveled_."

We need to stand with President Trump today. We need to show him that we have his back. We need to send a message to all the lunatic leftists that we're united against them in their quest to destroy him. **[Chip in right now, and let's send a message to Democrats: This will backfire on you, BIGLY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528785:JaWkxFGaN:m:1:3331421248:6C54BB5AB05A0FA41275B2F5A8CBE0F9:r)**.

[**CHIP IN
STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528785:JaWkxFGaN:m:1:3331421248:6C54BB5AB05A0FA41275B2F5A8CBE0F9:r)
Democrats have promulgated false narratives against President Trump since before he was elected. They've spent millions of YOUR tax dollars on bogus investigations that have all been debunked. **Now, their political theater has reached a dangerous new low.**

If the arrest of former President Trump infuriates you as much as it does me, **[I'm asking you to chip in any amount right now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528785:JaWkxFGaN:m:1:3331421248:6C54BB5AB05A0FA41275B2F5A8CBE0F9:r)**.

God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528786:JaWkxFGaN:m:1:3331421248:6C54BB5AB05A0FA41275B2F5A8CBE0F9:r)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528785:JaWkxFGaN:m:1:3331421248:6C54BB5AB05A0FA41275B2F5A8CBE0F9:r)

Delaware, OH 43015

name: Coach
subject: Mexico’s aggression must be stopped
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Link to video and write-up inside >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/512f3edaa108b17e/1f2486af45af8947c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter,

Vulcan Materials Company and Cemex have reportedly reached a temporary agreement on terminal access. It’s certainly a positive development.

But that doesn’t diminish the seriousness of the attacks we’ve seen launched by Cemex and the Mexican government against Birmingham-based Vulcan. **Last month, things came to a head when Mexican police and military rolled into Vulcan’s port facility in Quintana Roo and illegally shut it down.**

President Biden’s weakness has once again been exposed for the world to see.

Mexico had been mistreating Vulcan for over a year and they’ve been emboldened – who knows when we’ll see their next hostile attack.
[**You can watch my recent floor speech and**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/512f3edaa108b17e/fbeee54c4cc860b9c3d6b838967d376c/33013) [**read more HERE >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/512f3edaa108b17e/e6790a5861de3ab9c3d6b838967d376c/33013) Mexico’s hostility put Vulcan employees at risk. They’ve jeopardized our supply chains in the southeastern United States.

_And Joe Biden has had his HEAD IN THE SAND all along the way!_

America needs tough leadership. The fight for the White House is on and it’s all hands on deck as we ramp up our efforts at Team Tuberville. I hope we can count on your support.
\- Coach
---

body:
| |

|

---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529375:6B7UxFGNo:m:1:3391001263:807696BF198D8F4BEB14D78A492B2E1E:r)
---

Peter, this is Navy SEAL Ryan Zinke.

I need you to kindly join me in supporting my Republican friends in the Senate who are standing up for our Constitutional rights, namely the **[Second Amendment.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529375:6B7UxFGNo:m:1:3391001263:807696BF198D8F4BEB14D78A492B2E1E:r "Second Amendment.")**

In codifying these rulings on a federal level, Republicans will seal Americans' right to own and carry a firearm inside and outside our homes, irrespective of military participation status.

_**Simply put, the right to bear arms is a guarantee for every law-abiding citizen and we _must_ do everything in our power to protect it.**_
**[If you agree, join me in standing with these patriots in the Senate and add your name in support of our 2nd Amendment Rights:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529375:6B7UxFGNo:m:1:3391001263:807696BF198D8F4BEB14D78A492B2E1E:r "If you agree, join me in standing with these patriots in the Senate and add your name in support of our 2nd
Amendment Rights:")**

---
| | [I SUPPORT THE 2nd AMENDMENT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529375:6B7UxFGNo:m:1:3391001263:807696BF198D8F4BEB14D78A492B2E1E:r)
---
| | [(ADD YOUR NAME)](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529375:6B7UxFGNo:m:1:3391001263:807696BF198D8F4BEB14D78A492B2E1E:r)
---

This is what separates America from the rest.

In God we trust,
Ryan Zinke (R-MT)
---
| |
* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

**[SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529375:6B7UxFGNo:m:1:3391001263:807696BF198D8F4BEB14D78A492B2E1E:r "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY")**

body:
Our country is dying, but we will save it!

| | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654215%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gtS%2fhsbqCSbGGe2c1NhYEQ&sysid=1)

Friend,
I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved - to hear that I could face **136 YEARS IN PRISON** for having committed **NO CRIME**.
But I did not sit there feeling sorry for myself.
I felt sorry for our country - because this is _NOT_ America.
Let me assure you - I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_**These attacks confirm how much hangs in the balance in the 2024 election.**_
Winning in 2024 is about more than just an election. It’s about the survival of our Free Republic.

body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528656:6numSFGNn:m:1:3366222934:0928A8C19F5C537A67CE4952BC6BA62A:r)
---
Peter, I recently**_[went toe-to-toe](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528656:6numSFGNn:m:1:3366222934:0928A8C19F5C537A67CE4952BC6BA62A:r)_** with Moderna CEO Stephane Bancel over his continual push to force parents into vaccinating their teenage sons, even after a kid suffers from myocarditis after getting the jab. subject: Re: Reviving American Energy

body:
Help us restore domestic production so we can END Biden’s energy crisis
| [](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=acde7ce4264643a695acdfd079608170&_e=4H4Dia2J800CNVoD69kM8MKxXhx5zDGqbLJXk8rv8J4K4G6fAqaJlg5Ccum0w7U42tK75Zisc1lBoAQVZ6x5Ff44DFvEDt98Pk_X5wj-VzjnzO3yLKTg5XdzsNW6jSZ7pTD8FRDZxn7fyDxw1V9_2bM_XBN_x3D4s-iAPomoIbK0xVFNJpsDPgcyEUXDjrFz5wazeAA1BAAN0UMTOY5twkNtT-ebDSQpqfi3Pgq1-glUAgRAX2nppKO3-uZT2euSxFua2ro9SWrNihCglmop5x73Zhh4XpVZNTAAkf1IDX1I89qssflAb7wnBS-5dmDZtgGz-Y7lzWgC8RIFOiPblexdQbt57Pxw6hrfNH9FDs0%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Since Joe Biden became President, his administration has _**TANKED**_ the American energy sector while citizens like **YOU** struggle with skyrocketing energy prices.
---
**House Republicans pass marquee energy bill in rebuke of Biden**
---
_Source: Politico_
---
_But with conservative leaders like me back in the House majority, we have every intention of**RESTORING** our country’s energy independence and lowering costs for the American people._
---
Americans are SICK of bearing the burdens of Joe Biden’s _**FAILED**_ energy agenda.
---
So my colleagues and I are taking action to accomplish the following:
---
* **INCREASE the amount of energy being produced right here in the U.S.**
* **PREVENT Joe Biden from interfering with domestic energy production**
* **REVERSE poor decisions that damaged the American energy industry**
* **LIMIT regulations on our energy exports to promote industrial growth**
* **SUPPORT our energy workers and protect them from liberal policies**

---
So, Peter, will you make your voice heard and stand with us as we fight to restore America’s energy independence?
---
[**Please add your name to my PETITION and urge the Senate to RESTORE America’s energy independence by increasing domestic production here in the United States.**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=acde7ce4264643a695acdfd079608170&_e=4H4Dia2J800CNVoD69kM8MKxXhx5zDGqbLJXk8rv8J4K4G6fAqaJlg5Ccum0w7U42tK75Zisc1lBoAQVZ6x5Ff44DFvEDt98Pk_X5wj-VzjnzO3yLKTg5XdzsNW6jSZ7pTD8FRDZxn7fyDxw1V9_2bM_XBN_x3D4s-iAPomoIbK0xVFNJpsDPgcyEUXDjrFz5wazeAA1BAAN0UMTOY5twhnx65AJcU2n5stSLVrMbwj7-fY9MT7ktrqJq3eCIna0LyXQ5lFlzr5e9lFr5bxqkRYfhYUT3n4RyRMVvzo0VcvjKXczDM0FGJSpvkGOVQmZ33SJb3oc4QY_9UZO3WORAD8FVIF0oKZZn0sJ7bthssg%3D)
---

[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=acde7ce4264643a695acdfd079608170&_e=4H4Dia2J800CNVoD69kM8MKxXhx5zDGqbLJXk8rv8J4K4G6fAqaJlg5Ccum0w7U42tK75Zisc1lBoAQVZ6x5Ff44DFvEDt98Pk_X5wj-VzjnzO3yLKTg5XdzsNW6jSZ7pTD8FRDZxn7fyDxw1V9_2bM_XBN_x3D4s-iAPomoIbK0xVFNJpsDPgcyEUXDjrFz5wazeAA1BAAN0UMTOY5twtQtANnHyvR4Je92iHNV9btUoCrjaSMiUoYwR46kf00mB5umXsjKaLl4pFlhHifX3Bm8fOvgpssTP4xcNba6BPu5P34TTqtHDoqEVS-kmRq9l6RK22SfrvwvKbl9IXw7suHb2qUQT73Fabr1LF2xtbs%3D)

Our country is dying, but we will save it!

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo1k9he8651uveti85jt859t5q1ng6ds3jofnheg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3i60pj2c1h2bs)

Friend,
I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved – to hear that I could face **136 YEARS IN PRISON** for having committed **NO CRIME**.

I felt sorry for our country – because this is _NOT_ America.
Let me assure you – I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

name: Andy Beshear
subject: 43,700 new jobs.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
We're bringing opportunities and economic growth to Kentucky, all while setting records. Peter,

Since I took office in 2019, my administration has created **43,700 new, full-time jobs.** In fact, we've set the record for the best two-year period for job creation in Kentucky!

That's **43,700** more families with a steady paycheck. **43,700** people with a new purpose and a new role. **43,700** more Kentuckians with a good reason to hold their head up high.

I promised Kentuckians in 2019 that I would put people ahead of politics and build a better Kentucky, and we're doing just that.

During some of the most uncertain economic times of this generation, we've secured record investments, boosted workforce participation, and cemented our Commonwealth as the electric vehicle battery production capital of America. **And we're just getting started.**

**I'm proud of the work we're doing together, and I am hopeful about the future we're building for our great Commonwealth. Thank you for being a part of this.**

Sincerely,

Andy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61396211/399945594/-428057120?refcode=em23_230403_eoqty_enask_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230403_eoqty_enask_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=b629d312-94d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjI5ZDMxMi05NGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SR_KoNAXNpSmbHu5BHHvGRQOTQIhOiSDLgAIkkitJWY=)

| Friend
While Biden claims to be helping Americans, our trafficker-in-chief is allowing thousands of pounds of fentanyl to flow across our border. He's responsible for so many of America's problems today, but that still hasn't stopped me from fighting to end the crises!!
Friend while we struggle just to make ends meet, Biden has managed to make things even worse! Just take a look at some of the things he's done "for" America:

* Drove up prices to sky-high levels.
* Slashed American oil and gas production.
* Let the FBI and IRS spy on everyday Americans.
* Turned our schools into indoctrination stations.

I visited our southern border this week and it is clear that we need a leader that will fix our border crisis. President Biden and his administration have spent the past two years ignoring this ongoing crisis. They’ve abandoned every American living in a border town and every single state that’s now dealing with the consequences of this crisis. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d44afc21c1e6b650266ae94a3f2a218cadbbcaef7030741ea271f4cf19360453876683da07ab5814c1568ed16c931a920b6f0f57ba41d005 >">Watch my latest video on how our current administration has fueled a DISASTER on the southern border and how I plan to fix it. >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d44afc21c1e6b650266ae94a3f2a218cadbbcaef7030741ea271f4cf19360453876683da07ab5814c1568ed16c931a920b6f0f57ba41d005 Frankly, we’ve all heard the Biden administration claim that “the border is secure” – when all the numbers prove otherwise… https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d44afc21c1e6b650266ae94a3f2a218cadbbcaef7030741ea271f4cf19360453876683da07ab5814c1568ed16c931a920b6f0f57ba41d005 JUST TAKE A LOOK→ I want every American to understand my dedication to ensuring our border is safe and secure. Even further, I want them to know EXACTLY how I plan to do that when I’m in office. I pledge to YOU, Peter, that I’ll start off with these actionable items: - Recruit and hire new Border Patrol and ICE workers to stop the flow of drugs and illegal immigrants - Restart Remain in Mexico and keep Title 42, while ENDING catch and release once and for all - Institute a national E-Verify program, just like I did as governor of South Carolina - End taxpayer-funded handouts to illegal immigrants and sanctuary cities None of this can be accomplished with Joe Biden and the Left in power. I need your help to tackle our border crisis from every angle. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d44afc21c1e6b650266ae94a3f2a218cadbbcaef7030741ea271f4cf19360453876683da07ab5814c1568ed16c931a920b6f0f57ba41d005 Will you chip in just $15 today to help me create a safer future for us ALL? Thank you in advance for your support. We need to ensure everyone sees this video to know what’s at stake. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d44afc21c1e6b650266ae94a3f2a218cadbbcaef7030741ea271f4cf19360453876683da07ab5814c1568ed16c931a920b6f0f57ba41d005 Join me in sharing this video with 5 friends today. I visited our southern border this week and it is clear that we need a leader that will fix our border crisis. President Biden and his administration have spent the past two years ignoring this ongoing crisis. They’ve abandoned every American living in a border town and every single state that’s now dealing with the consequences of this crisis. ">Watch my latest video on how our current administration has fueled a DISASTER on the southern border and how I plan to fix it. >> Frankly, we’ve all heard the Biden administration claim that “the border is secure” – when all the numbers prove otherwise… JUST TAKE A LOOK→ I want every American to understand my dedication to ensuring our border is safe and secure. Even further, I want them to know EXACTLY how I plan to do that when I’m in office. I pledge to YOU, Peter, that I’ll start off with these actionable items: - Recruit and hire new Border Patrol and ICE workers to stop the flow of drugs and illegal immigrants - Restart Remain in Mexico and keep Title 42, while ENDING catch and release once and for all - Institute a national E-Verify program, just like I did as governor of South Carolina - End taxpayer-funded handouts to illegal immigrants and sanctuary cities None of this can be accomplished with Joe Biden and the Left in power. I need your help to tackle our border crisis from every angle. Will you chip in just $15 today to help me create a safer future for us ALL? Thank you in advance for your support. We need to ensure everyone sees this video to know what’s at stake. Join me in sharing this video with 5 friends today. My very best, Nikki Haley GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! All of our merchandise is made in America. ">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President mug today. >> Claim Your Mug JOIN NIKKI’S TEAM Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She’s served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations…and she’s a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country. Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people. In order to build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation today? Thank you in advance for your support. Thank you, Team Haley P.S. If you don’t have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to share this with 5 friends today. DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Inc. and Ambassador Nikki Haley (28786) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply.

I've watched firsthand as she has fought tirelessly to help level the playing field for working families in Nevada and nationwide. **[Jacky is already running a tough race in Nevada, where the Republican establishment is doing everything it can to flip this seat. Let's show Jacky our movement has her back. In her first term as Senator, she has earned a reputation for getting things done. I've watched firsthand as she has fought tirelessly to help level the playing field for working families in Nevada and nationwide. = One of the things I love about Jacky is that she knows how to bring people together, and she's all in for her community. Every day she is working to bring down costs for American families, create clean energy jobs, make health care and prescription drugs affordable and accessible, expand reproductive health care, and crack down on corruption in Washington. She's exactly the kind of progressive fighter Americans deserve to have in the Senate. In 2016, she ran for Congress in a competitive House district and flipped it from Red to Blue. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=53%2E791427%2EUhlFzV)
I'm reaching out today because I wanted to take a moment to thank you.
You're an incredibly important part of this team, and it's the support of people like you that is the reason we are going to build the kind of campaign we need to fight back against the right wing and win.
I'm so grateful to stand by your side as our movement continues to fight for justice together.
Now, I know that me and my team reached out a lot before last week's FEC deadline. There were a lot of emails and a lot of texts, and I'm sure we weren't the only campaign sending them to you.
It's my hope that you take these messages not as an annoyance, but a sign of just how important grassroots, small-dollar donations are to this campaign.
The simple truth is that I don't accept a cent of corporate PAC money, and there are no billionaires waiting in the wings to help us out. It's pretty much the opposite, in fact.
I also don't waste a bunch of time at fundraisers or spend hours on the phone with mega-donors, because that's time I could be fighting for important policies like Medicare for All and universal school meals, or organizing with members of my community in Minnesota's 5th district.
Frankly, I also know that I don't have to — thanks to the incredible grassroots movement we've built together.
Everything that we do, we do the right way. That includes funding this campaign $5, $10, and $25 at a time — which means I must continue to ask:
**[Can you make a contribution of $3 or any amount to stand with me today? Every dollar will go directly toward building the kind of campaign that can fight back against the right wing and win.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr23.QUZUGP&refcode=em230406-1-t2&t=2&akid=53%2E791427%2EUhlFzV)**

subject: [LIVE TODAY] We must overcome adversity
body:
Peter, No matter how hard they try, the woke mob will NEVER break us. Join us LIVE TODAY (Thursday) at 4:30PM Eastern Time f
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/f60faef36e110a121839964db45775ab/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVRM8xbiMhieYg6h-lQS7ou2yiZ-N8bKzoVdJ353vd4AxCqXJEoIYQb3V3XAwsMFlJLVBQ1ivLi-XX9ueM5FlRSXRLTtBrC4Wv4A0znwOcI9RqZ2G1XUSqy5LAWWcqgzg1X_KVZBMuPJt6sxBrG8acXa0lxx-orhGRanPaUkjfR3lTMn4n0NbTtoqnrRp24Q5WzomqPdiU7ZEGuNaryvT3F_qUZH4psYok=)
---
| Peter, No matter how hard they try, the woke mob will NEVER break us. Join us **LIVE TODAY (Thursday) at 4:30PM Eastern Time** for a critical livestream of the Common Ground Podcast. **With the political persecution we have seen over the last week, there's no topic more fitting for today's show than that of _overcoming adversity_.** During these trying times, it is essential that we come together as one community. Our unity is our strength, and when we support one another, there is no obstacle too great for us to conquer (even when the radical left is willing to stoop down to unheard of levels to push their agenda).
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO ACCESS THE COMMON GROUND STREAM NOW (WE'LL BE LIVE AT 4:30PM EDT)]()
---
|
---
| Today's special guests are perfect examples of people who have overcome immense adversity and pushed forward despite challenging circumstances: Jason Grimsley and Dianne Grossman. Jason Grimsley is a former Major League Baseball relief pitcher who played for seven teams over a wild and memorable fifteen-year career. He was a member of both the 1999 and 2000 World Series champion New York Yankees. Jason's new book, _Cross Stitched: One Man’s Journey From Ruin to Restoration_ , opens up about hardships he’s faced, including a botched suicide attempt and the near-destruction of his marriage. Filled with insight and wisdom for all the highs and lows of life, this book is a manual for how to have hope on your worst days and a guidebook for experiencing God’s love in your life every single day.
Dianne Grossman is a brave mother who lost her daughter to suicide almost six years ago. Dianne formed Mallory’s Army in July of 2017, after the tragic, unforeseen death of her daughter, Mallory Rose Grossman. At the young age of 12, Mallory took her life after months of bullying, both at school and online. The Foundation believes that the old mantra of ‘sticks and stones’ must change to illustrate to our community that hurtful words can be just as painful as thrown stones. Dianne also recently got Mallory's Law passed in New Jersey. Now, school districts must include specific consequences for harassing, intimidating or bullying in their anti-bullying policies.
---
|
---
|
---
Today's stream will be an exciting one, as my colleague Elizabeth Nader takes the reins as host. As I continue to travel to further develop our rapidly growing organization, Elizabeth will showcase her expertise as an author, speaker, entrepreneur, mindset maven, and patriot while she dives deep into the topic of how we can overcome the adversity that we will all inevitably face at some point in our lives.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO ACCESS THE COMMON GROUND LIVESTREAM (STARTS AT 4:30PM EST)](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/2cad4528f93b2cc2ddaa138dde975db7/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0viR2HuREQGzUXUOkwfNaTjMD4lE_97Y0VtCtq-d-653BEIRS6IleDDlW627YABCgsuOQoKG0F58fjaS9dyLAMqLi6xajoJ_vg1_Abms-euDaBBoiZ22yBMWBYfUpYlGpS50hV_aVbeRxNtApbCNP30Ys0p6rW6BZ9Uh_OekutNtFeV5s9EsvVNs2jquhEn3SHKRVF1R7PiPWpBLiWK8rU9weGpme6P8WKQ)
---
| Looking forward to seeing you this afternoon, Bill
# PS: If important issues, like coming together to overcome adversity not only on a political level but also in our personal lives, resonate with you...then you may be the perfect candidate for our Common Sense Club. [Click here to learn more/join now.](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/162e79d4cde37a9da1f420b4bfaa99ae/eJyNkMsOgkAMRf-laxQd8MXOGEMIyMLo2kygyigMk6GIj_DvDmpcaeL29vQ0t3cglFxSkIIHF7ox5oAFGhOhBEpalJJ48pyykTt0hhbkQp58XdYKvPvX5Q_QxVN3YgFdFRpis54vwiD2d1EQhwZUXJsTf2nG09lHs1zNgwja9qcXC0HLs1FX4JGuseuTCtOJtjo3fEakKs-2m6bpH0shKcO9OGTEBszpJ2Vhd2EPCy5yY-NKoUzfjwjx-nK2D5I7ZqE=)

Other candidates in this race have spent millions of dollars on ads to tell voters how they’ll _manage violent crime_. We are the only campaign willing to talk about investing in our youth and in solutions that _end the public safety crisis_.
For 30 years, I’ve been fighting to make our communities safer by keeping people in their homes, creating good jobs with family-sustaining wages, investing in education, and creating school safety zones.
As Mayor, I’ll align all city departments, agencies, and community partners around an all-hands-on-deck approach that treats the gun violence crisis like the emergency that it is. We will fix our 911 system, expand mental health support, overhaul victim's services, stabilize our young people, and reclaim our neighborhoods for neighbors.
**We can build a safer and more vibrant Philadelphia, but first, we need to win this race on May 16th. With ten other candidates and millions of dollars spent on ads, it’ll take a huge grassroots fundraising push.**
**So what do you say: Will you chip in any amount to help keep my first ad on TV? Our vision for community safety is proven and popular, and if enough voters know about it, we will win.**

body:
I have never been more determined than I am right now.

| | | [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ed124126800b4154b0e4576eb3651210&_e=CgX9HcSr_CZTmwGgdrRItUzhHuyH2VxUCdWEHIBOmsnU5zKq9ETNfwZjIAELjW4IzKmj1Zvlx-ggzXJ_iC6JRRFV7pw5TB5wCJ3i3-KM-0iSvs69VdcIzHV8DrWxyoqo0a-zm9hhvDPxH7JXhT31NKcXHU0GUIjWecGynSffB44C7nUMRXxUNx1dkNsgOH_lwSaBtH_aYjrWAPv9m4FQIgOZpvCBy8tb_JmteCkkTGSM96dOJwQi6OQwDwY0h3OgeJStbq0Nk7SfhkWvEc2YVUqtrO5RXGPWiCB8PlIJOH7ozwRxaGvmSepRQAxLTPndBMnKCoBoEwasiyyhTVbSlszWIPw7oMG21CAoqf0zctXfBGuU2xtZqSjt3KQ5HfVxrZ9weA8HBVtRz9cNR2SWKQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,

body:
Dan Goldman for New York [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94087/images/dsg_logo.png]
Hi Peter,

For those who are celebrating Passover or Easter this weekend, I want to wish you and your families a healthy, meaningful holiday.

Last night, I gathered with my family for a Passover seder and recounted the story of the Exodus, where the Israelites finally escaped bondage in Egypt and began their journey toward freedom.

Every Passover, I hold on to this phrase from the Haggadah: “This year we are slaves, next year, may we be free.”

There is still so much work to do to secure dignity for all families in New York and across the country. I’m honored to have your back as I continue to fight for our freedom.

Best wishes,

Dan
Dan Goldman for New York
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008
United States

name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: Navigating Uncertainty - Taylor Caswell
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | |
---
# New Episode Posted!
---
Earlier this month, Dr. Vikram Mansharamani launched a radio show and podcast in partnership with The Pulse of New Hampshire. The show is called "Navigating Uncertainty" and weekly episodes will be released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!
(Several links below).
---
Here's a short description of the show:
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist Vikram Mansharamani dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.

---
EPISODE 1: MIKE ROGERS
In the first episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Mike Rogers, former chair of the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, and former multi-term Congressman from Michigan. Mike served in the military and also fought organized crime as a member of the Federal Bureau of Investigation. He's a class act, a first-rate thinker, and a patriotic American who cares deeply about the United States and its future.

---
EPISODE 2: GENERAL LORI ROBINSON
In the second episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with General Lori Robinson, USAF (Ret), a New Hampshire native who served as the Commander of North American Aerospace Defense Command (NORAD). General Robinson was also America's first female Combatant Commander and served as head of Northern Command. She is an awesome leader, dedicated America who has served the United States for decades, and all around amazing person. She has also faced (and successfully navigated) many forms of uncertainty on her path to becoming a four-star general.
---
|
EPISODE 3: VIVEK RAMASWAMY
In episode three, Dr. Mansahramani speaks with entrepreneur, one-time stand up comic, and prolific author Vivek Ramaswamy about the American dream and what it was like growing up in Ohio. In addition to exploring the power of annoyance, they discuss the key decisions that took Vivek from the Ivy League to a very successful biotech company (with a stint as a comedian along the way)...and his recent announcement to enter the US Presidential contest as part of his quest to help restore an American identity.
---
| EPISODE 4: COMMISSIONER TAYLOR CASWELL
In the fourth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Commissioner Taylor Caswell, head of the Department of Business and Economic Affairs for the State of New Hampshire. A native of Littleton, Commissioner Caswell shared his philosophy around navigating a career in the public and private sectors, his hopes for a restoration of civil civic engagement, and his love of the outdoors (and cookies)!

---
| |
---
|
---

clean_body: Podcast, radio show, conversations... | | | | New Episode Posted! Earlier this month, Dr. Vikram Mansharamani launched a radio show and podcast in partnership with The Pulse of New Hampshire. The show is called "Navigating Uncertainty" and weekly episodes will be released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available! (Several links below). Here's a short description of the show: Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist Vikram Mansharamani dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life. EPISODE 1: MIKE ROGERS In the first episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Mike Rogers, former chair of the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, and former multi-term Congressman from Michigan. Mike served in the military and also fought organized crime as a member of the Federal Bureau of Investigation. He's a class act, a first-rate thinker, and a patriotic American who cares deeply about the United States and its future. EPISODE 2: GENERAL LORI ROBINSON In the second episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with General Lori Robinson, USAF (Ret), a New Hampshire native who served as the Commander of North American Aerospace Defense Command (NORAD). General Robinson was also America's first female Combatant Commander and served as head of Northern Command. She is an awesome leader, dedicated America who has served the United States for decades, and all around amazing person. She has also faced (and successfully navigated) many forms of uncertainty on her path to becoming a four-star general. | EPISODE 3: VIVEK RAMASWAMY In episode three, Dr. Mansahramani speaks with entrepreneur, one-time stand up comic, and prolific author Vivek Ramaswamy about the American dream and what it was like growing up in Ohio. In addition to exploring the power of annoyance, they discuss the key decisions that took Vivek from the Ivy League to a very successful biotech company (with a stint as a comedian along the way)...and his recent announcement to enter the US Presidential contest as part of his quest to help restore an American identity. | EPISODE 4: COMMISSIONER TAYLOR CASWELL In the fourth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Commissioner Taylor Caswell, head of the Department of Business and Economic Affairs for the State of New Hampshire. A native of Littleton, Commissioner Caswell shared his philosophy around navigating a career in the public and private sectors, his hopes for a restoration of civil civic engagement, and his love of the outdoors (and cookies)! | | | | | == | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | Vikram Mansharamani | P.O. Box 1376, Concord, NH 03302 | | Sent by mailto:vikram@mansharamani.com in collaboration with

Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**

**What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,

clean_body: I have never been more determined than I am right now. | | | Friend, I never thought this could happen in America - but it has. The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out. Let me be as clear as possible:I AM INNOCENT. The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it. What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order. Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now. They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country. The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA. | Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about. In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy. Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission. They spied on my campaign. They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier. And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice. They have crossed one line after another. They have no shame. They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense. Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it. EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt. These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated. Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought. We will be one country again. Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom. Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20St.=20George?=
subject: FW: Exciting Update: Liz Harrington to Keynote the Republican Action Conference!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us May 5th and 6th in Kennewick for the Republican Action Conference! | | |
---
|
---
| | Hey Peter,

I just wanted to make sure you saw the news about our fantastic new keynote speaker for the upcoming Republican Action Conference on May 5th and 6th. We're incredibly excited to have Liz Harrington, Trump's Spokesperson, join us at the event!

As you may know, Liz is a prominent conservative voice and will be sharing her insights on the current political landscape, including the unprecedented indictment of former President Trump. Trust me, [you won't want to miss her speech!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=3695fb79ed&e=6a281f566d)

If you haven't registered yet, now's the time to [secure your spot](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=228919a2a7&e=6a281f566d) and join fellow Republicans for engaging panel discussions, networking opportunities, and an unforgettable experience. Plus, take advantage of our Early Bird Registration for discounted rates.

[Sign up ASAP and join us to hear from Liz Harrington and other inspiring speakers](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=517b077afb&e=6a281f566d)

---
| [Register for the Republican Action Conference today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=699a80d93c&e=6a281f566d "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!")
---
| Best,

Amanda St. George
Director of Administrative Services
Washington State Republican Party
---
|
---
| **BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE:**
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
|
---
| | Peter,

We have some fantastic news for the upcoming 2023 Republican Action Conference! We're thrilled to announce that we've secured none other than Donald Trump's 2024 Campaign Spokesperson, Liz Harrington as our new Keynote Speaker!

Liz Harrington is a prominent conservative voice and a well-respected figure within the Republican Party. As a former National Spokesperson for the Republican National Committee and current Spokesperson for President Trump, she brings a wealth of knowledge and experience to the stage.

[Don't miss this exclusive opportunity](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5eca68c931&e=6a281f566d) to hear Liz Harrington share her insights on the current political landscape, the future of the Republican Party, and how we can work together to secure victories in upcoming elections.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=8272719c07&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Join us at the Republican Action Conference on May 5th and 6th](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=43b9afcf90&e=6a281f566d) at the Red Lion Hotel, Kennewick Columbia Center, for an unforgettable experience. Here's a quick overview of what you can expect:
* Engaging panel discussions and workshops on topics like campaigning, grassroots activism, citizen lobbying, ballot collection, fundraising, and digital media
* A Friday night social reception for networking with fellow Republicans and enjoying a fun-filled evening
* The exclusive Saturday night banquet with Keynote Speaker Liz Harrington

Don't wait – secure your spot at the conference today!
---
| [Register for the Republican Action Conference today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=91385ec457&e=6a281f566d "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!")
---
| [Take action now and register for the conference to hear from Trump Spokesperson Liz Harrington and connect with other passionate Republicans ready to take back our state in 2023 and 2024.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6d10f9d53a&e=6a281f566d)

We can't wait to see you there!
\- Team WAGOP
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/rac2023-reminder-1340868?e=6a281f566d)
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved._

name: GIFFORDS
subject: See what grade your state received on our annual scorecard ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Each year, our scorecard shows an important, inextricable link between stronger gun laws and lower gun death rates.
#

Friends -
For more than a decade, GIFFORDS Law Center has released a scorecard to grade each state in our nation on their gun laws.
Here’s a look at where your home state ranked this year:
**GIFFORDS STATE SCORECARD**
**Your State:** Pennsylvania
**Pennsylvania Gun Law Grade:** B-
**Gun Deaths per 100,000:** 14.8
**Gun Law Rank:** **15**
Each year, our scorecard shows an important, inextricable link between stronger gun laws and lower gun death rates.
**But here’s the unfortunate truth: when it comes to gun safety, most states receive an F.**
At GIFFORDS, we’re working each and every day towards a future where someday, every state will receive an A on our scorecard. But we can’t do that alone.
[**So please, make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us continue the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence in Pennsylvania and all across our nation.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230406-1-30&t=1&akid=4890%2E3935704%2EjmhcDk)
**[DONATE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230406-1-30&t=2&akid=4890%2E3935704%2EjmhcDk)**
Thank you,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=4890%2E3935704%2EjmhcDk) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Real America knows this is a SHAM!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529736:Jgyr4FGNF:m:1:3365131770:150DB4ED7F41C6E3E4E1C45524E42317:r)
|

Peter,

For the first time in American history, we are witnessing the arrest of a former president of the United States. Again, this has NEVER happened before in American history. NEVER.

**President Trump's arrest all but guarantees politics in America will never be the same again.**

I'm sending this to you now because President Trump and Republicans in Congress need your help, now more than EVER before. The Witch hunt continues with no signs of slowing down. They're going to continue to try and destroy Donald Trump forever! **[Please, send an urgent gift that we'll use to come to President Trump's defense.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529736:Jgyr4FGNF:m:1:3365131770:150DB4ED7F41C6E3E4E1C45524E42317:r)**

[**STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP
STOP THE WITCH HUNT ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529736:Jgyr4FGNF:m:1:3365131770:150DB4ED7F41C6E3E4E1C45524E42317:r)
For nearly eight years, Democrat politicians at every level of government have tried and failed to **SILENCE Donald J. Trump**. They hate everything he stands for, the people he speaks for; they hate the man himself. The fact of the matter is: DEMOCRATS are scared that President TRUMP will be the Republican nominee for president in 2024, something which they just cannot allow to happen.

_**So, what do they do?**_

They resurrect a case brought against the President 7 years ago - which the Department of Justice declined to prosecute with the hope that they can make the charges stick this time.

**This is as political as it gets.** President Trump's indictment perfectly encapsulates why he ran for the White House in the first place: Power is concentrated in the hands of too few individuals who do not believe every American deserves equal protection under the law.

So much for a case that in March 2022, the _New York Times_ reported had "_unraveled_."

We need to stand with President Trump today. We need to show him that we have his back. We need to send a message to all the lunatic leftists that we're united against them in their quest to destroy him. **[Chip in right now, and let's send a message to Democrats: This will backfire on you, BIGLY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529736:Jgyr4FGNF:m:1:3365131770:150DB4ED7F41C6E3E4E1C45524E42317:r)**.

[**CHIP IN
STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529736:Jgyr4FGNF:m:1:3365131770:150DB4ED7F41C6E3E4E1C45524E42317:r)
Democrats have promulgated false narratives against President Trump since before he was elected. They've spent millions of YOUR tax dollars on bogus investigations that have all been debunked. **Now, their political theater has reached a dangerous new low.**

If the arrest of former President Trump infuriates you as much as it does me, **[I'm asking you to chip in any amount right now](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529736:Jgyr4FGNF:m:1:3365131770:150DB4ED7F41C6E3E4E1C45524E42317:r)**.

God Bless,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529735:Jgyr4FGNF:m:1:3365131770:150DB4ED7F41C6E3E4E1C45524E42317:r)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529736:Jgyr4FGNF:m:1:3365131770:150DB4ED7F41C6E3E4E1C45524E42317:r)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

| Fellow activist, “off-year” elections are often overlooked, but the offices we elect in these local elections are often fundamental to our everyday lives.

In recent years, right-wing extremists willing to abuse these offices have demonstrated how true this is. Whether they’re sabotaging our elections and disenfranchising voters or banning books and bullying LGBTQ+ children, there is no depth to which they will not sink.

So we’re taking this opportunity to ask all our supporters if you’re ready to vote in this year’s elections to give us a quick gauge of how prepared the electorate is.

clean_body: Let us know! Voting in every election is vital to our democracy. | Fellow activist, “off-year” elections are often overlooked, but the offices we elect in these local elections are often fundamental to our everyday lives. In recent years, right-wing extremists willing to abuse these offices have demonstrated how true this is. Whether they’re sabotaging our elections and disenfranchising voters or banning books and bullying LGBTQ+ children, there is no depth to which they will not sink. So we’re taking this opportunity to ask all our supporters if you’re ready to vote in this year’s elections to give us a quick gauge of how prepared the electorate is. As always, thank you for being a part of our movement to expand and empower the electorate. In solidarity, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project __

subject: Our district deserves a fighter in Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://raquelteran.com/ [https://raquelteran.com/]
Hi friend,
I’m Raquel Terán and I’m officially running to represent Arizona’s 3rd district in Congress. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our campaign [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_040623_CampaignLaunch_I&amount=25] , but first, I want to tell you why I’m running.
In 2006, as I witnessed anti-immigrant sentiment and legislation gaining momentum in Arizona, I started organizing in our community with Mi Familia Vota. My deep belief in democracy, equality, fairness and family is as strong today as it was then.
That’s why I organized to oppose the notorious SB 1070 “show me your papers” racial-profiling law.
It’s why I ran for the Arizona House and why I was proud to serve in the Arizona State Senate, where I fought every day to make it easier to get ahead and provide for our families, by investing in our schools, making our neighborhoods safe, and bringing good jobs back to the district.
And it’s why I brought together a coalition of Democrats and Republicans, union members, educators, and youth activists to take on former Sheriff Joe Arpaio and Donald Trump.
Last year, with our democracy under assault, I brought our coalition together once again to reject GOP extremists like Kari Lake and elect a Democratic Governor, Secretary of State, and Attorney General for the first time in decades. That’s the power we can harness when we come together with a vision of Arizona that includes all of us.
Now, I’m running to take our fight to Congress and I can’t do it without you, friend. That’s why I’m asking you to join our campaign today as a Founding Donor and help us build the foundation we’ll need to win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_040623_CampaignLaunch_I&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
EXPRESS DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_040523_CampaignLaunch_f]
EXPRESS DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=X_040523_CampaignLaunch_f]
EXPRESS DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_040523_CampaignLaunch_f]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_040523_CampaignLaunch_f]
I’ve spent my career organizing in our community for higher wages for our workers, affordable health care for our families, and better schools for our children. I’ve taken on far-right extremist bullies, and won. And now I’m running to represent our community in Congress.
If you’re ready to join us today, can I count on you to chip in whatever you can and become a Founding Donor to our campaign? Your investment now will allow us to build this campaign from the ground up, and win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_040623_CampaignLaunch_I&amount=25]
Stay tuned here, friend, for updates from the campaign trail. I’m so pleased to have you with us.
A ganar,
Raquel Terán
DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_040623_CampaignLaunch_I&amount=25]
Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States
Paid for by Terán for Congress
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/quHjdOlmTESlm5aDEC5Smg2?unsubscribedata=MrW83qziPUNAwDkEt%2FsKkNCErGnBtHrEXXK8YDQLRlUVIL9agbXAWnH6iJohhyNB6t3%2BxOb0M0AvHpXFKuwhrux5%2BmGOhLXJdZvSih4GzsAp43L0hDQwvPzgVR10HwHFAr9oosNGesnv%2B9ijtLmlz7aYXGltdNcjY9M8rli5FQDh4jxnOMLmU7vwICZcZoUY5QFywuKk96uJ4ir4kxZZ6kCptS9CU7YwjOlBwoyTiDGLNj%2FM1WdN%2BB1Gh8d01iHtMkDd5biyvjhP0D%2BchG%2Faqeza0I4is0AfIm250ztCZkf2B5sgImegQmATvTfcm36XPv8NaZ2t24hbVCWY55aoY4D4iN7RZaQfg4bMOK6XRKsyZxGj3Gq67oOAYMsmsURJBZDDoRoi4wzwynBq9EfFzNLv9VGH34bcmH89vTl5SKRlki%2Bl6go7nLMmqOqgjs1s .

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Trump is fighting for his freedom as you're reading this email so we need to hear from you right away.

| |

---
| | | Friend - we've emailed you TWICE about Mark Levin SOUNDING OFF on the corrupt Witch Hunt against President Trump.

**Trump is fighting for his freedom as you're reading this email so we need to hear from you right away. **

Don't legitimize the Radical Left's unprecedented prosecution by staying silent.
_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zarg2538v0cil8via6cvgkfk4hoi5qaqsc9likv8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3i62o71c5h2bs "BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_

* * *

_*** BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE ***_

---
**Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_" The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcma7m84p6uag5pgh8pp37itvd9aug682ore44u0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3i62o71c5h2bs "Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**
**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmslisrpm9qneicb4mcq7v2r958rrc4qs58itk3g_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3i62o71c5h2bs "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**
We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thank you,

House GOP

name: Accountable Tech via Blue Amp Action
subject: Google is tracking who visits abortion clinics… here’s why that’s a problem
body:
Quick signature
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T89368680-b057-43b4-9fe6-c0e2c998d777/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, 24 states have banned abortion or are likely to do so in the coming months.[1] Hundreds of thousands of Americans seek an abortion every year. Our research found that Google still retains location search queries for reproductive care facilities – despite promising otherwise. This is a HUGE problem: Right-wing state governments are increasingly seeking to prosecute people seeking abortions – and even private citizens can sue anyone who aids and abets abortion seekers in states like Oklahoma or Texas. [2] **[Peter, will you join us in calling on Google to protect users’ privacy and delete users’ location data that state governments and private citizens could use to prosecute those seeking reproductive health care →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e43e864-7e42-49f5-bb43-e787a580a8cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfeaab7e6-7112-4fb1-af17-05057498be07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks to previous pressure we put on Google last year, they updated their policy to automatically delete the location data of visits to "particularly personal" locations like counseling centers, domestic violence shelters, abortion clinics, fertility centers, addiction treatment facilities, weight loss clinics, cosmetic surgery clinics, and others.

However, our own research shows that this data is STILL being stored despite Google’s promises, and it could be weaponized by anti-abortion prosecutors and state agents. Reporting from December concluded that location history data related to visiting abortion clinics was stored by Google for months, despite their promises to automatically delete that sensitive data. **[This is unacceptable. Join us in calling on Google to uphold its promise and ADD YOUR NAME to demand Google stop collecting and retaining location data from users.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a16eafa-e6f3-46a1-b02b-0075dfddb664/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks for taking action with us to hold Google accountable, – The Team at Accountable Tech [1] Guttmatcher Institute: [https://www.guttmacher.org/2023/01/six-months-post-roe-24-us-states-have-banned-abortion-or-are-likely-do-so-roundup](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9ce1a76-803e-433d-856b-1d1045f47677/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [2] CNN: [https://www.cnn.com/2022/04/28/politics/oklahoma-heartbeat-act/index.html](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03c75562-56a2-45a7-b44a-f0ab96ffb85b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy.
