name: Rand Paul
subject: my LATEST controversial opinion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
| |
---
| | **ALERT • ALERT • ALERT • ALERT • ALERT **
---
| | **Democrats and Republicans gave the Biden administration the go-ahead to ban anything they see fit!** _[**_STOP BIG GOVERNMENT OVERREACH >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529101:6-xF4FGFN:m:1:3391001263:B30ED2914A3862C48BA3B164B92E5371:r)_
---
| | Peter, House Republicans created a national strategy to _permanently lose elections for a generation_ : Ban TikTok, an app that 94 million - primarily young Americans - use. The TikTok ban strategy comes at a time when the GOP complains about liberal U.S. social media companies canceling and censoring conservatives. It's ironic many of these same "conservatives" now agitate to ban a platform owned by an international group that includes several American investors. **_My issue with an outright ban on this social media platform is the massive BIG GOVERNMENT power grab._**
---
[**STOP BIG GOVERNMENT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529101:6-xF4FGFN:m:1:3391001263:B30ED2914A3862C48BA3B164B92E5371:r)
---
We've already seen what happens when we give the government the power to chip away at our rights, all in the name of doing something "good." _Just look at what happened with the Patriot Act._ We sacrificed our Constitutional rights, gave the green light to a massive government power grab, and _more than 20 years later_ , those rights are STILL thrown by the wayside - and Big Government is using this decades-old piece of legislation to _constantly_ spy on the American people, simply because they can. _[**_PROTECT OUR RIGHTS >>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529101:6-xF4FGFN:m:1:3391001263:B30ED2914A3862C48BA3B164B92E5371:r)_ **This type of power grab gives Joe Biden and his administration the power to ban just about**** _anything_****they label a "threat." And that's the same mentality the CCP has, and it's why speech is severely regulated in China.** Before we ban TikTok, we need to ask ourselves... _[**_Do we REALLY want to emulate China 's speech bans?_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529101:6-xF4FGFN:m:1:3391001263:B30ED2914A3862C48BA3B164B92E5371:r)_
---
| | **_Stand with Rand and against the Big Government power grab that empowers Joe Biden and his administration to ban anything they see fit._**
---
[**STAND WITH RAND: $250**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529100:6-xF4FGFN:m:1:3391001263:B30ED2914A3862C48BA3B164B92E5371:r)
---
[**STAND WITH RAND: $100**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529099:6-xF4FGFN:m:1:3391001263:B30ED2914A3862C48BA3B164B92E5371:r)
---
[**STAND WITH RAND: $50**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529098:6-xF4FGFN:m:1:3391001263:B30ED2914A3862C48BA3B164B92E5371:r)
---
[**STAND WITH RAND: $35**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529097:6-xF4FGFN:m:1:3391001263:B30ED2914A3862C48BA3B164B92E5371:r)
---
[**STAND WITH RAND: ANY AMOUNT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529101:6-xF4FGFN:m:1:3391001263:B30ED2914A3862C48BA3B164B92E5371:r)

---

name: Working Families Party
subject: Your monthly WFP Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
It’s time for the WFP Newsletter, your monthly update on how we’re fighting to build a country where everyone can thrive. | | | **It’s time for the WFP Newsletter, your monthly update on how we’re fighting for the many — and winning.** Read on to learn what we’ve been up to since our last roundup, and how you can take action to keep up the fight.
* * *
**_Election Updates_** Working Families Party activists and supporters threw down in March to help elect Brandon Johnson for Mayor of Chicago and Janet Protasiewicz for Wisconsin Supreme Court. **And the results are in!** **Brandon Johnson beat Republican in disguise Paul Vallas on Tuesday,** a huge upset victory for our movement — and for all Chicagoans looking for strong public schools, good jobs, and communities where everyone can be safe. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhkjyHYqt8H8hDV-_Pd8DlhN4z-pz9keHd1CtmEen-uqiJFJcs97cFM-n3ptbAHKHsapNtEPvQdBL53CnWPWZRnLje1p5bQxBT5XfJLhb0tfNOibeJ_RchAU8j9vfFTl0WEtzeVuUjuNQKcke3PJEj37dEH94uZikclONXz-z1tnttZp48Kmt8Oa9sSacGIiePNUCiMfq_1S14pmtfD3bywQehcwnPYwgwlZun7bpqf1I_Scm4nQFBFg4j5zMuviUiXlu0DPvYoPi2zIx0S1iS-5mMLKc4WXL83cuvFQmQCWd/3v4/OjpYrKqpQ0Gn5kx9M_7xhQ/h0/n1DyvaQ6AK4kMF5sdTKMnfxIlChWUJeE0KdGGdDbI78) **Janet Protasiewicz won her race by double-digits against Dan Kelly,** an anti-abortion extremist who attempted to steal the 2020 election for Donald Trump. Her win flips control of the Wisconsin Supreme Court ahead of key fights around abortion, gerrymandering, and voting rights. We also saw major successes for our down-ballot candidates, with **ten WFP champions elected to local office in Wisconsin and three candidates endorsed by our local partner United Working Families were elected to the Chicago City Council on Tuesday.** Along with endorsed candidates who won their races earlier this year, our movement in Chicago and Wisconsin is growing — and we’re excited to see champions of the working class who will use their power to make our government work for working people. While we are still waiting for full results to come in for Colorado, we are celebrating victories for **Serena Gonzales-Gutierrez** , who won her At-Large Denver City Council seat and **Jamie Torres** who was re-elected to the Denver City Council, and even more CO WFP candidates are expected to make the runoff in June. And just a few weeks ago, **we were proud to help elect Donya Sartor, an alumna of the Bet on Us training program, as the next Mayor of Jonesboro, Georgia.** As a former Special Education teacher for nearly three decades and a progressive voice on the city council, Donya will be a voice for all as the city’s first Black woman mayor. With the Pennsylvania primary right around the corner in May, we’re keeping up the momentum to elect even more amazing leaders — with the help of supporters like you!

**_Spotlight on WFP member Laura Kraemer_** My journey into becoming politically active began with the Barack Obama for President Campaign in 2007. I immediately fell in love with knocking on doors and having one-on-one conversations with my neighbors. When WI voters elected Scott Walker as Governor, I quickly understood the consequences. Act 10 destroyed unions, protected wetlands were given to donors for development, and social programs for our most vulnerable were being stripped away. We needed all WI voters to get informed and get involved to protect our state. In 2023, I saw on social media that WFP was holding a training where I could send a postcard to family members, coworkers, neighbors, and friends. I immediately signed up and after creating "my list," I ended up sending 3000 postcards! All that hard work payed off when I was inundated with texts and posts from family members and friends who received my postcard. And then I received selfies when they voted early or voted on Election Day. WFP made this happen and I think it’s such a valuable way to inform friends about upcoming elections and the candidates who represent our values.

clean_body: It’s time for the WFP Newsletter, your monthly update on how we’re fighting to build a country where everyone can thrive. | | | It’s time for the WFP Newsletter, your monthly update on how we’re fighting for the many — and winning. Read on to learn what we’ve been up to since our last roundup, and how you can take action to keep up the fight. Election Updates Working Families Party activists and supporters threw down in March to help elect Brandon Johnson for Mayor of Chicago and Janet Protasiewicz for Wisconsin Supreme Court. And the results are in! Brandon Johnson beat Republican in disguise Paul Vallas on Tuesday, a huge upset victory for our movement — and for all Chicagoans looking for strong public schools, good jobs, and communities where everyone can be safe. Janet Protasiewicz won her race by double-digits against Dan Kelly, an anti-abortion extremist who attempted to steal the 2020 election for Donald Trump. Her win flips control of the Wisconsin Supreme Court ahead of key fights around abortion, gerrymandering, and voting rights. We also saw major successes for our down-ballot candidates, with ten WFP champions elected to local office in Wisconsin and three candidates endorsed by our local partner United Working Families were elected to the Chicago City Council on Tuesday. Along with endorsed candidates who won their races earlier this year, our movement in Chicago and Wisconsin is growing — and we’re excited to see champions of the working class who will use their power to make our government work for working people. While we are still waiting for full results to come in for Colorado, we are celebrating victories for Serena Gonzales-Gutierrez , who won her At-Large Denver City Council seat and Jamie Torres who was re-elected to the Denver City Council, and even more CO WFP candidates are expected to make the runoff in June. And just a few weeks ago, we were proud to help elect Donya Sartor, an alumna of the Bet on Us training program, as the next Mayor of Jonesboro, Georgia. As a former Special Education teacher for nearly three decades and a progressive voice on the city council, Donya will be a voice for all as the city’s first Black woman mayor. With the Pennsylvania primary right around the corner in May, we’re keeping up the momentum to elect even more amazing leaders — with the help of supporters like you! WFP, Rep. Greg Casar, Bartees Strange, and more make noise at SXSW Last month in Austin, WFP hosted our first show at South by Southwest featuring headliners Rep. Greg Casar and indie rock stars Bartees Strange, Madison McFerrin, and Emmy Meli! We came together and hosted The Politics Stage because we understand that music has always been at the heart of resistance, and that culture shifts politics — not the other way around. Then, read the full review from Rolling Stone: Maurice Mitchell and Anand Giridharadas in Brooklyn WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell joined NYT bestselling author Anand Giridharadas for an exciting conversation about our movement at the Brooklyn Public Library. In the context of Maurice’s article “Building Resilient Organizations: Toward Joy and Durable Power in a Time of Crisis,” and Anand’s new book The Persuaders, the two talked about how we can take action to strengthen our movement, gain support for the policies we need the most, fight disinformation, and win elections. And if you’d like to read more, and or check your local library or bookstore. Endorsement Alert We’re proud to announce our support of Elizabeth Warren as she runs for re-election to the U.S. Senate. Elizabeth is fighting to end Washington corruption, strengthen our democracy, tackle systemic racism, and rebuild the middle class — and we need her leadership in Washington to make the big, structural change that we need. We’re also excited to share our endorsements for local leaders trying to make a change in their cities: for Mayor of Kingston, New York for Mayor of Yonkers, New York for Mayor of Utica, New York for Akron Council At-Large, Ohio for Columbus City Council District 4, Ohio With WFP champions at the helm, we know we can make our communities work for the many, not the few. DEWFP’s Karl Stomberg named Delaware’s second most influential person in politics Delaware Working Families Party Political Director Karl Stomberg has been featured in Delaware Online as the state's second most influential person in politics — right under the Governor! Since joining DEWFP, Karl has been integral to electing WFP champions and building our movement across the state. Here’s what they had to say: “Karl Stomberg has helped build a progressive wave — that doesn't appear to be going away. The Delaware Working Families Party has become a significant player in state elections. During the midterm primaries, four of its General Assembly candidates won their primaries. These new lawmakers' will be key for upcoming legislation, particularly for affordable housing and recreational marijuana.” – Congratulations to Karl, and thank you for the great work! Spotlight on WFP member Laura Kraemer My journey into becoming politically active began with the Barack Obama for President Campaign in 2007. I immediately fell in love with knocking on doors and having one-on-one conversations with my neighbors. When WI voters elected Scott Walker as Governor, I quickly understood the consequences. Act 10 destroyed unions, protected wetlands were given to donors for development, and social programs for our most vulnerable were being stripped away. We needed all WI voters to get informed and get involved to protect our state. In 2023, I saw on social media that WFP was holding a training where I could send a postcard to family members, coworkers, neighbors, and friends. I immediately signed up and after creating "my list," I ended up sending 3000 postcards! All that hard work payed off when I was inundated with texts and posts from family members and friends who received my postcard. And then I received selfies when they voted early or voted on Election Day. WFP made this happen and I think it’s such a valuable way to inform friends about upcoming elections and the candidates who represent our values. Upcoming Events It’s almost time for another WFP Welcome Gathering! Whether you’re brand-new to the party or a longtime WFP member, join the call on Thursday, April 13 at 7 PM ET/4 PM PT to meet people who share your vision of a world where we can thrive, and not just survive — and learn how you can get involved in making that vision a reality. You’re invited to join the new WFP Study Group: Reading for the Revolution! For our second ever meeting on April 27 at 7 PM ET/4 PM PT, we’ll be discussing Prisms of the People: Power & Organizing in Twenty-First-Century America by Hahrie Han, Elizabeth McKenna, and Michelle Oyakawa. Our Tuesday Text Parties are still going strong as we get ready for municipal elections in Pennsylvania, including key races like Helen Gym for Mayor of Philadelphia! RSVP for our next text party on Tuesday, April 18 at 6 PM ET/3 PM PT to help share our message with voters and let them know about the WFP champions on their ballot. Thanks for catching up with us as we reflect on a busy March! But the work isn’t slowing down. To keep up the fight in April and beyond, we need support from people like you. Thank you, All of us at the Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: My condolences
body:
| | |
---
I’m heartbroken, Derek.

On March 24, an explosion at the R.M. Palmer Company candy factory occurred, killing seven people and injuring more. The source of this explosion is under investigation.
When I first heard about the tragedy at the R.M. Palmer factory in West Reading, my heart shattered for our community. My thoughts go out to the victims and their families and the indelible legacies they leave behind. I am also profoundly grateful for the first responders and so many others who answered the call in our community for preventing this from being an even greater tragedy.
In times like this, we’ve already seen the many ways our community comes together. Here is one. If you’d like to support the victims of this tragedy, you can make a donation to the United Way of Berks County, which will distribute the funds to organizations assisting families who lost loved ones in the explosion or who lost their jobs because of the blast. Here’s a good link to give:
[https://bccf.fcsuite.com/erp/donate/create/fund?funit_id=2749](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61406536/399966014/-705878199?funit_id=2749&refcode=jtk811-ot-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTg3MmNiZi1hMmQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JQApS1q6rT1M5bXO5rB1_nVbakRRuNDySotHdQrS3_0=&emci=c10c56f4-bad3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=79872cbf-a2d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)
Thank you,
Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61406538/399966019/-1727112621?refcode=jtk811-ot-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTg3MmNiZi1hMmQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JQApS1q6rT1M5bXO5rB1_nVbakRRuNDySotHdQrS3_0=&emci=c10c56f4-bad3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=79872cbf-a2d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485). name: Adam Frisch
subject: Lauren Boebert's Super PACs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61407596/399966598/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2432-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZjIyNzcyLWEzZDQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eTXQbY9ZFa4ZzFSEGOJpjmYTz-WWpNyCQYJgOwQB4P4=)
Hello,
When I decided to run against Lauren Boebert in 2022, people warned me what would happen. Politics is a “blood sport,” they said. The attacks would get nasty. I tried to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what would come. But I never could have imagined the things that Boebert and her far-right allies would make up and put on TV.

**Now, after we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress (the closest race in the entire country!), the attacks are going to get even nastier. I’m sure of it.******

Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs are going to spend millions running the most ridiculous ads they can attacking me. We have to be ready if we’re going to win.
We set a goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tomorrow, and if the Super PACs sense even one shred of weakness in our fundraising, they’ll pounce with attacks to try to bury us.

We’re just $9,821 away from our goal and what we need to counter the lies and hold Lauren Boebert accountable. But I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to hit this goal and have the resources I need to win:

**[Please, will you split $15 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to help me defeat Lauren Boebert? There couldn’t be a better or more important moment to chip in.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61407597/399966599/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2432-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZjIyNzcyLWEzZDQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eTXQbY9ZFa4ZzFSEGOJpjmYTz-WWpNyCQYJgOwQB4P4=)**

clean_body: | | | = Hello, When I decided to run against Lauren Boebert in 2022, people warned me what would happen. Politics is a “blood sport,” they said. The attacks would get nasty. I tried to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what would come. But I never could have imagined the things that Boebert and her far-right allies would make up and put on TV. Now, after we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress (the closest race in the entire country!), the attacks are going to get even nastier. I’m sure of it.** Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs are going to spend millions running the most ridiculous ads they can attacking me. We have to be ready if we’re going to win. We set a goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tomorrow, and if the Super PACs sense even one shred of weakness in our fundraising, they’ll pounce with attacks to try to bury us. The DCCC listed PA-01 as one of the top battleground districts in play to regain the House majority, so this race will get expensive quickly. That’s why we’re laying the groundwork early to come back stronger with the full force of our grassroots movement.

Here in southeastern Pennsylvania, we’ve witnessed Fitzpatrick fail to look out for working families across PA-01 over and over again.
When the Supreme Court overturned the right to safe, accessible abortion, Fitzpatrick was nowhere to be found and even _defended_ his anti-choice voting record.
After January 6th happened, a day that lawmakers and congressional staff hid under desks, Fitzpatrick turned around and voted against forming the bipartisan January 6 committee.
When struggling families needed relief during a global pandemic and economic recession, Brian Fitzpatrick put partisan politics over people and voted against lifesaving legislation, including the _Inflation Reduction Act_ and _American Rescue Plan._

name: James Comer
subject: Public enemy #1 to the Radical Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is Chairman James Comer:

| |

---
| | | This is Chairman James Comer.

I can't believe how fast I became public enemy #1 of the Radical Democrats.

Joe Biden's Treasury Department is **STONEWALLING** our oversight investigations... Hunter Biden **LAWYERED UP** when I mentioned the word "subpoena"... name: Daniel Cameron
subject: Join Us On April 12th and the Latest from the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Daniel Cameron for Governor
body:
| | | [](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/458dc3696e97f7c2/0cf6328c789a4801c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
| | Friends,

Spring is here and campaign season is heating up! We are just over a month until Election Day and Team Cameron is out in full force all across the Commonwealth.

Next week on April 12 we are hosting a BIG event in Louisville and I hope you will consider joining us! [_**You can get more info here.**_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/458dc3696e97f7c2/341c714045a663b6c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
Here are some highlights from recent weeks and some things to look forward to in the coming days:
---
| |
---
| | Makenze and Daniel have been out campaigning and working hard to earn your vote on Election Day. They have so much energy and so much passion for our Commonwealth! We can't wait to see so many of you in Louisville on April 12th! It is going to be a wonderful gathering of conservatives, patriots, and proud Kentuckians. [_**Click here for more information and to RSVP.**_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/458dc3696e97f7c2/8d9f4735955c6701c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
[](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/458dc3696e97f7c2/69fbcb8051014e76c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
You can also join the campaign at another Meet and Greet in Christian County this Monday. We can't wait to see you!
---
---
| |
---
| | This week Daniel was on Newsmax talking about HB 150 and the veto override to protect the young people of Kentucky from the woke agenda. He did a great job standing for our Kentucky values!

[**Click here to watch the video:**](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/458dc3696e97f7c2/6e78007691c82fb4c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
[](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/458dc3696e97f7c2/9544457700984366c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
| |

subject: the latest threat to consumers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
this is something that is impacting every single American, Peter. | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1e7fa09f6b0c47f38e69e3a205a336be&_e=-Fg4FMCp_EuLfKzYItwBFhcbMH2Yq7LVcyq6xm-eyQDIkW1SyZRrc6VFlmYhI7g4OrQMOcGjn_oNmkTCxvWQsyJeKg4UvmjOwqVat6XVPcBbNaDJsp_AAVjdVD9r7axtZANTectlUAGwvPFoonw1is2Me614QxQoy7llB57A4XmLTJRk5wbthoopztXIFRhFoSPdfGvCqG2IDw9xLDX6tFJ5U0QGKSjFPGilTHFY700lixTSjfeBE8URO9v2y0PTDOhTenC0RNjkJy1wsnMQ-AJ9OSnu27NbZ_jqR8KCB8-jW59WbgE-KrzQyp--O4Vst5ggQ4tafwiXytoaTLH1m7MfLQLq2p4NA2RAacJSu-vTLUTq6nM1HMY7f1kKKIsb)
---
Peter, An international group of financial institutions are trying to push their woke Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) policies on consumers. Their goal is to align lending and investment portfolios with net-zero emissions by 2050, meaning _**YOUR**_**investments – like your 401(K) – are at the mercy of climate alarmists.**
---
[**STOP THE ESG MOVEMENT**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1e7fa09f6b0c47f38e69e3a205a336be&_e=-Fg4FMCp_EuLfKzYItwBFhcbMH2Yq7LVcyq6xm-eyQDIkW1SyZRrc6VFlmYhI7g4OrQMOcGjn_oNmkTCxvWQsyJeKg4UvmjOwqVat6XVPcBbNaDJsp_AAVjdVD9r7axtZANTectlUAGwvPFoonw1is2Me614QxQoy7llB57A4XmLTJRk5wbthoopztXIFRhFoSPdfGvCqG2IDw9xLDX6tFJ5U0QGKSjFPGilTHFY700i0oj9Esq4eAZ89VTnooua9sw7ftuX8GAmGhl-apPJebuy6cWWE10qGu3WjrC2SismFuevYi7ieANuz-UQYla0tM88B2fa6FJvAOe7ItxNCHURfINi-h25-ayywwRlVrAhCUArhaUIsZ6MLoo7MfYL)
---
Pressuring companies to align with a net-zero emissions reduction target isn’t about transparency or maximizing shareholder value. Donate $25, $50 or $100 TODAY and let’s indict the left!")** In the last few days, I spoke out about these issues on 60 Minutes and even Lesley Stahl was appalled by how leftists attack with name calling and use words most of us wouldn't use in polite company. And it didn't stop when I took our cause to New York City in solidarity with other Americans who were disgusted by how the George Soros-backed DA indicted President Trump based on a batch of lies. When I got there, Mayor Eric Adams tried to intimidate me for protesting against the weaponization of our justice system and even had his thugs threaten me with imprisonment. **These leftists don 't seem to understand that I'm not going to be intimidated be the Party of Pedophiles and their allies.** I've been thrown off committees, threatened with violence, mocked by the media and had to fight tooth and nail to overcome legal challenges to remain on the ballot. What else can they do to me? Our nation is only inches away from complete destruction because of their actions, and I'm speaking up because I'm worried for our future and I'm going to make sure that your voice and mine gets heard every day until we reverse the damage caused by the left. **[Will you help me fight back and show these leftists that we won't tolerate the Weaponization of our Government?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529923:Jka2OFG8N:m:1:3365131770:C0864F1D43AA1C930205317A2053C2D8:r "Will you help me fight back and show these leftists that we won’t tolerate the Weaponization of our Government?")** Every time the left tries to attack conservatives, they demonstrate a pattern. They can't tell the truth. The Facts are not on their side. They talk out of both sides of their mouths, and they resort to name-calling. Quite simply, they demonstrate that they're nothing less than bottom feeders who will do anything to perpetuate their agenda at all costs. **We 've seen it with Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden and now Alvin Bragg.** They turn the other cheek to crime and the indoctrination of our children, and then call us names for exposing them. **[If you refuse to be intimidated by the left, then help me fight back! Donate at least $50 or ANY AMOUNT you can afford today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529924:Jka2OFG8N:m:1:3365131770:C0864F1D43AA1C930205317A2053C2D8:r "If you refuse to be intimidated by the left, then help me fight
back! Donate at least $50 or ANY AMOUNT you can afford today!")** Our nation's enemies are spying on us every day due to Brandon's incompetence and the left's leaders want to focus on punishing their political opponents, ignoring the fentanyl crisis and passing more spending bills during bad economic times. They think they are winning and that we won't fight back. **Quite frankly, they think we 're all suckers.** That's why I need your help to show Biden's hordes of criminal first, America last, pedophile supporters that we're taking our country back. **[Stand with me in this fight against the left's tyranny and let's Save America together!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62529923:Jka2OFG8N:m:1:3365131770:C0864F1D43AA1C930205317A2053C2D8:r "Stand with me in this fight against the left’s tyranny
and let’s Save America together!")** For our Future, Marjorie Taylor Greene

every state must fight tooth and nail to hold and pick up seats in every election across the country.")**

**A leftwing activist Wisconsin Supreme Court alone gets Democrats one step closer to:**
* REVERSING election integrity measures put in place after the 2020 election
* Enabling WOKE teachers to poison children's minds with Leftist insanity

Here at State Republicans headquarters, we're doing everything we can to STOP the Radical Left from grabbing seats. __But the truth is, we cannot fight this battle alone. We need your help!__

name: Team IDCCA
subject: 7th Annual IDCCA / NDTC Bootcamp 5/20
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
How you can run an effective Democratic campaign or organization:

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/S9BnvbQK_iflXgz-E1EF_DnVe68bD1QmtpkLzh0shx8=/kqNLYChcaVBwMJ93JfkURei6WNTOYK_qTKA-FVlzZnA=)

Fellow Democrats,

Six years ago, the IDCCA & the National Democratic Training Committee partnered to develop the first-ever candidate Boot Camp in Illinois. Since then, our annual event has expanded to include Party leadership, grassroots volunteers, and campaign staff training. It has grown into one of the largest learning opportunities, as well as networking opportunities, in the state for Democrats. It has produced over 150 alumni who have been elected to public office and countless leaders populated throughout the state building the Party.

We're excited to announce the next IDCCA / NDTC Bootcamp will be **Saturday, May 20th, from 9 am - 4 pm. This year 's Boot Camp will be held in-person in the Bloomington / Normal area.**

**[The deadline to apply is April 28, but don't wait too long! Capacity is limited. If you're interested, apply ASAP to make sure you secure your chance at a spot.](https://act.myngp.com/el/S9BnvbQK_iflXgz-E1EF_DnVe68bD1QmtpkLzh0shx8=/kqNLYChcaVBwMJ93JfkURei6WNTOYK_qTKA-FVlzZnA=)**
[**APPLY NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/S9BnvbQK_iflXgz-E1EF_DnVe68bD1QmtpkLzh0shx8=/kqNLYChcaVBwMJ93JfkURei6WNTOYK_qTKA-FVlzZnA=) If you're running for office or thinking about it, working on a campaign, or working with your local Democratic Party, this full-day training will provide the tools, skills, and insight you need to succeed. You'll learn things like how to raise money, how to calculate a win number, how to craft a compelling message, how to expand your reach through digital media, and more.

**[If you're interested in learning to excel in any of these roles, we hope you'll join us for the next IDCCA Bootcamp on May 20th. Click now to apply early and secure your chance to get in! ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/S9BnvbQK_iflXgz-E1EF_DnVe68bD1QmtpkLzh0shx8=/kqNLYChcaVBwMJ93JfkURei6WNTOYK_qTKA-FVlzZnA=)**

[**APPLY NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/S9BnvbQK_iflXgz-E1EF_DnVe68bD1QmtpkLzh0shx8=/kqNLYChcaVBwMJ93JfkURei6WNTOYK_qTKA-FVlzZnA=) Thank you,

Team IDCCA

Friend,
I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved - to hear that I could face **136 YEARS IN PRISON** for having committed **NO CRIME**.
But I did not sit there feeling sorry for myself.
I felt sorry for our country - because this is _NOT_ America.
Let me assure you - I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_**These attacks confirm how much hangs in the balance in the 2024 election.**_
Winning in 2024 is about more than just an election. It's about the survival of our Free Republic.

clean_body: Our country is dying, but we will save it! | | | Friend, I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved - to hear that I could face 136 YEARS IN PRISON for having committed NO CRIME. But I did not sit there feeling sorry for myself. I felt sorry for our country - because this is NOT America. Let me assure you - I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! These attacks confirm how much hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. Winning in 2024 is about more than just an election. It's about the survival of our Free Republic. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America. ** Trump Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219 ** Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: Many Democratic incumbents stand in the way of progress.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi, Peter! It’s
Geoff again, campaigns director at Justice Democrats.

Our goal is to transform Congress into a body that fights for the working
class, communities of color, and all marginalized people. Many Democratic
incumbents actually stand in the way of that, and we're not afraid to call
them out and challenge them.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132941?refcode=em20230406-28350&t=1001&akid=28350%2E1203867%2EVzC_YF ]We’re honing in on five potential targets to primary in 2024, but we
urgently need your support. Will you please contribute $3
right now to help make sure we have the resources to primary entrenched
incumbents?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132941?refcode=em20230406-28350&t=1020&akid=28350%2E1203867%2EVzC_YF ]Contribute $3

We often challenge older, white, male incumbents who are out of touch with
their districts.

For example, one of our possible target incumbents takes hundreds of
thousands of dollars from big pharma, Wall Street, and the healthcare
industry — in a district where Bernie Sanders did quite well in the 2020
presidential primary! Those two facts just don't add up.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132941?refcode=em20230406-28350&t=1021&akid=28350%2E1203867%2EVzC_YF ]If you think that we should challenge this entrenched incumbent and
take on big pharma and Wall Street, rush a contribution of
$3 right now.

I deeply appreciate everything you’re doing to support our work to recruit
and elect more progressive leaders like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.

Thank you so much,

Geoffrey Simpson
Campaigns Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=28350%2E1203867%2EVzC_YF ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=28350%2E1203867%2EVzC_YF ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230406-28350-footer&t=1024&refcode2=28350_1203867_VzC_YF&akid=28350%2E1203867%2EVzC_YF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=28350%2E1203867%2EVzC_YF

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Public enemy #1 to the Radical Democrats

body:
This is Chairman James Comer:

| |

---
| | | This is Chairman James Comer.

I can't believe how fast I became public enemy #1 of the Radical Democrats.

Joe Biden's Treasury Department is **STONEWALLING** our oversight investigations... Hunter Biden **LAWYERED UP** when I mentioned the word "subpoena"... The Liberal Media is **SMEARING** my name across the airwaves... Pete Buttigieg just **ATTACKED** me on social media when I discussed a probe into his agency...

_**[After all the corruption, scandals, and cover-ups by Radical Democrats that we're exposing, I won't let them intimidate me into silence. But I need your help to fight back. So I'm personally asking everyone getting this email to stand with House Republicans by chipping in JUST five bucks a piece.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=45d6a0d4ef354bc0961e0c7075895692&_e=QblqWaVE3DiJX-qOdL3dfIB5EAOKsRZmJMMyh5EmH9pCZ6rNaKTPlRHy8KPKy2q1BrO9_o5NX36DwRUJhRC9Fk0humvspr4Esr5Wrql8NRsobPgpfyXJU7shhRRo06zXGUydxEcgL_Iz-c5-XXa7ecgve8pKxJ3vu5F7iFUMbRcm8nlk_ixwM0DMLKRTAKMYuGmNmVGHVz-BZQERw-HUrakD-7x9R2Xb_ZtxchwoUKH-vOfnRrlR2eCeAxnbjUbYW3F10nZ-vivk_Zw819oW_VEgTSI7fAD3EPQDCupzWQBqeAX-YM2JN6fS_fkIprgbYjAxOR50dQdSFOKbt-NRBO3_69JlKVUyqPLPnVKzDibu9RXxgUBOz19VASBo61AkprcWdvg0CtUDRtBVkhKUmLSroCFE7IJ9TudcLMM1XuH8M2iF0i6x52CFio8VT5lVHJGlIDuIFXSSwye1N-TuvA%3D%3D "After all the corruption, scandals, and cover-ups by Radical Democrats that we’ve begun exposing, I won’t let them intimidate me into silence. But I need your help to fight back. So I’m personally asking everyone getting this email to stand with House Republicans by chipping in JUST five bucks a piece. ")**_

It's no surprise they're desperate to stop our important work...

They've been let off the hook for YEARS with Nancy Pelosi in charge of accountability. Biden and the Radical Democrats were NEVER forced to answer for anything.

No one held them accountable... and they took full advantage.

**As the GOP 's lead investigator, I promise you they will now. **

But going up against the Liberal powers at be is a monumental undertaking. They've tried trashing my reputation, jamming up my investigations, and threatening our House Majority. The only thing that can stop them is the power of our ENTIRE grassroots standing up and fighting back.

_**[Are you with me? clean_body: This is Chairman James Comer: | | | | | This is Chairman James Comer. I can't believe how fast I became public enemy #1 of the Radical Democrats. Joe Biden's Treasury Department is STONEWALLING our oversight investigations... Hunter Biden LAWYERED UP when I mentioned the word "subpoena"... The Liberal Media is SMEARING my name across the airwaves... Pete Buttigieg just ATTACKED me on social media when I discussed a probe into his agency... "After all the corruption, scandals, and cover-ups by Radical Democrats that we’ve begun exposing, I won’t let them intimidate me into silence. But I need your help to fight back. So I’m personally asking everyone getting this email to stand with House Republicans by chipping in JUST five bucks a piece. " It's no surprise they're desperate to stop our important work... They've been let off the hook for YEARS with Nancy Pelosi in charge of accountability. Biden and the Radical Democrats were NEVER forced to answer for anything. No one held them accountable... and they took full advantage. As the GOP 's lead investigator, I promise you they will now. But going up against the Liberal powers at be is a monumental undertaking. They've tried trashing my reputation, jamming up my investigations, and threatening our House Majority. The only thing that can stop them is the power of our ENTIRE grassroots standing up and fighting back. "Are you with me? I’m counting on it. subject: RE: “136 YEARS IN PRISON, maximum sentence”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Our country is dying, but we will save it!

| | | [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ea4be2538a142529dd16d25bb2909aa&_e=LFL7i9NZbuI9R9rfU0ZDdkSYwOGooMCT3909ky3_OF6U6P2q4bsSqGmbaoCqN0SeZzYqzpllF-8kGahUpbkq_OIAYp9kgI-E7BmsU6TBhhnz4tVe64106quFKwDAgKX_ihokpL6DoxatDImuwvF3-bAmaeTJd0lUT0eZWFbWlLwg0gEMQ-Ee6n6c70Q3Ljv-8f__56tNHLnRauSl4i57YUmOnpGCCKKfyi1CmiHOntXVHcxrWt3tXyiZIdZMQD-D4j3mt_hdHcnhn8pQNapdvzWz5B1Wwh04NE6GPYVvdNOXLq2Z3M_T0ECgU0fO7Si5v5X2xib-71cyS5b0rzeNam2h4ql_qiSVkrPGQ4XsuJqWGCB7zDYANOn8l0jysyzLBFrPn42UpywZzcx12fmLLg%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved - to hear that I could face **136 YEARS IN PRISON** for having committed **NO CRIME**.
But I did not sit there feeling sorry for myself.
I felt sorry for our country - because this is _NOT_ America.
Let me assure you - I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_**These attacks confirm how much hangs in the balance in the 2024 election.**_
Winning in 2024 is about more than just an election. It's about the survival of our Free Republic.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ea4be2538a142529dd16d25bb2909aa&_e=LFL7i9NZbuI9R9rfU0ZDdkSYwOGooMCT3909ky3_OF6U6P2q4bsSqGmbaoCqN0SeZzYqzpllF-8kGahUpbkq_OIAYp9kgI-E7BmsU6TBhhnz4tVe64106quFKwDAgKX_ihokpL6DoxatDImuwvF3-bAmaeTJd0lUT0eZWFbWlLwg0gEMQ-Ee6n6c70Q3Ljv-8f__56tNHLnRauSl4i57YUmOnpGCCKKfyi1CmiHOntXVHcxrWt3tXyiZIdZMQD-DqZic38uhHdMgPgz4hOj3-kxMMPpNKonh_C_SnrdExwtwIe236_MvQezb2poQA5JLSa7zW7Ncl-nNyLkcgfIK4Xzz-LPSrLAoflI4oXf9DoneYoOuRoZP7WlCaI_BxNnXvgOn8Qd5y-0KhAkf5HGt_A%3D%3D)**

body:

| | **UPDATE: North Carolina Democratic Rep. Tricia Cotham just switched her party affiliation to Republican – giving the GOP a veto-proof supermajority mid-session.** This is a big deal – Rep. Cotham represents a district President Biden won by **+20 points.** By switching parties, she’s rejecting her constituents’ vote in November for Democratic representation while putting abortion access, voting rights, and so much more at risk. **With a supermajority in both chambers, Republicans’ extremism will be left unchecked.** But we can’t lose hope: Seats like these can be flipped, which means we can break up Republican supermajorities, loosen the GOP’s grip on our statehouses, and defend our democracy against their extreme agenda. **We need the full support of our grassroots community right now – will you step up today?** [Chip in $7 right now to build Democratic power and defend our democracy against the GOP’s far-right agenda >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OGdQ82igNM2WL_2qAY00M-bC5iAGRwmOsJeWDSsySVrTb9hLwKq2MM4MPu3090HnU0Cy6iDLidElQfGHXA4yJAmgKvCGPgrLjx2HMR88LHSxt_jhy6RXpgqA92D_AvUMfdVdgkdcKBYC3V37n345vDtR3SYu5OOt8bE6SB0ED4ThRuNcmLGstl8XLiUDKUhR63vDf9u9m8dXYK0ultFtifL2i2go4kDd_VBC_FlHksjp4vL9JZV7_uza8gkCmr0capxTVgAqbHejgFPi0l3K9HkvnWzmkP2JTz0d4vSGzzqIDe5NuHGWvtcuLN3nwnudrxCuNMr2rqgFsOmBPTZztM6q4FGs0OcDG9PXBIZpYge42CFNPC9TbaW-t_oh3dHF19k1FwiRKRfT7im9H_1OJIs/3v4/LKcGt7DEQk-1T7FA8kuJKQ/h0/rZ8UfF3HlmjFrh1c9HYxdUoxulwXcEWUIA9cert5YsE) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

We can’t let this news out of North Carolina discourage us – Democrats are making huge strides at the state level, following our historic midterm year with wins in over a dozen key special elections so far this year. **Keeping our momentum right now is mission-critical.**

clean_body: North Carolina Democratic Rep. Tricia Cotham just switched her party affiliation to Republican | | | | | UPDATE: North Carolina Democratic Rep. Tricia Cotham just switched her party affiliation to Republican – giving the GOP a veto-proof supermajority mid-session. This is a big deal – Rep. Cotham represents a district President Biden won by +20 points. By switching parties, she’s rejecting her constituents’ vote in November for Democratic representation while putting abortion access, voting rights, and so much more at risk. With a supermajority in both chambers, Republicans’ extremism will be left unchecked. But we can’t lose hope: Seats like these can be flipped, which means we can break up Republican supermajorities, loosen the GOP’s grip on our statehouses, and defend our democracy against their extreme agenda. We need the full support of our grassroots community right now – will you step up today? | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We can’t let this news out of North Carolina discourage us – Democrats are making huge strides at the state level, following our historic midterm year with wins in over a dozen key special elections so far this year. Keeping our momentum right now is mission-critical. But we need to mobilize now to continue giving state Democrats the resources they need to defeat their extreme opponents, block Republican supermajorities, and expand our Democratic power in statehouses nationwide. – Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz to the deciding seat on Wisconsin's Supreme Court, and commentators around the country pointed to the many small-dollar donations as key in not allowing Kelly's billionaire and corporate donors to determine the outcome of this race. That means donors like you made it possible!
body:
So much good news this week!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tffada42c-d4e3-4abd-a347-bf486f331f34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Well, as you must know by now, WE DID IT! ** [We elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz to the deciding seat on Wisconsin's Supreme Court, with HUGE implications for our country.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T573a5e76-dac7-42ae-bed7-94337644f2be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We protected WI's electoral votes from future Trumpist plots to steal them. Yet,[ we did so much more](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49680512-9dc8-4d6d-b0ee-13e97cd08706/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), as commentators around the country pointed to the many small-dollar donations as key in not allowing Kelly's billionaire and corporate donors to determine the outcome of this race.
**_That. Was You. Seriously, take a bow!_** I could tell you about it, [but I devoted a video at our sister org](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted92b643-716f-4f11-91a9-eb3e60e6c3a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)\--[the Blue Amp Channel on Youtube](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ba7e0df-3460-4bf3-b884-29b2970b16f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)\--to not only Judge Protasiewicz' overwhelming 11% thumping of Kelly, but what it portends for 2024. [Please watch, like, share, tell us what you think in the comments and SUBSCRIBE to the channel, as it only makes Blue Amp Action stronger!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6f59660-9f75-4876-8afa-e356cfb54641/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) There's a lot more going on this week, as you also probably know. [A former "President" getting indicted or something?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc47e0092-ef7a-439d-b710-68b3ad3812e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) See below in our latest addition of... **_The Blue Amp Action Blue Letter!_** * 🔥🔥[How The Devastating Trump Indictment is much worse for him, and the GOP](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b5fe5d9-b74f-497d-8c3d-b1da8154830c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) than they thought. [Find out more here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf1e50ddd-fa0b-4999-aaa8-b663f56c38a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): [bit.ly/3GmogY6](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb760444a-4e21-412d-a714-431ec6dd604b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * 🔥🔥 [How The Devastating Trump Indictment is much worse for him and the GOP](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c1d714d-60b9-461b-9e46-45bd28135383/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) than they thought, Part II. [Find out more here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7315c3e-0349-4b46-b0da-3d42f1c56abd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): [bit.ly/3Kdizgp](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25983e5a-8d85-4997-81b9-2ef31c63cead/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) *👍🔥**Blue Amp Action's expanding! Sponsors, newsletters, petitions, fundraisers! [Would you consider supporting us with a donation to continue providing the best damn community possible?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac255d13-2c39-400c-a700-37991646b6b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thanks!** ******************* **👍 ****👍 ****Have you [v](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4147e4bf-a4fe-46e6-96f2-f5cbce1ac532/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[**isited our sponsor, Dissent Pins?** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd6297fc-03be-4aef-97b4-35de936044f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**Need a **["Mazel Tough" t-shirt or "No One's Treading On You, Sweetie?" pin?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T194f350f-96ed-4757-a967-e17e35f3495a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** ** **You can find it all & more [at Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e95a7ee-261e-4df0-8027-9d54c3d61393/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!** ******************* * 😠😠 Then there's Marjorie Taylor Greene (MTG).[ _60 Minutes_ humiliated itself](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a3b4061-d384-417b-ada5-687fb964cfac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), giving her an interview to repeat her hate, lies & conspiracies. [I discussed it w/ Stephanie Miller](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc70fddcf-f82f-470c-9425-fe6264d49a93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * 😠😠 [Some future suggestions for 60 Minutes](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f444e0f-34a0-4474-ad69-5e44a12d6273/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) based on that[ sterling choice of MTG as interviewee](https://default.salsalabs.org/T36c1e324-43a1-48e7-b839-180fa2073988/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): [bit.ly/40SzEDl](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e514415-d57c-47af-93aa-c3e86704373c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Have a great rest of your week. Thanks again for being a big part of our huge win in Wisconsin! And for being a part of the Blue Amp Action community! Cliff PS: 👍🔥Blue Amp Action's expanding! Sponsors, newsletters, petitions, fundraisers! [Would you consider supporting us with a donation to continue providing the best damn community possible?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7a821b0-27d9-4213-9be6-40a44896c86b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks! PPS: [Subscribe to the Blue Amp Channel on Youtube!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8df97b04-a01c-44d1-806b-219c212b59b6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!! [Donate To Blue Amp Action!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7cf5d585-79b2-4ea1-ad18-022aeaa165bb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Get OUTSTANDING merch **[at Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0155a888-d8cb-45da-b228-854e1ca88173/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Follow [@cliffschecter on Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70571a87-aa28-4f6a-a854-d97dd17118a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/newsletterapril62023-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T46d8e5ae-d96d-4a7b-9275-9a27920b8043/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
|
---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_" The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528967:6h020FG4N:m:1:3331421248:61B2A1CD7A6DBF6990326AB486C09D35:r "Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**
**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62528967:6h020FG4N:m:1:3331421248:61B2A1CD7A6DBF6990326AB486C09D35:r "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**
We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thank you,

House GOP

name: Team Cori
subject: Survey for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We need your feedback before we finalize our plans for the next three months.
#
Peter, could we have a minute of your time?
It’s the start of a brand new quarter, and Cori is laser-focused on organizing inside and outside of Congress for the people-centered policies we need.
In all of our work, we want to make sure we’re aligned with folks like you — the people who make up our movement, so we need your feedback before we finalize our plans for the next three months. **That’s why we’re reaching out:**
**Will you take our survey and share what you think our #1 priority should be for Q2? Click on the button that corresponds with your #1 priority to share your answer.**
**[Housing for All](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230406.lPjutB&refcode=em20230406-2464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2464%2E1082990%2EmodGZx)**
Cori knows what it’s like to be unhoused, living out of her car with her two small children while working a full-time job — and she brings that experience with her to Congress every single day. She is leading the fight to make sure that every single person is able to have shelter and safety by declaring that housing is a human right — and since getting elected, she’s refused to let anyone forget it.
**[Environmental Justice](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230406.lPjutB&refcode=em20230406-2464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2464%2E1082990%2EmodGZx)**
The climate crisis threatens us all, and will disproportionately impact our nation’s most vulnerable populations. Cori introduced the Green New Deal for Cities in 2021 to fund an expansive array of community-based climate and environmental justice jobs and projects — including wind power procurement, clean water infrastructure, and air quality monitoring — by giving funding directly to city, state, local, indigenous, and territorial governments.
**[Economic Justice](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230406.lPjutB&refcode=em20230406-2464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2464%2E1082990%2EmodGZx)**
Regular, everyday people are being left behind by a system which prioritizes the whims of the rich over the basic, human needs of our communities. Whether it’s wage stagnation, inflation, or the exploitation of people at the pump — Cori’s taking action. She’s been fighting for at least a $15 minimum wage since well before she stepped foot in the People’s House. Last Congress, she voted to increase the minimum wage and for the PRO Act to protect workers' rights to unionize.
**[Medicare for All](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230406.lPjutB&refcode=em20230406-2464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2464%2E1082990%2EmodGZx)**
As a registered nurse and someone who knows personally the consequence of being forced into immoral debt simply for seeking out and receiving needed medical care, Cori believes that health care is a human right. No one should be denied health care based on age, gender, ability to pay, or health status/pre-existing condition. She is leading towards joining every other industrialized nation and passing Medicare for All.
**[Protecting the Right to Vote](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230406.lPjutB&refcode=em20230406-2464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2464%2E1082990%2EmodGZx)**
Our democracy is under attack by Republican state legislatures across the country, members of Congress, and others holding federal office. It’s on us to take action to make sure that every single person has the right to vote and to be able to participate in our democracy.
**[Reproductive Freedom](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230406.lPjutB&refcode=em20230406-2464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=2464%2E1082990%2EmodGZx)**
Abortion care is health care and health care is a human right. Yet, across the nation, our reproductive freedom is under attack. In this moment of crisis, we must take action at the state and national levels to codify reproductive rights into law.
**[Transforming Public Safety](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230406.lPjutB&refcode=em20230406-2464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=2464%2E1082990%2EmodGZx)**
Cori is working to keep children and our entire community safe in the face of a gun violence epidemic that’s built on top of the pandemic of preventable poverty. With the People's Response Act, we’re seeking to fund systems of preventative care, mental health resources, community and gun violence intervention programs, and supporting survivors of the current system through legislation like Cori’s Helping Families Heal Act.
**All of these issues — and so much more — need to be addressed by the 118th Congress this year, and each is a key priority for Cori.** We’re eager to hear which of these pressing issues is front of mind for you, Peter.
In solidarity,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230406?refcode=em20230406-2464-footer&t=8&refcode2=2464_1082990_modGZx&akid=2464%2E1082990%2EmodGZx) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=9&akid=2464%2E1082990%2EmodGZx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=2464%2E1082990%2EmodGZx)

clean_body: History will remember Donald Trump not only as the first president to be impeached twice, but the first president to be charged with a crime. | | | Friend, I’ve been a leader in the fight to impeach Trump since day one in Congress, and the work we did to impeach him helped build the accountability that got us here: with Trump facing felony charges. The law has finally caught up with twice-impeached Donald Trump and his corrupt, reckless behavior. Let’s mark this historic moment and continue the fight for justice, equity, and accountability. Remember: No one is above the law, no matter how rich or powerful they are. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We still have work to do. Over 150 Congressmembers betrayed our country in January 2021 when they refused to certify the votes of the American people — attempting to overturn the results of a legitimate election so an authoritarian could stay in power. In service, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Rashida Date: Wed, Apr 5, 2023 Subject: No one is above the law To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Yesterday, twice-impeached former President Donald Trump faced 34 felony criminal charges around his illegal attempts to pay hush money to women (and cover it up) during his 2016 campaign. History will remember Donald Trump not only as the first president to be impeached twice, but the first president to be charged with a crime. Because of Rashida Tlaib’s unwavering leadership and commitment to this accountability early on, Trump didn’t get away with his lawlessness, and she made sure of that. She led the fight to impeach Trump in the House, and succeeded—twice. In 2016, in response to Trump’s proposed Muslim ban, Rashida protested at his speech at the Detroit Economic Club, demanding he read the Constitution and noting that his plans for a Muslim ban were unconstitutional. In 2019, in her first months in Congress, she introduced a resolution to impeach Donald Trump. Even though Trump consistently proved that he was a lawless president and unfit for public office, Democratic leaders told us it was politically impossible to impeach him. They didn’t want to risk the potential blowback. But Rashida kept fighting, working alongside grassroots movements to shift what was possible in order to do what was right. Despite right-wing hate and threats from Trump, Rashida did not give up. Together, we followed through on that promise to impeach the corrupt and treasonous former president. Twice. The fight for accountability is not over: This trial and other criminal investigations will continue over the next year. Trump must also be held to account for conspiring to overturn an election, inciting a fascist insurrection, and fueling white supremacist violence. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | The violence, destruction, and oppression of Trumpism will not end until we as a country do the hard work of reckoning with white supremacy and finally building a government that serves all of us. It wasn’t just Trump who spent months spreading vile lies about the election he lost, attempting to disenfranchise Black voters in particular. More than 150 congressional Republicans attempted to overturn the results of 2020’s legitimate election. And now, even more right-wing state lawmakers (including another fascist Republican presidential candidate) are rapidly translating hateful rhetoric into local policy — banning books and undermining our rights to bodily autonomy, voting, gender expression, and more. We’re watching them follow the fascist playbook, which means our work is even more urgent. name: Our Revolution
subject: Impeach Clarence Thomas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

In new bombshell reporting from Pro Publica,
Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas was exposed for taking 20 years'
worth of expensive vacations on yachts and other luxury travel from
right-wing billionaire Harlan Crow -- all without disclosing anything.

In addition to being a Republican mega donor, Harlan Crow has also given
to corporate Democrats like Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin and funded
organizations controlled by Clarence's wife, Ginni -- who was heavily
involved with the election denial campaign that led to January 6th.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/impeach-thomas?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230406_FR_ImpeachThomas_0_12MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_ImpeachThomas&t=1011&akid=4185%2E5885482%2EhUrrJJ ]Clarence Thomas' failure to disclose these massive gifts undermines our
judicial system and the rule of law. Add your name to demand Democrats
begin impeachment proceedings against Clarence Thomas to remove him from
the Supreme Court!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/impeach-thomas?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230406_FR_ImpeachThomas_0_12MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_ImpeachThomas&t=1012&akid=4185%2E5885482%2EhUrrJJ ]IMPEACH THOMAS

These revelations about Clarence Thomas are far from surprising. Still,
they offer a window into how the economic elite use their wealth and power
to skew the justice and political system in their favor.

Funding extravagant trips for Justice Thomas allowed Harlan Crow and
others who joined their vacations access to a Supreme Court justice with
the power to make judicial precedents and rule on cases directly related
to their businesses.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/impeach-thomas?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230406_FR_ImpeachThomas_0_12MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_ImpeachThomas&t=1013&akid=4185%2E5885482%2EhUrrJJ ]Clarence Thomas is an active threat to our democracy and must be
removed from the Supreme Court immediately. Sign here if you agree!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

The RNC may require presidential candidates to reach a grassroots donor benchmark to participate in debates! That means without YOUR support, Nikki Haley could be disqualified.

Make no mistake, the Washington establishment would love nothing more than to knock her down from this key campaign platform. And if Nikki is silenced, the Washington establishment wins. | We want to keep you in the loop on any of the changes we make at AZ Dems.

Earlier this year, we introduced you to our new Chair, and you welcomed her by showing your grassroots support for the party. **[Well, we have a new Executive Director, and we hope you can congratulate her with the same support.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xTerfBqG0VHddyZFF79qWDNs30TdVXmBmVR88-88TM7keoBgqOCpNzMhvF0qTJGwYVrb34IGa_f9MkeuHhnz87bwMdZKxaVJMbocFtQkqCsFyVIjOZPqaVZKLzFw9QtjYVT1OZ5k5lEplqMdw1dQKrCgTD8jjFXbR9ZfwWjw4CZCX1QzygVJ1OtQJow-E9An4n0qx-8c056aulMvQ4MUa7tVFm7WUQA92vdO2L_nBJxRB45G5AAWrEDsUKBqDHJtwIhbn1si3fZ1u8TGC-Q4-CubKCXrC0W_F6lyo3LLibsPJVZLEap8Th_vMLH6o0osXtXYy7y7fPynHRGle3n_mZslFM6qcd1p_leMxjhRQKamtIyy1_tpo7VcHiIW9lDsCkTz3VzwjTFpFImljq6Vws/3v4/EZl5oGpcSvu-fyUtdjJ2Mw/h1/uJoX3lB5nTPJcOKu-40FuzoxChArlbY7OPE8RRPXvT4)**

| | Are you ready to roll up your sleeves and join the fight, Peter? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61414881/399989349/541775293?sourceid=1048869&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzBjNDJlMy1iOGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eC3JUO9gYJ_geDERLMAAOXxsqciMSspEmvaOp_eI9ZU=&emci=15f0d4fd-b6d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=930c42e3-b8d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **Peter, the fight to protect the Senate will be an uphill battle.**

With a 51-49 split and 23 Democratic seats up for election this cycle, it's no surprise the race for the Senate majority is already a toss up according to _Sabato's Crystal Ball_.

The support of this millions-strong community was an integral part in ensuring Republicans were unable to take total control of Congress last cycle. Let's be clear — this election season will be tough, but that's why the support of this community now is more important than ever.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61414882/399989350/541775293?sourceid=1048869&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzBjNDJlMy1iOGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eC3JUO9gYJ_geDERLMAAOXxsqciMSspEmvaOp_eI9ZU=&emci=15f0d4fd-b6d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=930c42e3-b8d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) We won't sugarcoat it, Peter: The numbers are intimidating. Democrats are defending more than twice as many Senate seats as Republicans this cycle. Despite expanding our majority last cycle, Democrats still only have a razor-thin, one-seat majority.

But here's the thing — pundits and analysts predicted (and history implied) that Republicans would flip both chambers of Congress last year. Thanks to the hard work of Democratic pro-choice women and the support of millions of activists and voters (like you!), we defied the odds.

The numbers may seem daunting, but we've made history before, and we can do it again. That's why we need to focus our efforts and put our support behind the women we know can get it done as early as possible. ****Peter, are you ready to roll up your sleeves and join the fight? Donate now to support the Democratic pro-choice women committed to holding the line and defeating anti-choice Republicans in 2024:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Women-Win-April23](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61414889/399989357/541775293?sourceid=1048869&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzBjNDJlMy1iOGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eC3JUO9gYJ_geDERLMAAOXxsqciMSspEmvaOp_eI9ZU=&emci=15f0d4fd-b6d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=930c42e3-b8d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaign team

clean_body: | | | Are you ready to roll up your sleeves and join the fight, Peter? Peter, the fight to protect the Senate will be an uphill battle. With a 51-49 split and 23 Democratic seats up for election this cycle, it's no surprise the race for the Senate majority is already a toss up according to Sabato's Crystal Ball. The support of this millions-strong community was an integral part in ensuring Republicans were unable to take total control of Congress last cycle. Let's be clear — this election season will be tough, but that's why the support of this community now is more important than ever. We won't sugarcoat it, Peter: The numbers are intimidating. Democrats are defending more than twice as many Senate seats as Republicans this cycle. Despite expanding our majority last cycle, Democrats still only have a razor-thin, one-seat majority. But here's the thing — pundits and analysts predicted (and history implied) that Republicans would flip both chambers of Congress last year. Thanks to the hard work of Democratic pro-choice women and the support of millions of activists and voters (like you!), we defied the odds. The numbers may seem daunting, but we've made history before, and we can do it again. That's why we need to focus our efforts and put our support behind the women we know can get it done as early as possible. **Peter, are you ready to roll up your sleeves and join the fight? Donate now to support the Democratic pro-choice women committed to holding the line and defeating anti-choice Republicans in 2024: Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaign team ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Andy Kim
subject: Gun violence is not inevitable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61414980/399989626/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWE3MDkyNS1iOWQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aLmwDyMbWlW1M1lb3eR_iRreZaeucVejEYwt-Dpvb2c=&emci=2400e499-b0d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=09a70925-b9d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389)
---

| | With our news cycle quickly moving from one thing to the next, it is easy to become distracted from or desensitized to the threat of gun violence. We must resist this and keep our focus on what really matters. **It's only April, and our country has already endured 141 mass shootings, 13 of them in our schools.** Just last week, three children were killed at a Nashville elementary school. _These numbers are terrifying_. **We've had more mass shootings than**** _days_****in 2023. And on average, we've had a school shooting**** _every_****week.** Yet Republican-led states like Florida make it _easier_ to carry a concealed firearm. While I respect the 2nd Amendment, it clearly doesn't call for a citizenry armed to the teeth with weapons of horrifying power. It also doesn't specify that we can't do anything, that any protections against weapons of war is wrong or against the Constitution, that Congress can only shrug and say "we're not going to fix it," like a Republican colleague of mine did. When I hear suggestions of fully-armed schools and an ever-increasing number of private citizens secretly carrying guns, I am worried. There were armed school staff at the Covenant school in Nashville, and it did nothing to stop the deaths of innocent children. **I reject the flawed notion that gun violence is inevitable in our country. We as leaders only enable it with inaction. No more.** Last summer, I was proud to vote for the first bipartisan gun violence prevention legislation in nearly 30 years, expanding background checks for firearm purchases. But it's not enough. **We must pass comprehensive commonsense gun violence prevention legislation now.** In Congress, I will continue fighting for a society where our children can grow up in peace and where we settle our differences with debate, free from the gun violence that has become all too common. _Andy_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.
---
