name: Michael Bennet
subject: Here's what I'm doing next to fight for abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
Become a citizen cosponsor of the EACH Act |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61415066/399990141/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGFhYzJjYy1iOWQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PkddvR10tuIqZ43hvE0D_sRx6pwTHlgCnBNNRCPcJ84=)
Folks: Without the protections of _Roe v. Wade_ , millions of women no longer have the freedom to make choices about their health and future. That's why my colleagues and I just reintroduced the _Equal Access to Abortion Coverage in Health Insurance _(EACH) _Act_ , a bill that would guarantee abortion coverage without restrictions for those who rely on Medicaid and other federal health plans. This bill would end the Hyde Amendment, lifting restrictions to reproductive health care that impacts millions of Americans — especially those struggling to make ends meet, people of color, young people, and immigrants. And while Coloradans are safe from the right-wing assault on our civil liberties, not every American is so fortunate. For pregnant women from Texas to Wisconsin, and our neighbors in Utah and Kansas, basic reproductive care is banned or almost entirely inaccessible today. That's why it is crucial that we pass the EACH Act to protect the reproductive rights of women nationwide. [**If you agree, add your name and become a citizen cosponsor of the EACH Act today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61415069/399990144/1340715479?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGFhYzJjYy1iOWQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PkddvR10tuIqZ43hvE0D_sRx6pwTHlgCnBNNRCPcJ84=&emci=8aa26b3f-9ed4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=88aac2cc-b9d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) | **[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61415079/399990151/1340715479?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGFhYzJjYy1iOWQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PkddvR10tuIqZ43hvE0D_sRx6pwTHlgCnBNNRCPcJ84=&emci=8aa26b3f-9ed4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=88aac2cc-b9d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)**
---
I believe that a woman's health care decisions should be between herself and her doctor, not the government. Colorado is a safe haven for women seeking reproductive care, but women across the country are already facing the consequences of a post-Roe landscape.
These harmful policies make it harder, if not impossible, for patients to afford an abortion — denying millions their reproductive rights. And recent data shows that 62 percent of voters support lifting federal abortion coverage restrictions and believe Medicaid should cover the procedure.
**That's why we need to pass the EACH Act in Congress and protect reproductive rights for all Americans. I'm working on that now, but I need your help to make it happen. **
[**Team, if you agree that every woman should have access to abortion, become a citizen co-sponsor of the EACH Act and call on Congress to protect reproductive rights >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61415082/399990159/1340715479?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGFhYzJjYy1iOWQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PkddvR10tuIqZ43hvE0D_sRx6pwTHlgCnBNNRCPcJ84=&emci=8aa26b3f-9ed4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=88aac2cc-b9d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61415532/399991960/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2FkOTQ2MC1iZGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Bnh5q_l7V92CI_r6tMiGydBVVfuVdA0pP6zhMhTxFo=&emci=fa341336-bdd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d3ad9460-bdd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
Peter, Congress may be on recess, but that just means Greg is hard at work in our district.
**This morning, in the pouring rain, Greg joined nurses from Ascension Seton Medical Center on the picket line.** These nurses have unionized (becoming the biggest nurses union in Texas!) and are calling attention to inadequate staffing that make it difficult for them to provide excellent care to their patients.
**Greg is proud to stand in solidarity with our nurses—and all workers in Texas. Can you help us have his back?****[Chip in $10, or whatever you can, to help Team Casar fight for workers’ rights in Texas and across the nation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61415534/399991962/-959746952?refcode2=d3ad9460-bdd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2FkOTQ2MC1iZGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Bnh5q_l7V92CI_r6tMiGydBVVfuVdA0pP6zhMhTxFo=)**

****[Chip In »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61415538/399991966/-959746950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2FkOTQ2MC1iZGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Bnh5q_l7V92CI_r6tMiGydBVVfuVdA0pP6zhMhTxFo=)****

Peter,** ** as a former labor organizer, Greg has spent his adult life on picket lines and at the bargaining table. That’s the kind of representation Texans need in Congress.

For months, Ascension Seton nurses have complained about understaffing at the hospital. Greg is now an original sponsor of the Nurse Staffing Standards for Patient Safety Act, to prevent understaffing at hospitals.

At Team Casar, we believe good health care is a right, not a privilege. We’ll keep working to protect patients, workers, and families.
**[If you support Greg and Team Casar in the fight for workers’ rights and health care, chip in $20, or whatever you can afford.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61415540/399991968/-959746952?refcode2=d3ad9460-bdd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2FkOTQ2MC1iZGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Bnh5q_l7V92CI_r6tMiGydBVVfuVdA0pP6zhMhTxFo=)**
Thank you,
**-** Tara Pohlmeyer

clean_body: Peter, Congress may be on recess, but that just means Greg is hard at work in our district. This morning, in the pouring rain, Greg joined nurses from Ascension Seton Medical Center on the picket line. These nurses have unionized (becoming the biggest nurses union in Texas!) and are calling attention to inadequate staffing that make it difficult for them to provide excellent care to their patients. Greg is proud to stand in solidarity with our nurses—and all workers in Texas. Can you help us have his back?= = **= Peter, as a former labor organizer, Greg has spent his adult life on picket lines and at the bargaining table. That’s the kind of representation Texans need in Congress. For months, Ascension Seton nurses have complained about understaffing at the hospital. Greg is now an original sponsor of the Nurse Staffing Standards for Patient Safety Act, to prevent understaffing at hospitals. At Team Casar, we believe good health care is a right, not a privilege. We’ll keep working to protect patients, workers, and families. = Thank you, - Tara Pohlmeyer Communications Director, Greg Casar for Congress ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: Rep. Shontel Brown
subject: They should be ashamed of themselves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Tell McCarthy to stop playing games with the lives of our kids.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61416647/399996884/-849735382?refcode=EM_PET_230406HR5Pet_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWY0NTQ3Yi1jMWQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8ZHh52v3GR_-mBDtUAIhp3dr43kZ7xDMOWHocEVD3U=) Peter, they just won’t quit.

After a marathon session of Congressional amendments, the GOP narrowly passed H.R. 5 (118), despite heavy bipartisan opposition. This so-called **“Parents Bill of Rights”** would force trans kids to be outed against their will by their schools, putting even more pressure and stress on the most vulnerable in our society.

The GOP has passed similar anti-trans legislation in state legislatures across the country with the sole intention of making the lives of these kids as difficult as possible. Now, they’re taking these cruel measures to the national stage.

All the public health evidence suggests that these bills have detrimental impacts on the mental and physical well-being of the trans community, and yet the GOP ignores this evidence in favor of **playing ideological games with the lives of our kids.** Peter, it's time to speak out against these horrific pieces of legislation.

[**_Will you sign our petition demanding Kevin McCarthy and the GOP end their assault on LGBTQ+ youth? name: Team Scott
subject: Celebrate the Masters with us!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:

It is time to fire up our Democratic grassroots organizing efforts. If we want to take back the House in 2024 then we need to support these Congresswomen today to combat these asinine attacks. = Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick, Kim, and Marie instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen PO Box 326 Everett, WA 98206 United States Email is an important way for Rick Larsen to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: It’s International Beaver Day, and these climate-solving critters are counting on you, Friend
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1710472?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | _**Round furry bodies. Webbed back feet. Flat tails. Bucked teeth.**_ You got it, Friend. We’re talking about beavers -- because today is _**International Beaver Day**_! These semi-aquatic critters are more than just cute, fascinating animals that build their homes from scratch using twigs and logs. They’re also a **keystone species** responsible for maintaining healthy wetlands and fighting some of the worst impacts of the climate crisis. But harmless little beavers are being _**MASSACRED**_ by merciless hunters, with **tens of thousands** being __slaughtered every year__ for their fur and meat. Unless we act NOW to protect these precious animals, they could be **VIOLENTLY WIPED OUT** forever. [**Please, Friend, beavers are counting on you to keep them safe this Beaver Day. Will you step up now and defend them before it’s too late?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1710473?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1710474?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Beavers promote robust wetland habitats that **support biodiversity** and **absorb tons of global-warming carbon** from our atmosphere. These essential ecosystems offer **flood protection** and **shoreline erosion control** , among other natural services that our planet’s well-being depends on.
Dams and ponds managed by beavers _provide shelter_ for thousands of wildlife species, including many that are _endangered_. These beaver-made structures help keep soil moist to _prevent droughts_ , act as natural firebreaks to stop the _spread of wildfires_ , and even _provide clean water for people_.
_**It’s no wonder these fascinating animals are known for being so BUSY!**_
Scientists have known for years the widespread benefits that beavers contribute to a **sustainable planet** and the vital role they play in **mitigating climate change**. But the federal government has **FAILED** to take bold action to protect beavers from vicious hunters -- _**and now, these ecosystem engineers are in critical danger**_.
**We MUST demand urgent protections for these climate-solving superheroes while there’s still time left to save them, Friend.** [**TAKE ACTION NOW: Tell President Biden to issue an executive order to BAN beaver hunting and trapping on our public wetlands immediately! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1710475?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1710474?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for your urgent action,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Welcome to the Right Side
body:
Is the case against Trump election interference? No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-yu/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Thursdsay! Colorado members: Do you care about protecting your Tabor refunds?[Sign AFP's petition today.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-y/)**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-t/) **Election Interference** In **[Trump's speech from Mar-a-Lago](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-i/)** , he spoke to his supporters and slammed the judge assigned to his case. _Do you think this trial will interfere in the 2024 election?_ **Another Challenger for Biden** **[Biden has another Democratic challenger vying for the presidency](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-d/) f**ollowing Robert F. Kennedy Jr. filing paperwork with the Federal Election Commission. **Fit to Serve** The Air Force is **[changing their fitness requirements to join its ranks](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-h/)** because of a surge in obesity among American youth. Meanwhile, if pronouns are your thing, **[the Navy provides a safe space](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-k/).** **Thanks Bill!** In an interview with Ukraine President Zelensky, **[Bill Clinton appears to be supporting the right's argument in favor of the second amendment](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-u/)**. **Welcome to the Right Side** A**[Democratic lawmaker in North Carolina is reportedly expected to change her political party and become a Republican](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-o/), **giving the GOP a veto-proof majority in the state legislature. **Twitter Labels News Accounts** **[Twitter added a"US State-Affiliated Media' label to NPR's social media account](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-x/)**. The label appears at the top of the new organization's profile and on every tweet. **Mind Control?** The Australian **[military has a creepy way of patrolling the country](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-m/).** I really hope this technology doesn't come to the US.

**Police Can't Do Their Job** More than**[300 undercover Los Angeles police officers filed legal claims against the city and police department](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-c/) **after their names and photographs were released to a technology watchdog group that posted them online. **Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* Who is**[the judge](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-a/)?**
* I'm**[ready](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-f/).**
* **[Makes sense](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-z/) **to me**.**
* **[How many beers](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-v/) does it take?**
* What's**[wrong](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-e/) **with you?

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qurjiiy-trhiujldw-s/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. body:
| WOW. This morning I launched my campaign for Congress, and the feedback so far has been inspiring. Thank you to everyone who has sent a text of encouragement, offered to volunteer, or made a grassroots contribution! If we want to raise the bar for what we expect from our members of Congress, then we need to make a big splash. **I need 200 Founding Donors before midnight — _any amount you can manage_ , whether it’s $5 or $500, is deeply appreciated.** **[Peter, before the day is done, will you become a Founding Donor to my campaign for Congress in MI-01?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61417546/400000793/556261575?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230406launch2_cb_og_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU0ZjU1NWYtYzZkNC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o7DjhpdTCbUVbifLKsUeyfhyJsaszPTUolxS9Wz0UvY=)** | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61417547/400000795/556261575?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230406launch2_cb_og_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU0ZjU1NWYtYzZkNC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o7DjhpdTCbUVbifLKsUeyfhyJsaszPTUolxS9Wz0UvY=)

Peter, I wanted you to be among the first to know: today, I am officially launching my campaign for Congress in Michigan’s 1st district.
**[If you know me and are ready to join our movement for representation that puts country before party, add your name to endorse me on Day 1 of our campaign!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61417550/400000797/1262200375?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230406launch2_cb_og_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU0ZjU1NWYtYzZkNC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o7DjhpdTCbUVbifLKsUeyfhyJsaszPTUolxS9Wz0UvY=&emci=1dd5fd12-b7d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b54f555f-c6d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413)**
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61417551/400000798/1262200375?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230406launch2_cb_og_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU0ZjU1NWYtYzZkNC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o7DjhpdTCbUVbifLKsUeyfhyJsaszPTUolxS9Wz0UvY=&emci=1dd5fd12-b7d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b54f555f-c6d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413)
---
The summer before my junior year of high school, my family moved 100 miles north from Traverse City to Cheboygan — where my parents had met and married decades before.
**Walking into my new school, the first person to greet me was a boy named Matt.** Confused, he thought I was an exchange student! Apparently, God had a plan (and a sense of humor). I met my soulmate that day.
Since then, I’ve watched Matt grow from a boy into a man, from a husband into a father.
**September 11 changed our world forever. Matt’s first call was to a military recruiter’s office to enlist.** Two days after graduating high school, Matt left for Marine boot camp. He would later deploy to Iraq, but not before asking me to marry him. He would deploy there twice, while I studied, worked, and prayed he’d come home safely.
While Matt did come home, many of our friends did not. When he shipped out to Afghanistan a few years later, I said goodbye with our three-week-old baby in my arms.
**Matt’s service and exposure to improvised explosive devices (IEDs) and blast waves left him with an undiagnosed traumatic brain injury and post-traumatic stress.** By now, we had two young girls, and I was trying to care for them, and him, all on my own.
**Everywhere I looked for help, I ran into red tape and bureaucratic barriers.**
**I felt all alone. But, I realized there were thousands of military families just like mine that felt the same way.** So I worked with military non-profits to advocate for military families like mine.
**I demanded better services and programs for military families.****** But, when government bureaucrats refused to listen to me because I was “just a military spouse,” I knew I had to do more: I got a law degree and helped veterans take on the VA for free.
**Now, I’m running for Congress to take on the out-of-touch D.C. politicians like our congressman that are unwilling to put their country before their party, or the needs of the people first.**
For too long, the families of Northern Michigan have been ignored. **While our current representative treats Congress like a retirement hobby, we’re left worrying about the cost of gas, groceries, and child care.**
_Northern Michiganders deserve a representative who isn’t afraid of putting in hard work to fight for us._
**[Peter, if you’re with me, will you add your name today to endorse my campaign for Congress? It would mean the world to start this journey with your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61417552/400000799/1262200375?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230406launch2_cb_og_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU0ZjU1NWYtYzZkNC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o7DjhpdTCbUVbifLKsUeyfhyJsaszPTUolxS9Wz0UvY=&emci=1dd5fd12-b7d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b54f555f-c6d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413)**

Sincerely,
Callie Barr
Candidate for Congress in MI-01

This is Kevin McCarthy.

Our 2022 Midterm Elections have come and gone, and we have a brand new freshman class of Republican warriors who will fight for our shared conservative values. I desperately need to hear your opinion on our platform.

You were one of TEN conservative patriots from your area chosen to take this audit.

Please view the audit below and consider leaving your feedback.

| | | **OFFICIAL AUDIT**
_Please submit before midnight._

Fellow Conservative,

Conservative Leaders urgently need your help to shape their agenda heading into the 2024 election.

Joe Biden and his radical administration have been a complete and total DISASTER for the American people. From record inflation, to out-of-control crime, to deadly drugs crossing our border, one thing is clear -- America NEEDS new leadership in Washington DC.

**We 're only reaching out to the top 10 Republicans in every zip code and asking them to take this Platform Audit.****** Congrats, you have been selected to represent your area! This is a big deal. Don't let this opportunity go to waste.

The fact of the matter is: DEMOCRATS are scared that President TRUMP will be the Republican nominee for president in 2024, something which they just cannot allow to happen.

_**So, what do they do?**_

They resurrect a case brought against the President 7 years ago - which the Department of Justice declined to prosecute – with the hope that they can make the charges stick this time.

**This is as political as it gets.** President Trump's indictment perfectly encapsulates why he ran for the White House in the first place: Power is concentrated in the hands of too few individuals who do not believe every American deserves equal protection under the law.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

They're going to continue to try and destroy Donald Trump forever!. For nearly eight years, Democrat politicians at every level of government have tried – and failed – to SILENCE Donald J. Trump. They hate everything he stands for, the people he speaks for; they hate the man himself. The fact of the matter is: DEMOCRATS are scared that President TRUMP will be the Republican nominee for president in 2024, something which they just cannot allow to happen. So, what do they do? They resurrect a case brought against the President 7 years ago - which the Department of Justice declined to prosecute – with the hope that they can make the charges stick this time. This is as political as it gets. President Trump's indictment perfectly encapsulates why he ran for the White House in the first place: Power is concentrated in the hands of too few individuals who do not believe every American deserves equal protection under the law. So much for a case that in March 2022, the New York Times reported had "unraveled." Fellow Conservative, we need to stand with President Trump today. We need to show him that we have his back. We need to send a message to all the lunatic leftists that we're united against them in their quest to destroy him. . Democrats have promulgated false narratives against President Trump since before he was elected. They've spent millions of YOUR tax dollars on bogus investigations that have all been debunked. Now, their political theater has reached a dangerous new low. If the arrest of former President Trump infuriates you as much as it does me, . God Bless, Jim Jordan | About Jim Jordan: Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate. As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending. He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio. | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Our cruel and inequitable reality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Housing is a human right — and every person deserves to have a safe place to call home.
#
Peter,
Our nation is suffering under an intense housing crisis. Rising prices and inflation have caused average rent prices to increase _**by more than 18 percent.**_ And, across the nation, _**more than half a million people experienced homelessness in 2022.**_
However, we do not have to accept this reality. Pramilia and our movement believe that housing is a human right, which is why we’re taking action now:
**Together with Congresswoman Grace Meng, Pramilia introduced a transformative piece of legislation aiming to provide _over $300 billion_ for crucial housing infrastructure to reduce homelessness and increase affordable housing!**
Experiencing homelessness is not a failure of individuals, but a structural failure of a country that has refused to make safe and affordable housing a priority.
[**If you agree, will you make an urgent $3 investment into our movement today to help Pramila keep up the fight for affordable, fair housing?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230406.yEn9YU&refcode=em20230406-2344&t=1&akid=2344%2E420207%2ETLHPeY)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230406.yEn9YU&refcode=em20230406-2344&t=20&akid=2344%2E420207%2ETLHPeY)**
**Housing is a human right — and every person deserves to have a safe place to call home.** The crisis of housing instability can be fixed by investing in housing infrastructure and supportive services for vulnerable communities. And in the richest country in the world, it is a moral imperative that we take this issue head-on.
The **Housing is a Human Right Act** will address this cruel and inequitable reality by:
* Investing more than _**$200 billion in necessary affordable housing**_ and support services.
* Creating a new grant program to invest in humane infrastructure; providing municipalities with _**$6 billion a year**_ through a flexible program that will allow them _**to address their most urgent housing needs**_ to keep people in stable housing and support those experiencing homelessness.
* Incentivizing local investments in _**humane, evidence-based models to support people experiencing homelessness,**_ including alternatives to criminalization and penalization.
* Providing _**$10 billion for FEMA emergency food and shelter grants**_ while improving grants to better represent high rates of homelessness and income inequality.
* Authorizing _**$100 million in grants to public libraries**_ to provide assistance and tailored supports to persons experiencing homelessness.

Lacking housing often leads to penalization, interactions with law enforcement, and entering the justice system. It also makes it difficult to seek or hold a job, obtain assistance with accessing resources, and receive regular care for health needs. In fact, the harsh conditions of unsheltered homelessness leads to _**a mortality rate that is four to nine times higher**_ than that of the general public. And homelessness is disproportionately likely to affect already vulnerable groups — including communities of color, LGBTQ people, people with disabilities, seniors, veterans, and former foster youth.
**We must address this cruel reality and prioritize safe, affordable housing.[Please make a $3 donation now to show your support for the Housing is a Human Right Act as Pramila fights to get it passed in Congress.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230406.yEn9YU&refcode=em20230406-2344&t=21&akid=2344%2E420207%2ETLHPeY)**
Thank you, as always, for your support,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230406-2344-footer&t=22&refcode2=2344_420207_TLHPeY&akid=2344%2E420207%2ETLHPeY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

clean_body: Housing is a human right — and every person deserves to have a safe place to call home. Peter, Our nation is suffering under an intense housing crisis. Rising prices and inflation have caused average rent prices to increase by more than 18 percent. And, across the nation, more than half a million people experienced homelessness in 2022. However, we do not have to accept this reality. Pramilia and our movement believe that housing is a human right, which is why we’re taking action now: Together with Congresswoman Grace Meng, Pramilia introduced a transformative piece of legislation aiming to provide over $300 billion for crucial housing infrastructure to reduce homelessness and increase affordable housing! Experiencing homelessness is not a failure of individuals, but a structural failure of a country that has refused to make safe and affordable housing a priority. Housing is a human right — and every person deserves to have a safe place to call home. The crisis of housing instability can be fixed by investing in housing infrastructure and supportive services for vulnerable communities. And in the richest country in the world, it is a moral imperative that we take this issue head-on. The Housing is a Human Right Act will address this cruel and inequitable reality by: Investing more than $200 billion in necessary affordable housing and support services. Creating a new grant program to invest in humane infrastructure; providing municipalities with $6 billion a year through a flexible program that will allow them to address their most urgent housing needs to keep people in stable housing and support those experiencing homelessness. Incentivizing local investments in humane, evidence-based models to support people experiencing homelessness, including alternatives to criminalization and penalization. Providing $10 billion for FEMA emergency food and shelter grants while improving grants to better represent high rates of homelessness and income inequality. Authorizing $100 million in grants to public libraries to provide assistance and tailored supports to persons experiencing homelessness. Lacking housing often leads to penalization, interactions with law enforcement, and entering the justice system. It also makes it difficult to seek or hold a job, obtain assistance with accessing resources, and receive regular care for health needs. And homelessness is disproportionately likely to affect already vulnerable groups — including communities of color, LGBTQ people, people with disabilities, seniors, veterans, and former foster youth. After a mass shooting that took six lives, the GOP is more interested in punishing progressive Democrats than in protecting kids from more shootings.
_THIS_ is why elections matter.
Republicans are doing everything they can up and down the ballot to erode our fundamental rights, _even going so far as trying to kick our elected officials out of office._

But it gets worse: **The GOP and its MAGA extremists are raising money hand over fist as they gear up for more attacks like these,** and we have to do everything we can to stop them.

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: The Solution to Government Corruption
body:
(official statement)

| | | |
---
**\- APRIL 5, 2023 -**
(Original release)
**STATEMENT BY JAMESON ELLIS**
The greatest threat to the American people is our own deep state government, not a foreign power. To have any chance of saving our beloved Constitutional Republic, it will be up to us - WE THE PEOPLE - to prioritize liberty over leisure and ensure those who govern can no longer ignore the voice of their constituents!

Unelected bureaucrats and elected officials operate as puppeteers using their power and influence to rig the system in their favor. They made grand promises during the job interview... but went rogue.

Bribing people behind closed doors with taxpayer-funded handouts, they've recklessly been piling up debt under our noses - and now, families in Texas and all across America are paying dearly for it.

**We must have more accountability through term limits and a Constitutional amendment allowing constituents to recall and replace their representatives for violating their oath to the office they hold.**

Unfortunately, my opponent Dan Crenshaw has remained silent on this topic.

If elected to be your next representative for TX-2, **you have my word** that I**will lead the fight for term limits** and for you **to have the ability to recall and replace your representative** should they fail in their duty to defend and uphold the Constitution of the United States.
_For Liberty,_

body:
We were outraised.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=20723%2E3422442%2EvE44Xq)
Derek,
Good news—thanks to supporters like you we ended our first fundraising quarter in a strong position. With an average donation of $36, and 98% of contributions at $100 or less, this is truly a people-powered movement.
**But here’s the truth—we were outraised by our opponent by nearly 50%.**
Polling has Katie behind by just a mere two points, and shows that **40% of voters are still undecided.** We still have what it takes to win, but we need your help to close our fundraising gap and help get Katie’s message in front of voters.
[**Can you chip in today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230406-1?refcode=EMAG06_1_UPD_20230406_V1_F&refcode2=20723_3422442_vE44Xq&akid=20723%2E3422442%2EvE44Xq)

* * *
Last week, a right-wing judge (who made news a few years ago for striking down the Affordable Care Act on utterly baseless grounds) issued a devastating ruling. **He invalidated a critical portion of the Affordable Care Act that has provided millions of Americans with free preventative care, including screenings for cancer and HIV.**

This cruel decision overturns avenues of care that folks had relied on for nearly a decade. It's infuriating to see the courts — stacked with judges hand-picked by far-right groups like the Federalist Society — continue to roll back progress and make life harder and costlier for hard-working people.

**Congress must immediately get to work to reverse the damage caused by this ruling, and we need to show Kevin McCarthy that we won't be quiet until he allows action.**

Republicans have tried every trick in the book to weaken the Affordable Care Act. They failed at the ballot box to elect a majority that would repeal the law. They failed multiple times at the Supreme Court to have the law declared unconstitutional. But they haven't given up — and now they might be successful in gutting the Affordable Care Act one part at a time.

[**House Republicans need to hear from us — loudly. That's why Jennifer needs you to join her and urge Congress to work on legislation that will restore and guarantee preventative care for folks. Will you add your name now and help us reach 10,000 signatures?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61418825/400005113/467829178?ms=EM_PET_230406ACA_N_PT_FULL_6_G_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230406ACA_N_PT_FULL_6_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDhjMDkxOS1jY2Q0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Q3yUC0qutycmFJ4u6HLgMacGfqYYPIwwCd0tyIUsog=&emci=2461bef9-bcd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f08c0919-ccd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61418826/400005114/467829178?ms=EM_PET_230406ACA_N_PT_FULL_6_G_N_B2&refcode=EM_PET_230406ACA_N_PT_FULL_6_G_N_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDhjMDkxOS1jY2Q0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Q3yUC0qutycmFJ4u6HLgMacGfqYYPIwwCd0tyIUsog=&emci=2461bef9-bcd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f08c0919-ccd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Thank you,

name: Josh Harder
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene's 60 Minutes interview
body:
I can’t decide what was worse about Marjorie Taylor Greene’s 60 minutes interview: the fact that she called me and my fellow Democrats “pedophiles” ... or the fact that she’s going on a media tour to make her extremism seem like it’s more mainstream. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61418828/400005118/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgxZDU0MmItY2NkNC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9fyjqIi4QAlG1Y--Src5-QqjTvYPou_HhwzU_H2QaIE=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61418829/400005119/-1071879344?refcode=E20853-20230406-60MinutesMTG-graphic-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgxZDU0MmItY2NkNC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9fyjqIi4QAlG1Y--Src5-QqjTvYPou_HhwzU_H2QaIE=) Peter, I can’t decide what was worse about Marjorie Taylor Greene’s 60 minutes interview: the fact that she called me and my fellow Democrats “pedophiles” ... or the fact that she’s going on a media tour to make her extremism seem like it’s more mainstream. **Here’s what I took away from the interview: Kevin McCarthy has now made Marjorie Taylor Greene one of the most powerful politicians in America.** She’s gone from the fringes of the far right to the front row on 60 Minutes. Her lies are reaching millions of people. I truly believe we have to say clearly and often as possible that this extremism is not ok or it will infect our country even more than it already has. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: where my story began
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I simply can’t fight back and defend my battleground seat without your critical grassroots support

---
| Peter: I just launched my first reelection campaign for the U.S. Senate here in Nevada – and I couldn’t be more grateful for the outpouring of support from people like you. **As we kick things off, I want to share a bit more about why I’m in this fight.**

It really comes down to where my story began: in a working-class family, as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. At a young age, my loved ones instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence – and I’ve carried them with me throughout my entire life.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61418894/400005412/1447906513?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230406-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDVmYTE1Yi1jZGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gSvkV_O0B-YQtprurRV6DRwCt8_DqxBr7tvLQlHtOpI=)
These values drove me to become the first in my family to graduate from college – working as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace and taking out student loans to cover the cost.

They drove me while I worked as a computer programmer in a male-dominated field – seeing inequality in our workforce firsthand.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61418895/400005413/1447906513?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230406-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDVmYTE1Yi1jZGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gSvkV_O0B-YQtprurRV6DRwCt8_DqxBr7tvLQlHtOpI=)
And they drove me during my first Senate race when I defeated a Republican incumbent against all odds to become only the second woman senator in Nevada's history.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61418896/400005414/1447906513?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230406-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDVmYTE1Yi1jZGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gSvkV_O0B-YQtprurRV6DRwCt8_DqxBr7tvLQlHtOpI=)
To this day, my path is lit by these guiding lights. They fuel my fight to advocate for working families and bring much-needed progress to the lives of all Nevadans, no matter who you are or where you come from.

**But right now,_The Washington Post_ is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and _FiveThirtyEight_ says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control. That’s why the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat.**

I simply can’t fight back and defend my battleground seat without your critical grassroots support, Peter. **That’s why I have to ask:[_Please, will you split $5 between my campaign and BACKROADS PAC now – before our crucial midnight deadline – to become one of the essential Reelection Founding Donors we need to win in Nevada and defend the Senate for Democrats?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61418897/400005415/1447906513?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230406-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDVmYTE1Yi1jZGQ0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gSvkV_O0B-YQtprurRV6DRwCt8_DqxBr7tvLQlHtOpI=)**

Thank you. Your support will go such a long way – especially in these crucial early days.

– Jacky Rosen

While rallying in support of President Trump in West Palm Beach, Florida while his motorcade drove him to Palm Beach International airport to fly to New York City to appear before a courtroom after being indicted by the crooked, George Soros funded, Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg, I spoke with protesters about Trump's arrest.
**WATCH:**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d9016011-2a9e-4c2d-80ab-564921e55c03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I then had the honor of attending President Trump's post-arrest remarks at Mar-a-Lago on Tuesday evening following his return from New York.

# I have some big news...
After three-plus amazing years of Spicer & Co., I’m leaving Newsmax to embark on a new project. I’m really excited about what’s to come, and I think you will be too. Watch my new video here:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f8c79f9128&e=f6564bbe3b)
It’s been my honor to be part of the Newsmax team. I’m grateful for my time there and all of your support over the years. You are what made the show a success.
Don’t worry, I’m going to continue to bring you the most important stories and guests, and more than that, expose the false narratives and the hypocrisy the mainstream media is pushing.
If you want to see all of my upcoming videos and be the first to know what’s going on when we announce it, join me on YouTube right now. [Subscribe to my channel at YouTube.com/SeanMSpicer](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=672278ac13&e=f6564bbe3b), and ring the bell so you never miss a video.
I can’t wait to share what’s coming up next. Thank you for your support, and I’ll see you on YouTube very soon!
| [Subscribe on YouTube](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=62ebe6d4fc&e=f6564bbe3b)

# "In times of market downturn and economic instability, I turn to the experts at Bishop Gold Group”
---
In the Joe Biden economy, the stock market and inflation have become serious concerns. I’ve begun working with Bishop Gold Group to put my money in a consistent asset, gold and silver.
Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets.
If you go to the link: [bishopgoldgroup.com/Sean](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5aef752d0c&e=f6564bbe3b), they’ll know I sent you.
Thanks to my friends at Bishop Gold Group for sponsoring this newsletter so I can continue to bring you content for free.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7a60b0d944&e=f6564bbe3b)
Every Monday on my podcast, I go through the biggest stories of the week and always include some of the most ridiculous moments of the Sunday shows. Make sure you subscribe to get caught up every Monday morning.

name: Mike Lee
subject: Here’s how we can wipe out socialism in our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckU9v3CAQxT8Nvq2FB__rwYe21vYQKapUqUp6sVgYrydlwAGsVfLpq914e8iFw3vA770Zzauj-W0Q3TcBsJBNAkCorwLg9fnCcXvhhx-Hd8uH1_aRm6sJ3wVAflvx_839kxJZk7uq3VjYQbd6RlvgULW97AGg64tlaBAQ6rlvmi-y0gCVnJtOV52c5aluTVXQABKUrGV7PVVTdlr2tgaspTYnCVrU8gYqdXXRMYbApQlcuGHJeU23REcBx4Rmi1g6OmHMOpUhngUcA-9vhDpumSdGSxsLNe7Z26uYwhYNCjV646a93G4Zzaumsxdq_Ah5yFvODvOFfJps8DpT8FNYMzG947TTphQMaUeJySezhODSdIrhL0Z9xule-M4IPqPPH_xDmn_9fnh6eX7sBbSTd2SFGj-Jt72pUf3h5elnwCIOdr2Qc5TaTtTyfBuXCfwvAAD__zrToO8)
Friend,

Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide, and our children are being influenced to adopt radical beliefs that could destroy our culture and our Republic.

Fortunately, I believe there is a solution that could help turn the tide, educate our country's youth against the dangers of socialism, and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries.

[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckTGP3CAQhX8N7tbiBht8hYtsrE0RKYp0TZIGYZhdc2HABziru18f7Z4vRRqK94DvvRlDa_Dn15GpIwNYvCsMgIlPDODl55Xy9kxfvxzeHB1e5DfqbyZ8ZgD1dcV_N_dPWiTjw01VU-NGI80ZXYPjgxz4AABqaJZRnHvVuaFHOcvuYcb5kTvROf4olBKqN40fgYPgHZe3U_StMnxwHWDHjZ05GNbxO6g1D1eTc0rU2kRNGJda13JPdGJwKmi3jG3wM-ZqSpvyhcEp0f6GidNWSRM6vxET055d3sSStmyRiSnaoPdyu2UNrcZfIhPTe8hD3WoNWK8-Fu1SNNWnqNNaPfk31DtNl2S9Cb6Qj8UuKYWi55x-YzYX1B-FPxgpVoz1nX94Oj7VdfhzfD4zkDoG75iY_hPvexOT-EXLj-8Jmzy69epD8EUq1vHLfVw20d8AAAD__7aVoXg)
Connor helped me get elected back in 2010. Since then, he founded the Libertas Institute, a free market think tank headquartered in our home state, Utah. Connor was inspired to write the Tuttle Twins series when he was unable to find a way to teach his own kids about the ideas of freedom.

So far, Connor has distributed over 4 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country. **Connor is leading the fight against socialist indoctrination in our schools, creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country. **

[**Here is how Connor and the Libertas Institute plan to distribute 1,000,000 new copies of the Tuttle Twins:**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckT-z0zAQxD-N3MUjn_zvFS4ATyiYYSgogMZzkc6xQCf5STIh-fRM8hwKGhW7kn67d8irs_N1EN17AbBYkwSAUO8EwOv3C8ftJ3_6eLgZPry2n7m5m_BBAOTrSv9u7p-UxGjdXe3GwgzY4kymoKFqe9kDQNcXy9DJGfoGCF-q06wJuqpuOtUZjY15aau6sANIULKW7f1UTdmh7E0NVEvUJwkoavkAlVhdMMYQuNSBCzcsOa_pkego4JhIb5FKZ08UM6YyxLOAY-D9jVDHLfPEZOzGQo179vYuprBFTUKNXrtpL7dbGnlFe_ZCjW8hD3nL2VG-WJ8mEzxmG_wU1mzZ3mjaaVMK2qKzia1PegnBpekUwy-KeKbpWfjJCD6Tz2_8A29zxK_X339uAtrJO2uEGv8TH3tTo_rBy7cvgYo4mPVinbOp7UQtz49x6cB_AwAA__9OQaMq)
1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history will receive copies for education at home.
2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.
3. In order to do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. [**It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckbGS3CwQhJ8GZatCgyS0gYL7f3kduMq1gQPbCYVgboXNgA5Qqe6e3rV7OgdOCLqBr3tG0-rd8-vI5H8MYHE2MwAmnhjAy4-d0vaLvnw-vVk6vfRfqbub8D8DKK8r_r15fFIjaefvqpwqO-peP6OtcGz6gQ8AIIdqGeUgO-gNQCP5uUMzm-HcnGVvUZv5bJrKjcBB8Jb391N0tdR8sC1gy7WZOWjW8geo1s2uU4qRahOp8uNSypofiS4MLhnNlrD2bsZUdK5jujG4RDreMHHZCilC6zZiYjqy93cxxy0ZZGIKxquj3GEZTat2t8DE9B7yVLZSPJbdhaxsDLq4GFRciyP3huqgqRyN095lciGbJUaf1Zzib0z6huqj8AcjhoKhvPNP1F3N9Wn_NHxj0KvgnWVi-kd87E1M4ict368RqzTadXfeu9xL1vLbY1wm0p8AAAD__8jPoPA)

**The reality is neither Rand Paul, Ted Cruz, nor myself can defeat socialism alone ... we need a new generation of young conservatives willing to stand up for the Constitution and our freedoms.**

You and I can help save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families with the Tuttle Twins books!

**I spoke with Connor Boyack, the President of the Libertas Institute and author of the books, and gave him my word I would help him raise $20,000 to fund the distribution of the Tuttle Twins books to homeschool children, parents, and kids in public schools.** [**Please consider donating the most generous amount you can to help put a Tuttle Twins book in the hands of a young child!**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckb-O3CwUxZ8Gd2MxF8b2V7j4EscpIkUpVsqfBmG4HrPhggewRrtPH3nWmyINxTnA75x7Na3ezS89az8wgMXZzACY-J8B3H7eKW3P9OXz6dXS6dZ8pctuwkcGUF5W_Hvz-KRG0s7vajtUtteNntFW2J-bjncA0HbV0mstZ4nzZHDuBGJ3ASOlPfNJ4H9y7mzleuAguOTNfopL3WreWQkouTYTB80kf4Bqfb7rlGKk2kSqfL-UsuZHopHBmNFsCWvvJkxF5zqmK4Mx0vGGiXErpAit24iJ4cje7GKOWzLIxBCMV0e5wzKaVu2ugYnhLeSpbKV4LHcXsrIx6OJiUHEtjtwrqoOmcjROe5fJhWyWGH1WU4q_MekrqvfC74wYCobyxj99er49fZ_gadxtFbyzTAz_iI-9iUH8ouXHt4hV6u16d9673LRM8utjXCbSnwAAAP__apyiCQ)

clean_body: Friend, Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide, and our children are being influenced to adopt radical beliefs that could destroy our culture and our Republic. Fortunately, I believe there is a solution that could help turn the tide, educate our country's youth against the dangers of socialism, and teach young people about the ideas of liberty. My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries. Connor helped me get elected back in 2010. Since then, he founded the Libertas Institute, a free market think tank headquartered in our home state, Utah. Connor was inspired to write the Tuttle Twins series when he was unable to find a way to teach his own kids about the ideas of freedom. So far, Connor has distributed over 4 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country. Connor is leading the fight against socialist indoctrination in our schools, creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country. 1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history will receive copies for education at home. 2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism. 3. In order to do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. The reality is neither Rand Paul, Ted Cruz, nor myself can defeat socialism alone ... we need a new generation of young conservatives willing to stand up for the Constitution and our freedoms. You and I can help save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families with the Tuttle Twins books! I spoke with Connor Boyack, the President of the Libertas Institute and author of the books, and gave him my word I would help him raise $20,000 to fund the distribution of the Tuttle Twins books to homeschool children, parents, and kids in public schools. *PLEASE NOTE: All online donations are being matched by one of the Libertas Institute 's biggest supporters, John P. This means your donation is DOUBLED! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift. The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them. Parents aren't forcing their kids to read them. They are written for children to enjoy and learn at the same time. This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. You and I can create a new generation of young conservatives to preserve our Republic. As I said, Connor is a great friend of mine, and I believe in what he is doing. The Libertas Institute and the Tuttle Twins are transforming this country and one of our most promising ways to fight back against socialism in schools. I suspect you get a dozen emails asking you to donate every week. This is much different. This isn't for some campaign or candidate that needs money. This is a cause I am passionate about and believe can reverse the influence of socialism in our society. We just need to distribute these books and begin teaching our nation's youth about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history. It seems like you love our country, the ideas of liberty, and the Constitution as much as I do. Which is why I am emailing you. Please consider making the most generous donation you can and help me restore our Republic. Please consider this a personal and urgent request from me. Senator Mike Lee Paid for by Libertas Institute

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We wanted you to be the first to know
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2072%2E5257348%2EDGHgJX)
We wanted you to be the first to know, Derek — **our campaign just published our Q1 fundraising numbers.** Take a look:
**$6.5 million** raised.
**$0** from corporate PACs.
**Nearly 145,000 contributions.**
With an average contribution of **$45**.
_Across every single county in California, and every state in the country._
_This_ is what a true grassroots movement looks like — fighting for truth, justice, and our democracy.
When Adam fought for accountability by leading Trump’s first impeachment trial, you had his back.
When Kevin McCarthy unilaterally removed Adam from the Intelligence Committee where he had been the Chairman and top Democrat for years, you had his back.
**And when Adam stood up to say that his fight for accountability and oversight in Congress was just getting started, and that he was running for Senate to protect our democracy and build an economy that works for everyone — you answered the call. You have stood by his side against relentless MAGA Republican attacks.**
Thanks to your support, our campaign is entering this new quarter with momentum. Thanks to your support, we’ll have the resources to continue traveling across California taking our message to millions of voters. And thanks to your support, we’ll have the resources to respond to the increasingly volatile right-wing attacks.
_Thank you, Derek._ For always having Adam's back.
Onward,
— Schiff HQ

clean_body: | We wanted you to be the first to know We wanted you to be the first to know, Derek — our campaign just published our Q1 fundraising numbers. Take a look: $6.5 million raised. $0 from corporate PACs. Nearly 145,000 contributions. With an average contribution of $45. Across every single county in California, and every state in the country. This is what a true grassroots movement looks like — fighting for truth, justice, and our democracy. When Adam fought for accountability by leading Trump’s first impeachment trial, you had his back. When Kevin McCarthy unilaterally removed Adam from the Intelligence Committee where he had been the Chairman and top Democrat for years, you had his back. And when Adam stood up to say that his fight for accountability and oversight in Congress was just getting started, and that he was running for Senate to protect our democracy and build an economy that works for everyone — you answered the call. You have stood by his side against relentless MAGA Republican attacks. Thanks to your support, our campaign is entering this new quarter with momentum. Thanks to your support, we’ll have the resources to continue traveling across California taking our message to millions of voters. And thanks to your support, we’ll have the resources to respond to the increasingly volatile right-wing attacks. Thank you, Derek. For always having Adam's back. Onward, — Schiff HQ | | 150 E. subject: Here's why I'm running for Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://raquelteran.com/ [https://raquelteran.com/]
Hi friend,
I’m Raquel Terán and I’m running to represent Arizona’s 3rd district in Congress. In a moment, I’ll tell you more about me and why I’m running, but first, I want to thank you for signing up to join our campaign. Take a moment to learn about my story and this race. ⬇️
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_040623_WelcomeSeries_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_040623_WelcomeSeries_1&amount=25]
In 2006, as I witnessed anti-immigrant sentiment and legislation gaining momentum in Arizona, I started organizing in our community with Mi Familia Vota. My deep belief in democracy, equality, fairness and family is as strong today as it was then.
That’s why I organized to oppose the notorious SB 1070 “show me your papers” racial-profiling law.
It’s why I ran for the Arizona House and why I was proud to serve in the Arizona State Senate, where I fought every day to make it easier to get ahead and provide for our families, by investing in our schools, making our neighborhoods safer, and bringing good jobs back to the district.
And it’s why I brought together a coalition of Democrats and Republicans, union members, educators, and youth activists to take on former Sheriff Joe Arpaio and Donald Trump.
Last year, with our democracy under assault, I brought our coalition together once again to reject GOP extremists like Kari Lake and elect a Democratic Governor, Secretary of State and Attorney General for the first time in decades. That’s the power we can harness when we come together with a vision of Arizona that includes all of us.
Now, I’m running to take our fight to Congress.
You can learn more about my story and this race by watching our launch video. I’m linking to it here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_040623_WelcomeSeries_1&amount=25]
Stay tuned here, friend, for updates from the campaign trail. I’m so pleased to have you with us.
A ganar,
Raquel Terán
DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_040623_WelcomeSeries_1&amount=25]
Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States
Paid for by Terán for Congress
